chapters.text: Egypt gama kona ahung kitoldoh nungu kum ni lhin kum, lha ni lhinna, chuche lha nikho masapen nin Sinai gam gamthip noiya kikhopna ponbuh sunga chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate khoppi pumpi hi abonchauvin aminu simin lang, aphung phungin, ainko kon simin lang, amin dungjui cheh-in pasala kai tapou chu alubuh cheh-in simdoh temin;
Israel sunga pasal kum som nia lhah chunglam gal a kon thei cheh chu abonchan nang le Aaronin simtoh lhonin lang amitakip chu ama ama panna thei cheh muna chun aloi loi lah a pansah lhontan.
Chule nang nin miho chu aphung phunga ainsung lhah a aupa pen tah mihem khat cheh chu nang ni kithopi dinga napansah lhon ding ahi.
Hitia nangni panpi ding miho chu aminu hicheng hi ahi; Reuben phunga mi Shedeur chapa Elizur hi ding,
Simeon phunga mi Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel hi ding,
Judah phunga mi Amminadab chapa Nahshon hi ding;
Isachar phunga mi Zuar chapa Nethanel hi ding;
Zebulun phunga mi Helon chapa Eliab hi ding;
Joseph chapate lah a mi Ephraim phunga kona mi Ammihud chapa Elishama toh, Manasseh phunga kona mi Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel hi ding ahilhone;
Benjamin phunga mi Gideoni chapa Abidan hi ding;
Dan phunga mi Ammishaddai chapa Ahiezer hi ding;
Asher phunga mi Ochran chapa Pagiel hi ding;
Gad phunga mi Deuel chapa Eliasaph hi ding;
Naphtali phunga mi Enan chapa Ahira hi ding ahi,” ati.
Mihem hichengse hi khoppi lah a kona kilhengdoh chengse ahiuvin, apu apauva aphung kaiyuva phung upa cheh jong ahiuvin, Israel sepai lamkaiya pang cheh ahitauve.
Hichea amin kisimdoh chengse chu Mose le Aaronin apui lhonin,

hiti chun lha ni lhinna, nikho masapen ni chun amahon khoppi pumpi chu abonchan akhomtauve. Israel chate chu akisim nauva aphung phungin, ama ama insung lhah cheh in akisimuvin, kum som nia lhah chunglamse se chu mi abonchan asimun, amin cheh-in asimdoh uvin, khat khat’in agoldoh soh heluvin,
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin, aman jong Sinai gam gamthip noiya chun miho chu asim toh soh keitai.

Israel chapa tahpen Reuben chate chu aphungkai kaiya akisimtoh a ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kailhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon thei cheh mi khat khat’in akisim soh kei tauvin ahi.
Hita kisimdoh Reuben phunga mijat chu sang somli le sang gup toh ja nga alhinguve.

Simeon chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh a ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kailhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon thei cheh mi khat khat’a akisimdoh a ahileh,
Simeon phunga mi kisimdoh mijat chu sang som nga le sang ko toh jathum alhinguve.

Gad chate jong hiti chun aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh uva ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kailhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon thei cheh mi khat khat’in akisimdohin ahileh,
Gad phunga mijat kisimdoh chu mihem sang somli le sang nga toh jagup le som nga ahiuve.

Judah chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh uva ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kailhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon thei cheh mi amin cheh in akisimdoh tan ahileh,
Judah phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang som sagi leh sangli toh jagup alhinguvin ahi.

Issachar chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh uva ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kailhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon thei cheh mi amin cheh-in akisimdoh soh keiyin ahileh,
Issachar phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang som nga le sangli toh ja li alhinguvin ahi.

Zebulun chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh a, ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kai lhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon theise se mi amin cheh in akisimdoh-in ahileh,
Zebulun phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang som nga le sang sagi toh ja li alhinguve.

Joseph chate lah a jong Ephraim chate chengse chu aphungkhaiya akisimtoh a, ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kai lhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon theise se mi amin cheh-in akisim doh-in ahileh,
Ephraim phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang somli le ja nga alhinguve.

Manasseh chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh a, ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kai lhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon theise se mi amin cheh-in akisimdoh-in ahileh,
Manasseh phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang somthum le sang ni toh ja ni alhinguvin ahi.

Benjamin chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh a, ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kai lhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon theise semi amin cheh-in akisimdohin ahileh,
Benjamin phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang somthum le sang nga toh ja li aihinguvin ahi.

Dan chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh a, ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu insung kai lhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon theise semi amin cheh-in akisimdohin ahileh,
Dan phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang somgup le sang ni toh ja sagi alhinguve.

Asher chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh a, ama ama insunglhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu hi lhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon theise se mi amin cheh in akisimdoh-in ahileh,
Asher phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang somli le sang khat toh ja nga alhinguve.

Naphtali chate jong chu aphungkhai khaiya akisimtoh a, ama ama insung lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, apu apateu kai lhah a akisimdoh phat’uvin kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon theise semi am in cheh-in akisimdoh-in ahileh,
Naphtali phunga mihem kisimdoh mijat chu sang som nga le sang thum toh ja li alhinguvin ahi.
Hichengse chu Mose le Aaron chule apu apateu insung thalheng cheh a kilhengdoh Israel lamkai mi som le nin anasimdoh sau mijat kisimdoh ho chu ahiuve.
Hiti chun Israel chate chu abonchauva akisimsoh keiya, apu apateu kai lhah cheh a akisimdoh a, kum som nia lhah chunglam pasal gal kon theise se chu Israel sunga akisimdoh soh keiyuvin ahile,
abonchauva mihem jat kisimdoh mong mong chu sang jagup toh, sang thum toh, ja nga le som nga alhinguvin ahi.
Leviho vang chu apu apau kai lhah a aphung dungjuiyuvin mipi chutoh akisimtha tapouvin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:
“Nangman Levi phung vang chu mijat nasim thei louhel ding, amaho chu Israel min kisimna chu alah-uva nasimtha thei lou ding ahi.

Chuti sanga chu nangman Leviho chu hettohsahna houbuh a lhachaa kinbola pang ding leh ahoubuh limbol ding, athilkeo amanchah chengse vetup dinga napansah joh ding ahibouve; chujongle amaho chun houbuh le amanchah chengse aboncha apoh leuva alimbol diu, hita chu ngahmun jeng jong chu hettohsahna houbuh kimvela akisem dingu ahi.

Houbuh chu pohdoh ding ahitih tih chuleh Leviho chun aphet lhahuva, chutobangma chu houbuh chu tundoh ding ahiphat jongleh Leviho ma man atundoh diu ahi. Midang milham khat tou houbuh koma chu ahung valut khah a ahileh hitohang mi chu thadoh jeng ding ahiye.

Israel chate chu mihem ama ama cheh chun aloi loiya ngahmun akisemuva, mihem ama ama cheh-in ama ding cheh ngahmun akikhoh sah diu, amichang chun ama ama jokham dungjui cheh a ngahmun akisem dingu ahi;

Leviho vang chun hettohsahna houbuh kimvela chu aponbuh akison cheh dingu ahiye. Hita chu akibola ahileh Israel chate khoppi pumpi chunga hung chuthei lungsatna kona hoidohna umtheijo ding ahi; chujongle Leviho chun hettohsahna houbuh kinbol ding chu apoh dingu ahiye,” tin aseiye.
Israel chaten jong Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin aboltauve; hita chu amahon Pakaiyin Mose athupeh jouse chu abang banga anabol soh keiyu ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu ahinseiyin hi tin ati:

“Israel chate chun ngahmun akisem tengu leh mihem ama ama cheh in ajem dungjui cheh a apu apateu insung kai lhah ponlap dungjui cheh a akison cheh dingu ahin; hita chu ponbuh chu akikol kimpenga, ki-ang ngat to cheh a ason’uva, kikhopna ponbuh chu akimvelsoh kei dingu ahiye.
Nisa hung sodohna lam, niso lama ngahmun sem ding loi chu Judah phung ngahmun jem neiho chu ahiuvin, aloi loiya, kigol’uva, chule Judah chate gal lamkaiya chu Amminadab chapa Nahshon pangah ahiye;
asepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang som sagi le sangli toh jagup alhinguvin ahi.
Nahson bana ngahmun kison ding ho chu Issachar phung mi ahiuvin, hichea Issachar chate lamkai ding chu Zuar chapa Nethanel chu ahiye.
Zuar sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang som nga le sangli toh ja li alhinguvin ahi.
Zebulun phung ahipai paiyun, Zebulun chate lah a lamkai chu Helon chapa Eliab chu ahiye;
chule Eliab sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang som nga le sang sagi toh ja li alhinguvin ahi.

Judah phung ngahmun sunga pang mijat mong mong chu aloi loiya akisimdoh a ahileh abonchauvin mihem sang ja khat toh sang somget le sang gup toh ja li alhinguve. Ngahmun pumpi akitoldoh ding tengleh Judah phung mite chu kitol masapen dingu ahiye.
“Lhanglama ngahmun sem ding loi chu Reuben phungjem neiho chu ahiuvin, aloi loiya kigol’uva, chule Reuben chate lamkaipa chu Shedeur chapa Elizur hijah ahiye;
Elizur sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiya mihem sang somli le sang gup toh ja nga alhinguvin ahi.
Elizur bantah a ngahmun kisem ding chu Simeon phung mite ahiuvin, Simeon chate lamkaipa chu Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel ahiye.
Shelumiel sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang som nga le sang ko toh ja thum alhinguve.
Chule aban kit’a chu Gad phung pang ding ahiuvin, Gad chate lamkaipa chu Reuel chapa Eliasaph chu ahiye.
Eiasaph chun sepai amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang somli le sang nga toh jagup le som nga aneiye.

Reuben phung ngahmun sunga pang mijat mong mong chu aloi loiya akisimdoh a ahileh abonchauvin mihem sangja khat toh sang som nga le sang khat toh ja li le som nga alhinguvin ahi. Amaho chengse hi anilhinna a kitol ding ahiuve.

“Chujou tah leh ngahmun jouse lailung tah a kisong Leviho ngahmun kitoldoh ding, kikhopna ponbuh chutoh kitol tha ding ahi; amihon ngahmun anakisem pet’uva tobang banga chu akitoldoh tengu jong leh kitoldoh ding ahiuvin, ama ama panmun cheh a panguva, ama ama jem cheh chu anei cheh diu ahiye.
“Nilhum lama ngahmun sem ding loi chu Ephraim phung jem neiho chu ahiuvin aloi loiya kigol’uva, chule Ephraim chate lamkaipa chu Ammihud chapa Elishama ahiye.
Elishama sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang somli le ja nga alhinguve.
Elishama bantah a ngahmun sem ding chu Manasseh phung ahiuvin, Manasseh chate lamkaipa chu Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel ahiye;
Gamaliel sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang som thum le sang ni toh ja ni alhinguve.
Chule aban kit’a chu Benjamin phung ahin, Benjamin chate lamkaipa chu Gideoni chapa Abidan ahiye;
Abidan sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang som thum le sang nga toh ja li ajhinguvin ahi.

Ephraim phung ngahmun sunga pang mihem mong mong chu aloi loiya akisimdoh a ahileh abonchauvin mihem sang ja khat toh sang get le ja khat alhinguvin ahi. Amaho hi akitol tenguleh athum lhinna kitol ding ahiuve.
“Sah lama ngahmun sem ding loi chu Dan phung jem neiho chu ahiuvin, aloi loiya kigol’uva, chule Dan chate lamkaipa chu Ammishaddai chapa Ahiezer chu hijah ahiye.
Ahiezer sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiya mihem sang somgup le sang ni toh ja sagi alhinguvin ahi.
Chutengle Ahiezer ngahmun bantah a pang ding chu Asher phung ahiuvin, Asher chate lamkaipa chu Ochran chapa Pagiel ahiye.
Pagiel sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang somli le sang khat toh ja nga alhinguve.
Aban kit’a pang ding chu Naphtali phung ahin, Naphtali chate lamkaipa jong chu Enan chapa Ahira ahiye;
Ahira sepaite chu amijat kisimdohsa dungjuiyin mihem sang som nga le sang thum toh ja li alhinguvin ahi.

Dan phung ngahmun sunga pang mihem jat mong mong chu abonchauvin sang ja khat toh sang som nga le sang sagi toh jagup alhinguvin ahi. Amaho hi akitoldoh tengu leh anukhah pena panguva, hita chu ajem ajem dungjui cheh a kitol ding ahiuve,” ati.

Israel chate apu apateu insung kai lhah dungjui cheh a kisimdoh mijat chu hichengse hi ahiuve; ngahmun jousea um aloi loiya kisimdohsa mihem mong mong chu abonchauvin sang jagup toh sang thum toh ja nga le som nga alhinguvin ahiye.
Ahin Pakaiyin Mose thu apehsa bang chun Leviho chu adang Israel chate lah a chun akisimtha pouvin ahi.

Israel chaten jong Pakaiyin Mose athupeh hang bangin asei jouse abolsoh keiyuvin, hijeh chun a ma ama jem dungjui cheh-in ngahmun akisem soh keiyuvin, akitoldoh tengu jong leh hiti chun akitol jiuvin, amichang cheh-in jong ama ama insung dungjui leh apu apateu insung dungjui cheh-in ngahmun akisemuvin ahi.
Sinai molsang chunga Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinsei nikhoa Aaron le Mose khanggui chedan ho chu hiche ho hi anahi.
Hichelaiya Aaron chapate chu aminu hicheng hi ahiuve: apeng masapen Nadab ahin, chule Abihu ahin, Eleazar ahin, chutengle Ithamar ahiuvin ahi.
Hichengse chu Aaron chapate thempua pang dinga thao nusa cheh, thempu natoh tong dinga kiseisa ho min ho ahi.

Ahin Nadab le Abihu chu Sinai gamthip noiya Pakai henga dan ngailouva meiya thilto atodoh lhon jeh-in Pakai angsung laitah a athi lhontan ahi; hijeh chun amanin jong cha anei lhonpon, chi akhai lhon tapoi. Chuti ahijeh chun Eleazar le lthamar hin apa Aaron hinlai sungin thempu natoh anatong lhonin ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Levi phunga mite chu hinpui lut’in, thempupa Aaron angsunga hingoldoh peh temin, chutengle amahochengse chun Aaron manchah nom dungjuiya akin abolpeh dingu ahi.
Leviho chun houbuh sunga, kikhopna ponbuh maiya kin abol’uva, hita chu Aaron le khoppi pumpi dinga na atoh diu ahiye.
Hitobanga chu na atoh-uva, kikhopna ponbuh manchah athilkeo aboncha avet tup’uva, Israel chate jouse kin toh ding chan atoh uva abol dingu ahiye.
Nangman jong Leviho chu abonchauva Aaron le achapate napeh doh soh jeng ding ahiuve; Israel chate jouse lah a Leviho se se chu Aaron kipedoh jeng-ah ahitauve.

Hita chu nangman Aaron le achapate chengse chu thempua napansah a, amahon jong thempu kin jeng abol diu ahin; ijemtia michom dang khat tou ahung vah lut kha a auma ahijongleh hitobang mihem chu thadoh jeng ding ahibouve,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Vetan, keiman Israel chate lah a Leviho se se hi Israel chate apeng masa, naobu tumkeh masa chengse khel din kalhengdoh tai; hijeh a chu Leviho hi abonchauva keima chan ding ahitauve.

Ijeh-inem itileh naosen peng masa jouse hi keiya ahiuve; ajeh chu keiman Egypt gamsunga naosen peng masa jouse kathagam nikho chun keiman Israel lah a apeng masa jouse chu mihem hihen lang gancha hijongle abonchauva keima chan dinga kasuh thenga kathensosa cheh ahitauvin, hijeh a chu keiya hisoh kei ding ahiuve; keima hi Pakai chu kahi jinge,” ati.
Sinai gamthip noiya chun Pakaiyin Mosejah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Nangman Levi chate hi ama ama insung kai lhah cheh leh aphung phunguvin simdoh in lang, pasal lha khat’a lhah chunglamse se chu abonchauva nasimsoh kei ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n ama thu kipeh bang bangin Pakai thusei ajah dungjuiyin Leviho asimtan ahi.
Amin cheh-uva hung kisimdoh dungjuiyin hicheng hi Levi chapate ahiuve; Gershon toh Kohath toh chule Merari ahiuve.
Chule Gershon chapa teni chu amin ainsung kai lhah dungjuiya akisima ahileh, Libni le Shimei ahilhone.
Chule Kohath chapate jong chu ainsung kai lhah cheh a akisima ahileh Amram toh, lzhar toh, Hebron toh, chule Uzziel ahiuve.
Hita chu Merari chapate jong chu ainsung kai lhah dungjuiyuva akisima ahileh Mahli leh Mushi ahilhone. Hichengse chu apu apateu insung kai lhah dungjuiya Levite insung miho chu ahiuvin ahi.
Gershona kondoh chengse chu Libni insung mite leh Shimei insung mite ahiuvin, amaho chengse se chu Gershon son le chilhah ahiuve.
Hichete chu amijat mong mongu pasal lha khat lhingsaa kona chunglamse se akisimdoh soh keiya ahile, abonchauvin mihem sang sagi le ja nga alhinguvin ahi.
Gershon insung kai lhah miho chun houbuh tomlam nilhum langa chu ngahmun akisem diu anahin,
chule Lael chapa Eliasaph chu alamkaiyuva anapanga, hita chu Gershon chilhah chengse chu aman apu apateu insung kai lhah dungjui cheh a analamkai ahiuve.
Kikhopna ponbuh sunga Gershon chate toh ding akinu chu houbuh vet tup ding ahin, ponbuh le achunga kidal akhuna chengse ahin, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phunga kikhai pondal ahin,

palgola kidal akikhai chengse ahin, maicham kimvel le houbuh kimvela kidah, palkima kotpi phunga kidah pondal ahin, akhaose se leh hichengse kinbolna chunga natoh ding jouse aboncha poh tup ding chu ahisoh keiye.
Kohath a kondoh chengse chu Amram insung ahin, Izhar insung ahin, Hebron insung ahin, chule Uzziel insung toh ahiuve; hichengse chu abonchauva Kohath kailhah ainsung mijeng jeng ahiuvin ahi.

Amaho hi amijat mong mongu jong pasala kai, lha khat lhingsaa lhah chunglamse se chu mihem sang get le jagup alhinguvin, mi hijat chun munthenga toh ding kinjouse chu atohjinguva abol jing jengu ahiye.
Kohath chapate insungse se chun houbuh lhanglama chu ngahmun akisem diu anahi;
chule Uzziel chapa Elizaphan chu Kohath chilhah insung mite lah a chu apu apateu insung dol a jong aupau alamkaipena anapang ahiye.

Chule amaho toh ding akinu chu ahileh thusom thingkong vet tup ding ahin, dokhang limbol ding ahin, thaomei khom limsah ding ahin, maicham jouse vet tup ding ahin, thempuhon kinbolna amanjiu munthenga kimang um le bel jouse abol theng diu ahin, chule pondal vet tup ding ahin, hichengse kinbolna toh ding jouse chu aboncha amaho toh ding ahisoh helin ahi.
Chujongle thempupa Aaron chapa Eleazar chu Levite lamkaiho jouse chunga alen pena panga, munthenga natoh ding kin nei jouse ho natoh chu avet tup soh kei ding ahi.
Meraria kondoh chengse chu Mahli insung le Mushi insung ahiuvin; amaho chengse chu Merari insung mijeng jeng ahiuve.
Amaho hi amijat mong mongu jong pasal lha khat lhingsaa lhah chunglamse se chu mihem sang gup le ja ni alhinguvin ahi.

Chule apau apuu lhah a ainsung dungjuiyuvin Merari insung kai lhah chengsea ding chun Abihail chapa Zuriel chu aupapen leh alamkai pen tah-in anapangin ahi; amaho chu houbuh sah lama ngahmun kisem ding loi anahiuvin ahi.

Chutengleh Merari chapate toh ding akinuva kisep doh chu houbuh thingkolse se leh, agolvai chengse toh, akhomise se ahin, akhom todom ho toh ahin, khom todop kithopi chengse toh ahin, hita chu hichengse dinga limbolna ding natoh aboncha chu atoh dingu ahi;
chujongle akimvel lhung keiya pal khom jouse leh akhom todop chengse toh, akikhaina ho leh akhao jouse jong avet tup’uva alimbol dingu ahiye.

Achaina keiya niso lam hou buh mai, kikhopna ponbuh mai lam, nisa hung sodoh na lama ngahmun kisem ding chu Mose le Aaron toh chule Aaron chapate toh ahiuvin, amaho chun muntheng sunga kilhaina kin jouse apoh-uva, Israel chate dinga bol louva akhoh jouse abolpeh jing jeng dingu ahi; midang chu koi koi hijongle ahung vah lut’ah auma ahileh hitobang mihem chu thadoh jeng ding ahi.

Levite mijat kisimdohsa chu, Pakai thupeh a kona Mose le Aaronin asimdoh lhon chu ainsung sunga akisima ahileh pasal jouse lha khat lhingsaa lhah chunglamse se abonchauvin mihem sang som ni le sang ni alhinguvin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin, “Israel chate lah naosen pasal peng masa jouse chu lhakhat lhingsaa lhah chunglamse se simdoh in lang, abonchauvin ama ama min cheh-in simdoh temin.

Chule nangman Levi miho chu Israel chate jouse lah a anaosenu peng masa jouse khela Pakai kitipa keima hi neipeh a, chujongle Israel chate gancha peng masa jouse khela jong Levi miho gancha jouse chu neipeh ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun Pakaiyin thu apeh bang bangin Mose’n jong Israel chate lah a naosen peng masa jouse chu abonchauvin asimsoh keitan ahi.

Hichea chun naosen pasal apeng masa chengse chu amijat kisimdoh dungjuiyin amin cheh a akisima ahileh lha khat lhingsaa lhah chung lamse se chu mihem jat sang som ni le sang ni toh ja ni le som sagi le thum alhinguvin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel mite lah a pasal peng masa jouse khel dingin Levi miho hi lhengdoh-in lang chule Israel chate gancha jouse khelin jong Levi miho gancha ho hi lhengdoh tan, Levi miho hi Pakai kitipa keima chan ding ahiuve.
Chule Levi miho sanga hung tamdohjo nalai Israel chate pasal peng masa mihem ja ni le som sagi le thum dinga chu akilhatdoh na dinguva
nangman sum shekel nga nate ding ahin; hiche shekel natena ding chu munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya natea, hita chu gerah som nia shekel khat kihisah shekela chu natepeh ding ahin,
hiche sum chu nangman mihem avaldoh chengse kilhatdohna man dinga chu Aaron le achapate napeh tei tei ding ahiye,” ati.
Hitobang chun Mose’n jong Leviho sanga tamdohjo mihem jat kilhatdohna sum chu alan, lhatdamna sumin akahpeh tan ahi.
Hichea Mose’n Israel chate apeng masa hoa kona alahdoh sum jat chu munthenga kimangji shekela akitea ahileh shekel sang khat le jathum toh somgup le nga alhingin ahi.
Hiche kilhatdamna sum chu Pakai thusei dungjui, Mose athupeh bang bangin Mose’n jong Aaron le achapate chu apetai.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:
“Levite lah a Kohath chate chu amijat simdoh in lang aphungkhai khai le apu apau insung kai lhah dungjuiyin simin,
pasal kum somthuma lhah chunglam kum som nga gei sunga mi, kikhopna ponbuh sunga natoh ding tong theiya pang theina lai ding miho chu simdoh soh keiyin.
Kikhopna ponbuh sunga Kohath chapate toh ding akinu chu hiche hi ahiye; amaho hin thil theng chung nungse se chu avet tup dingu ahi.
Ngahmun akichon ding teng leh Aaron le achapate chu hung lut’uva pondal lukhu chu ahung loilhah diu, hichea chu hettohsahna thingkong chu akhu khum dingu ahi;
chutengle amahon hiche thil chu kelcha vuna akhuuva, achunga chu pondum khat adah khum diu, chule thingkong chu aputna ding moljol chengse chutoh asuhto cheh dingu ahiye.

Chujongle kilhaina dokhang chunga chu amahon pondum khat aphauva, pon aphanau chunga chu kong ho jong aluiyuva, gimnamtui halna lheng ho jong atun diu, khon chengse jong agol’uva, lengpitwi donthei thilto jong chu akilhitna ding puma akoiyuva, hiche dokhang chungma maa chu abeithei louhela kitohdoh jing jeng changlhah thilto jong chu um ding ahi.
Chujou tengleh amahon thil hijat chu ponsan-ao thim khat’a akhu uva, aboncha chu kelcha vun pheng khat akhu khum dingu ahin, chujongle aputna dinga moljol ho chu thil lutsa akoi dingu ahiye.

Chule amahon aduma kikhong pon khat alah-uva, vah dinga thaomei khom chu atom diu, athaomei ho hihen lang ameijang ho chetanna bahche ho chu hijongleh, adopna chengse chu hihen lang, athaotwi kisunbe jing jeng manchah haiho chu hijongleh atomtha cheh diu ahin,
hita chu amahon thaomei khom chu amanchah athilkeo chengse chutoh kelcha vun pheng kidah noiya chu akoi thauva chutengle akiputna akol chunga chu akoi diu ahi.
Chule sana maicham chunga jong chu pondum khat aphauva, akhuna a chu kelcha vun khat amanuva akhu khum diu, chule aputna moljol chengse chu athil lut dingu ahi.

Chujongle amaho chun munthenga kimang manchah jouse aboncha natohnaa manchah pou pou chu apoh soh kei dingu ahin, hichengse jong chu pondum khat’a ajel’uva, kelcha vun pheng khat akhu khum dingu, chutengle aputna kil chung atalai chunga chu akoi tha dingu ahiye.
Maicham phunga vutvam jouse jong chu ahamdoh uva aboncha chu ponsandup khat akhu khum diu,

chule achunga chu maicham phunga manchah jouse, akinbolna kimangjouse chu akoiyuva, khangbel ho hihen lang, thih-kheka ho chu hihen, vutlo na hihen lang, chule kisilna kong ho chu hijongle, maicham phunga kimang manchah tapou chu pon chunga chu akoi khomsoh keiyuva, kelcha vun khat akhu khum dingu chutengle aputna moljol chengse chu athil lut diu ahi.

Hita chu Aaron le achapaten ngahmun kichon ding tengleh munthenga kimang manchah jouse aboncha achunjol soh keiyuva, munthenga thilkeo jouse agonsoh tengu leh Kohath chapate chu hung lut’uva aboncha chu apoh dingu ahin, amavang thil thengse se chu khat’a khat cha jong atoh khah louhel dingu ahiye, achutilouva ahileh athilo jeng diu ahi. Kikhopna ponbuh sunga kimanchahnaa Kohath chapate toh ding kin chu hichengse hi ahiye.

“Thempupa Aaron chapa Eleazar chun vah ding thaotwi avet tup jinga, gonam ding gimnamtui angaito ding, aphat jousea lhosoh thilto chu avet tup ding, thaotwi kinu ding chutoh avet tup ding, chujongle ama chun houbuh pumpi leh asunga thil um manchah jouse aboncha avet tup ding ahin; muntheng le muntheng manchah atheng jouse kongle bel ho chu avet tup ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Levite lah a konin Kohath chate insung miho chu aphungu sumang lhon hih-in;

ahin amaho hin thil theng chung nung pen ho chu ahin nailut khah tah-uva ahijongle thilo louva ahindoh tei tei theina dinguvin hitin bol lhonjon; Aaron le achapate chu lut’u hen lang Kohath chapate chu atoh ding dingu hil jengu hen, chule apoh dingdol jouseu chu poh sahjou hen,
amaho tah vang chu phat chomcha khat jeng cha jong asunga lut dau hen lang thil theng chung nung ho chu vet dau hen, achutiloule athilo hel dingu ahi,” tin aseiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Gershon chate jong chu amijat simtoh in lang, ainsung dungjui leh aphungkhai khaiyin, apu apau lhah dungjui cheh in simdoh temin;
abonchauvin pasal kum som thuma lhah chung lam kum som geiyin, gal kon thei cheh, kikhopna ponbuh sunga natong lhachaa pang theise se chu simsoh keiyin.
Gershon phunga mite chun atoh ding akinu chu hiche ahin, akinbol dingu leh apoh dingdolu kigonpeh chu ahiye.
Hita chu amahon houbuh pondal chengse apoh uva, kikhopna ponbuh ponse se leh achung khuna toh, achunga kikhu khum kelcha vun chutoh, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula kidah pondal chutoh hi ding ahin;

pal kimvela kikhaise se chutoh, palsunga lutna ding kelkot’a kidah pondal, maicham kimvel leh houbuh kimvela kidah pai pai chuleh akidahna khaojang jouse toh, chule hiche bolna dinga amanchah aboncha puma apoh tha diu, hichengse chunga bol louva khoh chan chu ipi tobang bol ding toh ding ahijong leh amahon abol’uva atoh diu ahi.

Gershon chate toh ding chu aboncha hijat chu ahin, atoh ding jouseu chu ipi pi abol diu hihen lang itobang bang atoh dingu hijongleh atoh ding abol diu aboncha chu Aaron le achapate lamkaina noiya atoh dingu ahi; chule nangman aki nganse nau chu phatecha atoh doh cheh-u hinam, tia navet tup jing ding ahiye.
Hita chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga Gershon phung miten atoh diu akinu chu hiche hi hi ding ahin, amahon atoh ding jouseu chu thempupa Aaron chapa lthamar lamkaina noiya atoh dingu ahi.
“Merari chate jong chu nangman ama ama insung dungjuiya, apu apateu insung kai lhah dungjuiya nasimdoh cheh ding,
kum som thuma lhah chunglam kum som nga pasal natong theise se chu kikhopna’ponbuh sunga natong dinga nasimdoh ding ahi.

Chuta chu amaho aki nganse nau atoh diu akinu chu aboncha kikhopna ponbuh sunga atoh diu aboncha hicheng hi hi ding ahiye; houbuh kolse se leh agolvaise se toh, akhomho leh akhom todop chengse toh hi ding,

chule pal kimvel lhung keiya akhom chengse leh akhom todop ho toh hintin, akhaina ho le akhaose se ahin, amanchah ho chengse leh akithopi jouse chutoh hitha ding; nang hon mi chu amin cheh a ama ama cheh-in apoh ding thil chutoh nasimdoh tha cheh diu ahi.
Natoh kin hiche hi Merari chapaten ainsung dungjui cheh uva kikhopna ponbuh sunga atoh diu, thempupa Aaron chapa Ithamar lamkaina noiya atoh dingu athem anoiya lhingset ah ahitai.” ati.
Mose le Aaron toh chule khoppi lamkai chengse chun Kohath mite sung peng achapa jouseu chu asim’uvin, ama ama insung dungjui cheh leh apau apuu lhah dungjuiyin asimdoh uvin,
pasal kum som thuma lhah chunglam kum som nga gei mihem jat asimdoh soh keiyuvin, kikhopna ponbuh sunga natonga pang theina lai miho chu asimtauve.
Hichea asimdohjat’u mihem chu ama ama insung dungjuiyin mihem sang ni toh ja sagi le som nga alhinguvin ahi.

Mihem hijat chu Kohath insung kon mihem jeng ahiuvin, abonchauva chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga natonga pang cheh ahisoh keiyuvin, Pakaiyin Mose athupeh dungjuiya Mose le Aaronin anasimdohsa lhon chu ahiuve.
Gershon chapate chu amijat ama ama insung dungjui cheh le apu apateu lhah dungjuiyin akisimdoh soh keiyuvin,
pasal kum som thuma lhah chunglam kum som nga mihem chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga natong theiya lhacha pang thei ding jat,
aphungkhai khaiya akisima ainko koa asimdoh a ahileh abonchauvin mihem sang ni toh jagup le somthum alhinguvin ahi.
Mihem hijatpi chu Gershon chapate inko jeng jeng ahiuvin, abonchauva kikhopna ponbuh sunga kinbol lhacha pang jeng ahiuve, amaho se se hi Pakai thupeh dungjuiya Mose le Aaron anasimdoh lhon ahiye.
Merari chapate jong ainsung cheh uva akisimsoh a chule aphungkhai khaiyuva chule apu apateu kai lhah a ainko kouva akisimdoh a ahileh,
pasal kum som thuma lhah chunglam kum som nga gei mihem, kikhopna ponbuh sunga lhacha panga natong theise se abonchauvin,
mihem jat ainko koa akisimdohna a amijat sang thum le ja ni alhinguve.
Mihem hijatpi hi Merari chapate insung mijeng jeng kisimdoh ahiuvin, Pakaiyin Mose thu apeh dungjuiya Mose le Aaronin anasimdoh lhon ahi.
Levite abonchauva akisimdoh changse hi, Mose le Aaron chule Israel chate lamkaise sen anasimdoh dungjuiyuvin ainko kouva asim’uva chule aphung phunguva asimdoh-uva ahileh,
pasal kum som thuma lhah chunglam kum som nga sung sesea mihemjat mong mong abonchauvin, kikhopna ponbuh sunga lhachaa panga chule pohgih toh hahsa tong thei ding ho mijat,
akisimdoh bang bangin mihing sang get toh ja nga le som get alhinguvin ahi.

Mihem hijatpi hi Pakaiyin Mose athupeh dungjuiyin atoh ding cheh uva akipansah soh keiyun, ama ama bol ding kin cheh leh apoh ding dol cheh a aki nganse soh keitauve; hiti hin Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin aman jong mihem hijat chu asimdoh soh keiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chaten ngahmun sunga kona miphah hihen lang athi long hileh, thilong toh khah jeh a kisuh bohsa hijongleh, mi-boh tapou adelmangna dinguvin thu pen.
Pasal hihen lang numei hijong leh keima asunga kachenna ngahmun chu asuh boh louhelna dinguva abonchauva polama nadelmangjeng dingu ahi,” ati.
Israel chaten hitobang hin abol’uvin hitobanga natna neiho chu abonchauvin polama adelmang soh tauve; Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin Israel chaten abol’uvin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel chate jah a seipeh in, mihem pasal hihen numei hijongle min Pakaiya tahsanna asuh kehji banga aman jong hitobang chonsetna lah a chonset khatpen pen aboldoh a ahileh, hitobang mihem chu athemmo ahitai.

Athemmopa chun achonset boldoh pen pen aphondoh a, aman adih louva aboI khah jat chu ipi thil hijongle alhingset’a alepeh a, athil jat hopngaa hop khat jong apehbe nah lai ding ahi; aman adih louva, alhing louva thil abolpehpa chu hita hi alepeh ding ahiye.

Thilpe dingpan athil kisan ding hengle kom anei tah louva ahileh, hiche thil lhing louva kiboldoh kilepeh kit ding hi Pakai henga kitoh doh a chutengle thempupa chang ding, amipa dinga kithoidamna kibolpeh na kelngoi chal le hiche thil chu agoma thempupa chang ding ahitai.
Israel chate thil todohsa athenga um chengse se, thempupa heng ahin lhutsau hi aboncha thempupa chan ding ahi.
Mihemin atodoh athilto kithenso chu ama chan ding ahin, thempupa kipesa vang aboncha thempupa ding ahijenge,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang, ajah uva hitin seiyin, ‘Pasal khat tou ajinu ajam manga, pasal dinga chu tahsan umlou tah a achonset jenga adoumah mah abola,

chujongle pasal chom dang khat touvin hiche numei hi huh man a aluppi jenga tah a, ahivanga numeinu jipan amudoh hih laiya, chuma leh amanu hitobanga ama le ama kiphala akisuh thang pet’a jong akimatdoh deh hih a, koimachan jong amanu chu achuti chonpet tah a amatdoh loujeh a amanu douna thusei ding ahettohsah mi aum louva ahitah leh,

chujou tengleh ajipa chunga thangtomna lungthim ahung lut khah tah a, hijeh a chu ajipan jong thangtomna aneiya ajinu ama le ama chutobanga akisuh thang jeng ding phamo asah a hitobang thangtomna lung gelin ama alungsung adim jenga, ahilou jongleh ajinu kisuthang louhel, themmona neilou hijongleh ajipan aginmoa achunga thangtomna aneiya ahileh,

apasalpa chun ajinu thempupa henga ahinpuiya, ajinu thalhenga thilto ding ephah dim khat hopsoma hop khat sakol changa kihon anneh ato ding, athilto vang chu thaotwi jong achapden lou ding, gimnamtui jong asolou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi thangtom jeh a lhosoh thiltoa kitoh ahin, themmo jala themmona geldoh theina dinga thangtom man a kitohdoh lhosoh thilto ahiye.
“Thempupan numeinu chu masang lama ahinpui lut’a Pakai angsunga adinsah ding,
chujou tengleh thempupan leibela kitung twitheng chu athaldoh a, chule houbuh lhong laiya leivui phabep jong ahamdoh ding, leivui ahamdoh chu twitheng lah a alhah lut sah ding ahi.

Hita hi thempupan Pakai angsunga numeinu adinsah a, asam alhap lhah peh ding, amanu khut teni alah a thangtom man a lhosoh thiltoa kitoh themmona geldoh kitna dinga lhosoh thilto chunga chu akhut angapsah ding, chutengle akhut laiya chu gaosapna hinpo lut thei gim gentheina twikha jong thempupan akichoi ding ahi.

Hichea kona hi thempupan anumeinu akihahsel sah a, ‘Nangman najipa thu noiya na umlai sunga pasal dang koimachan jong naluppi khah hih hela, nangman jong thilboh then louna nabol khah louva ahileh, gaosapna hin polut jia hiche gim gentheina twikha a kon hin ongthol tan.
Amavang najipa thu noiya na umlaiya nangma najammang tah beh monga, chutengle nangma le nangma akisuthangsa nahi nah bona, najipa hilou pasal dang khat touvin naluppisa ahi tah beh a ahileh,’

tia thempupan numei chu kigaosapna kihahsel abolsah a chule numeinu jah a aseipeh ding, ‘Pakaiyin nangma hi namite lah a nagaosap hen lang nasamse jeng hen, chule nakhelgu hi lhohsah hen na-oipoh pomsah hen;
hiti hin hiche twi hin na-oi sunga gaosapna polut hen lang na-oi hungpoh doh jeng hen, chule nahinpi jeng jong hung gop jeng hen,’ tia aseipeh tengleh numeinun jong, ‘Amen, Amen,’ tia asei ding ahi.
Thempupan hiche gaosapna thucheng ho hi aboncha ajihdoh soh keiya lekhabu khat’a akoi ding, aboncha chu gim gentheina twiya asila asop ngim ding ahiye.
Chutengle thempupan gim gentheina twi, gaosapna polut jeng twi chu numeinu adonsah ding, hita hi atwi chun gaosapna apoh lut a numeinu sunga lut ding, asunga khajen jena anatsah ding ahi.
Chujou tengleh thempupan thangtom thilto lhosoh thilto chu numeinu khut’a kona alahdoh a, hiche lhosoh thilto chu Pakai angsunga athenso ding, chutengle maicham phunga ahinchoi lut ding ahi;
chule thempupan lhosoh thilto lah a khut dim khat ahamdoh a, hichu amangmo thilto dinga abola, maicham chunga agovam ding ahin, chujou thengleh numeinu chu twi adonsah ding ahiye.

Chutah leh thempupan numeinu chu twikha adonsah ding ahitan, ijemtia amanu hi ama le ama kisuthangsa ahinah a, ajipa ajou lhep del jenga adoumah lam tah a chonkha ahimong mong leh, atwidon hin asunga gaosapna apoh lut peh a asunga khajen jena hung nadoh ding, aoipoh hung pomjal jengin tin, akhelgu hung go dena lha lhop jeng ding, hita hi hiche numeinu hi amite lah a gaosap le sapset changa um ding ahitai.
Amavang anumeinu hi ama le ama kisuthang louhel ahinah a, atheng ahinah lai leh, aman imacha natna aneilou ding, hung gaiya cha le nao jong anei kit nah lai ding ahibouve.
“Hiche danthu hi numei ajipa noiya aum laiya ajam mang tah a, ama le ama akisuh thang tah a ahileh manchah ding ahin;

hitobangma hi ajipa lungthima jong ajinu ginmona ahung lut khah a, hijeh a chu amapan jong thangtomna aneiya ahileh, pasal pan ajinu chu Pakai angsunga adinsah a chutengle thempupan danthu hichengse se hi amanchah a abolpeh ding ahi.
Hitobang thudola hi pasalpa vang themmona beiya ongthol ding, numeinun vang athemmona akipoh jing ding ahitai,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel chate jah a seipeh inlang ajah uva hitin seiyin, ‘Pasal hihen lang numei hijongle min atumbeh a kitepna a bola, akitepna chu ama changseh dinga Nazir a panna ding thudola Pakai henga kitepna ahileh,

akiteppa chu amatah kitim thema kikangsedoh ding, ju le khamna thei thil dang adona aneh lou bel ding ahi; chujongle jua kona kisemdoh ju-thuh hihen lang khamna thei dang hijongleh adon louhel ding, lengpitwi jeng jong athah hihen aluisa hijongleh atwi jong adon lou ding, alengpiga jong aneh louhel ding ahi.
Akitepna phat alhin kahsea lengpiguiya sohdoh tapou ipi hijongle aneli thei lou ding, lengpimu le ahoh hijongle aneh khah louhel ding ahiye.

“Akitepna phat abei kahsea aluchunga jong samchem kilam louhel ding, Pakaiya dinga akipehdohna phat akichai masangsea athenga um jeng ding ahi; chule alujang sam jouse jong kanchah louhela acham chama akhantousah sah jeng ding ahi.
“Pakai henga akipehdohna phat nikho abeikahsea aman thilong jong ajot lut louhel ding ahin;
apa ham, anu ham, asopipa ham, asopinu ham thijong leh, athilong chu ajot lut a kisuh bohna anei louhel ding ahi; ipijeh-inem itileh ama Pathena akipehdohna chu alujang sama beh ah ahiye.
Akipeh dohna nikho laisea amapa chu Pakai dinga athenga um jing jenga ahiye.

“Iemtia hetman louhela min akoma athiden jeng tah a, hijeh a hi aman jong akipehdoh lona akithensona asam jeng jong akisuh bohlo jeng tah leh, akisuh theng ni nia alujang sam akivochai jeng ding ahi; hita hi ni sagi lhin ni leh a sam akivochai ding ahiye.
Niget lhin ni leh aman vakhu kop khat ham ahiloule vapal nou ni ham kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula thempupa henga ahinchoi ding,

chutengle thempupan vacha khat chu chonset thilto dinga atodoh a chule vacha dang khatma chu pumgo thilto dinga atodoh ding, amapa dinga thoidamna abolpeh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh mithilong jeh a amapa kisuh bohsa ahitai. Hijeh a hiche nikhoa hi aman alujang akithenso kit ding ahi.

Hita chu Pakai henga ama le ama akipehdohna ding phat le nikho dungjuiya kipedoh kit ding, hiche dinga hi themmo thilto dinga kum lhingsa kelngoi chal khat ahinkai ding ahi; hintin masanga akipehdohna phat vang chu kisimtha lou ding ahitai, ipijeh-inem itileh hiche phat masa hi akisubohsa ahitan ahi.
“Nazira pang ho chu atumbeh a akipehdoh nau phat le nikho akichai teng aman chah diu danthu hiche hi ahi: Nazirpa chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula puilut ding,

aman jong athilto ding dol ato ding ahi; ato ding thil chu pumgo thilto dinga kum khat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoi chal khat toh, nolnabeima ma kum khat lhingsa kelngoipi khat chonset thilto dinga ato ding, chule chamna thilto dinga kelngoi chal khat, nolnabei ma khat ato ding ahin,

cholsolou changlhah pocha khat toh, thao kichap lou changlhah lhon phabep toh atoa, thaotwi kichapsa chang bong neldi sel, cholsolou phabep jong, chule miho lhosoh thilto jouse leh donthei thilto jouse chutoh atotha cheh ding ahiye.
Chutengle Thempupan athilto aboncha Pakai angsunga apoh lut peh a, chonset thilto dinga ato hihen pumgo thilto dinga ato hijongleh apoh lut ding, agatodoh peh ding ahi,

chule Nazir pan jong kelngoi chal chu Pakai henga chamna thilto kilhaina gantha dinga atodoh tei tei ding, cholsolou pocha dimset changlhah chutoh atotha ding ahiye; hichea hi thempupan jong alhosoh thilto leh alengpitwi thilto chu atopeh ding ahi nalaiye.

Chutengle Nazira pang pan kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula akithensosa alujang sam jouse akivochai ding, chujongle aluchang kithensosa a kona asam kivoulha jouse chu akilah a chamna thilto kigovamna anoiya kong jing meikong lah a aleh lut ding ahi.

Thempupan kelngoi chal adah khat chu akihon minjoujou leh alahdoh pai paiya, pocha sunga cholsolou changlhah pheng khat toh alah ding, chol solouma chang bong neldi sel phabep jong alah a, aboncha thilto hijat hi Nazirpan asam akivojou teng chuleh akhut tenia akoipeh ding ahi.

Chule thempupan aboncha hi Pakai angsunga thenso thiltoa manchah dinga athenso ding ahin, hichengse hi thempupa dinga achan ding dol atheng ahi, asa-om akithensosa leh amal akitohdohsa chujong pantha ding ahi; hita hi akibol jou teng vang leh Nazira pang pan jong lengpitwi adonthei ding ahitai.

“Hiche hi kitepna nei Nazira pangpa dinga danthu apandol ding ahiye. Asam akihoi kalvala jong chu aman Nazir ahina chunga kitepna dang tahsa mong monga todoh ding aneiya ahijongleh aman Pakaiya atojou dol kitepna anei chan, Nazir channa ding dola kisei kalvala akitepna jouse jong abol bulhingsoh kei ding ahi,’ tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Aaron le achapate jah a seipeh-in lang hitin seiyin, ‘Nang hon hita hi Israel chate phatthei naboh jiuva chule ajah-uva naseipeh dingu ahi;

“Hitobanga hi amahon Israel chate chunga keima min akilah sah jingjeng uva, hijeh a hi ken jong amaho phatthei kaboh jing ding ahiuve,” ati.

Mose’n houbuh aphudoh nin ahoubuh le amanchah athilkeo jouse jong thao anusoh keiyin abonchan athenso soh keiye, chujongle maicham le amanchah athilkeo ho jong abonchan thao anusoh keiyin athenso soh keiyin ahi.
Min kisimna lamkaiya anapang Israel lamkaiho, apu apateu insung kailhah a aupa chengse toh, aphung lamkai jouseu toh,

abonchauvin Pakai angsunga athiltou abonchan ahinpo soh keiyuvin ahileh abon bonin sakol kangtalai buhnei cheh gup le bongchal som le ni toh ahin, sakol kangtalai buhnei khat chu lamkai ni ni achanguvin, lamkai khat khat dingin bongchal khat khat achanguvin ahi, hichengse chu amahon houbuh maiya kilhainan atohdoh tauve.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Amahoa konin thilto hichengse hi kisan jengin lang kikhopna ponbuh sunga natohna le kinbolna dingin koihe tan, chutengle hiche thilto ho hi Leviten anatoh athilbol dungjui cheh-in peji ji tan,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong sakol kangtalaiho leh bongchal ho chu alan abonchan Levite chu apetai.
Sakol kangtalai ni leh bongchal li chu Mose’n jong Gershon chapate apen, anatoh athilbol dungjuiyun amaho chu achansah tai;
chule sakol kangtalai li leh bongchal get chu Merari chapaten Aaron thempupa chapa lthamar hil banga na atoh jeh-uvin, anatoh dungjuiyuvin amaho chu apetan ahi.
Ahin Kohath chapate chu thil imacha ape tapon ahi, ajeh chu amaho ki-nganse thil thengjouse chu amahon alengkou uva apoh tho cheh dingu ahiye.
Chule japi lamkai hon maicham thensona dingin amaicham ma ma thao akinu nin thilto ding ding jong atoh doh-uvin ahi. Hitobang hin amahon athilto jouseu maicham maiya ahinpo lut soh keiyuvin ahiye.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin, “Maicham thensona dingin lamkaiho hin anisim aniseh leh athilto ding jouseu hinchoi choi jengu hen,” tin aseiye.
Hichea nikho masapen nia thilto hintoh masapen chu Judah phunga mi Amminadab chapa Nahshon anahi;

Nahshon thilto chu dangka a kisem kong khat ahin, agih jong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiyin shekel jakhat le shekel somthum agih-in, dangka a kisem ma ma kisilna kong khat jong ahin, agih jong shekel som sagi agih-e; akong teni lhosoh thiltoa manchah ding chang bong neldisel thaoto halsa adimset set lhonin ahi.
Sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, agih dan chu shekel som jen agih-in, asunga gimnamtui dimset’in akiluiye.
Bongchal gol khat jong ahin, kelngoi chal khat ahin, kelngoi chal khat kum khat lhingsa khat toh ahiuvin, hicheng gancha ho chu pumgo thiltoa manchah ding ahi cheh-uve;
chonset thiltoa todoh ding kelchal khat toh ahin;

chule chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a manchah ding bongchal ni toh, kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga ma toh, chule kelngoi achal cheh nga ma matoh ahiuvin, aboncha kum khat lhingsa cheh ahiuve. Hicheng hi Amminadab chapa Nahshon thilto ahi.
Ni ni lhin nin Issachar phung lamkaipa, Zuar chapa Nethanel chun thilto ahintoh doh pai paiyin,

ama thilto jat chu dangka a kisem kong khat ahin, agih jat jong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiyin shekel jakhat le shekel somthum ma ma ahin, kisilna kong jong dangka a kisem ma ma atoh doh-in, agih jat jong shekel som sagi ma ma agih-e; akong teni anigel lhonin lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chang bong neldisel thaoto kihalsa adimset set’in akilui cheh-e.
Sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, alheng chu shekel som khat gih-in agih-in ahi, chujongle asunga gimnamtui dimset’in akiluiye;
bongchal gol khat toh ahin, kelngoi chat khat toh ahin, kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal khatma toh ahin, aboncha pumgo thiltoa manchah ding jeng ahiuve.
Chujongle chonset thiltoa manchah dingin kelchal jong ahin,

chule chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a manchah ding bongchal ni toh, kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga ma toh, kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal nga ma toh ahiuve. Hichengse hi Zuar chapa Nethanel thilto jeng ahiye.
Nithum lhin nin Zebulun chate lah a alamkaipau, Helon chapa Eliab chun thilto ahinchoiyin;

athilto jat chu dangka a kisem kong khat, agih jat munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya shekel jakhat le shekel somthum gih ahin, dangka a kisem ma ma kisilna kong shekel som sagi jen gih khat toh ahin, anigela chu lhosoh thiltoa manchah ding chang bong neldisel thaoto kihalsa dimset set’a kilui ahin;
sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, alheng chu shekel som khat jenin agih-in, gimnamtui adimset-e;
bongchal gol khat jong ahin, kelngoi chal khat jong ahin, kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal khat jong ahin, hichu pumgo thiltoa manchah ding ahi.
Chule chonset thiltoa todoh dingin kelchal jong ahiye.

Chujongle chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a manchah dingin bongchal ni toh ahin, kelngoi chal nga jong ahin, kelchal nga jong ahin, kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal ma ma nga jong ahiuve. Hicheng hi Helon chapa Eliab thilto ahiye.
Ni li lhin nin Reuben chate lamkaipa, Shedeur chapa Elizur chun athilto ding ahinchoiyin ahileh,

ama thilto jong chu dangka a kisem ma ma kong khat ahin, agih jat jong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya shekel ja khat le shekel somthum ahin, dangka a kisem kisilna kong khat jong ahin, hiche jong chu agih jat shekel som sagi jen agih-in ahi; kong te ni chu lhosoh thiltoa manchah ding thaoto halsa chang bong neldisel adimset’in akilui gelin ahi.

Ama thilto jat jong dangka a kisem kong khat ma ahin, agih jat jong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya shekel ja khat le shekel somthum alhingin, dangka a kisem ma ma kisilna kong khat jong ahin, agih jat shekel som sagi ma ma ahi; a kong te ni dimset set’in lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chang bong neldisel thaoto halsa akiluiye.
Sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, agih jat jong shekel som khat ma alhingin, asunga gimnamtui adimset cheh-in akiluiye.
Bongchal gol khat jong, kelngoi chat khat jong, pumgo thiltoa todoh ding ding kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal khat jong ahi.
Chule chonset thiltoa todoh dingin kelchal khat jong ahin,

chujongle chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a manchah dingin bongchal ni toh, kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga ma toh, kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal cheh nga ma toh ahi. Hicheng hi Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel thilto ahiye.
Nigup lhin nin Gad chate lamkaipa, Deuel chapa Eliasaph chun athilto ding ahinchoiye.

Ama thilto jat chu dangka a kisem ma ma kong khat jong ahin, agih jatjong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya shekel ja khat le shekel somthum ahin, dangka a kisem kisilna kong jong ahin, hiche jong chu agih jat shekel som sagi ma alhinge, a kong teni chu lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chang bong neldisel adimset set in akilui cheh lhone.
Sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, agih dan jong shekel som khat ma ahin, asunga gimnamtui dimset in akiluiye.
Bongchal gol khat ahin, kelngoi chal khat ahin, pumgo thiltoa manchah ding kelngoi achal khat jong ahin, hiche kelngoi chal chu kum khat lhingsa ahitai;
chule chonset thiltoa todoh dingin kelchal khat jong ahin,

chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a manchah dingin bongchal ni toh, kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga ma ma toh, chule kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal nga ma toh ahi. Hicheng hi Deuel chapa Eliasaph thilto ahi.
Ni sagi lhin nin Ephraim chate lamkaipa, Ammihud chapa Elishama jong chun athilto ding a hinchoitai.

sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, alheng chu agih dan shekel som khat alhingin, asunga gimnamtui adimset’in akiluiye.
Bongchal gol khat ahin, kelngoi chal khat jong ahin, pumgo thiltoa todoh ding kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal khat jong ahiye;
chule chonset thiltoa manchah dingin kelchal jong ahi.
Chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a tha ding bongchal ni toh, kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga toh, kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal nga ma toh ahiuve. Hicheng hi Ammihud chapa Elishama thilto ahiye.
Niget lhin nin Manasseh chate lamkaipa, Pedahzur chapa, Gamaliel in jong athilto ding ahinchoiye.

Ama thilto jat chu dangka a kisem kong khat jong ahi kit’in, akong gih jat chu munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiyin shekel ja khat le shekel somthum alhingin, dangka a kisem ma ma kisilna kong khat jong ahin, agih dan jong shekel som sagi agih in ahi; akong tenia chu asung lhona lhosoh thilto ding chang bong neldi sel thaoto hal sa adimset set’in akikoiye;
sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, agih dan shekel som khat jen agih-in ahi, chule asunga gimnamtui adimset’in akiluiye.
Bongchal gol khat toh, kelngoi chal khat toh, kelngoi achal khat kum khat lhingsa khat jong ahin, aboncha chu pumgo thiltoa todoh ding ahiuve.
Chule chonset thiltoa todoh dingin kelchal jong ahi.

Chujongle chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a tha din bongchal ni toh, kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga ma toh, chule kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal jeng nga ma ma toh ahiuve. Hicheng hi Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel thilto ahi.
Ni ko lhin nin Benjamin chate lamkaipa, Gideoni chapa, Abidan chun athilto ding ahinchoiye.

Ama thilto jat chu dangka a kisem kong khat ahin, agih jat jong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiyin shekel ja khat le shekel somthum alhinge, chule dangka a kisem ma ma kisilna kong khat jong ahin, agih jat jong shekel som sagi jen agih-in ahi; akong teni chu lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chang bong neldisel cheh thaoto halsa adimset set’ in akikoiye.
Chule Sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, agih jat shekel som khat alhingin, asunga gimnamtui adimset’in akiluiye;
pumgo thiltoa todoh dingin bongchal gol khat toh, kelngoi chal khat toh chule kelngoi achal kum khat lhingsa khat toh ahiye.
Chujongle chonset thiltoa todoh dingin kelchal khat jong ahithai.

Chukit leh chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a tha dingin bongchal ni toh, kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga ma toh, chule kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal jeng nga ma ma toh ahiuve. Hicheng hi Gideoni chapa Abidan thilto ahiye.
Nisom lhin nin Dan chate lamkaipa, Ammishaddai chapa, Ahiezer chun athilto ding ahinchoiye.

Ama thilto jat jong dangka a kisem ma ma kong khat ahin, agih jat jong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiyin shekel ja khat le shekel somthum agih-in, dangka a kisem ma ma kisilna kong khat jong ahin, agih jat jong shekel som sagi jen agih-in ahi; a kong teni chu lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chang bong neldisel cheh thaoto halsa adimset set’in akiluiye.
Sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, agih jat shekel som khat alhinge; chule lheng sunga chun gimnamtui adimset’in akiluiyin ahi.
Pumgo thiltoa todoh ding bongchal gol khat jong, kelngoi chal khat jong, chule kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal khat jong ahi.
Chonset thiltoa to dingin kelchal jong ahiye.

Chule chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a tha dingin bongchal ni toh, kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga ma toh, kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal jeng nga ma ma toh ahi. Hicheng hi Ammishaddai chapa Ahiezer thilto jat ahiye.
Nisom le nikhat lhin nin Asher chate lamkaipa, Ochran chapa Pagiel jong chun athilto ding ahinchoiyin ahi.

Ama thilto jat jong dangka a kisem ma ma kong khat ahin, agih jong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiyin shekel ja khat le shekel somthum alhingin, dangka a kisem kisilna kong khat jong ahin, agih jong shekel som sagi jen gih ahiye; kong teni dim set set in lhosoh thilto ding chang bong, neldisel thaoto halsa akiluiye;
sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, alheng gih jat chu shekel som khat ahin, gimnamtui dimset’in akikoiyin ahi.
Pumgo thiltoa todoh dingin bongchal gol khat le kelngoi chal khat toh, chule kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal khat jong ahithai.
Chonset thiltoa todoh dingin kelchal khatjong ahin,

chujongle chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a tha dingin bongchal ni leh kelngoi chal nga toh, kelchal nga ma ma toh, chule kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal jeng nga ma toh ahiuve. Hicheng hi Ochran chapa Pagiel thilto jat ahiye.
Nisom le ni ni lhin nin Naphtali chate lamkaipa, Enan chapa, Ahira jong chun athilto ding jat ahinchoiye.

Ama thilto doh jat chu dangka a kisem ma ma kong khat jong ahin, agih jong munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiyin shekel ja khat le shekel somthum alhinge, dangka a kisem kisilna kong khat jong ahin, agih jong shekel som sagi ma gih ahi; a kong teni chu lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chang bong neldisel thaoto halsa adimset set lhonin ahi.
sana a kisem lheng khat jong ahin, agih jat shekel som khat agih-in, asunga gimnamtui adimset’e.
Pumgo thiltoa todoh ding bongchal gol khat toh, kelngoi chalkhat jong, kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal khat jong hi ding ahiye;
chule chonset thiltoa todoh ding kelchal khat jong hitha ding ahi.

Chutengle chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a tha ding bongchal ni leh kelngoi chal nga hi ding, kelchal nga ma toh hi ding, kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal jeng nga ma toh hi ding ahiye. Hicheng hi Enan chapa Ahira thilto jat ahiye.

Maicham thao akinu nikhoa Israel lamkaiten maicham thensona dinga atodoh-u thil kitoh jat chu hicheng hi anahi, dangka a kisem cheh kong som le ni toh, dangkaa kisem jeng kisilna kong som le ni ma toh, sanaa kisem lheng som le ni ma toh ahi.

Dangkaa kisem kong khat cheh chu agih dan shekel ja khat le shekel somthum thum ahin, chule kisilna kong jong chu shekel som sagi cheh agih-in ahi; hiti hin dangka a kisem kongho jouse chu aboncha agih danu munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiyin shekel sang ni leh ja li alhingin ahi;

sanaa kisem lheng som le ni, gimnamtui dimset cheh a kikoina ho jong chu lheng khat cheh gih dan shekel a akite leh munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya shekel som khat cheh gih ahin, hijeh chun sana chengse abonchan shekel ja khat le som ni agih-in ahi.

Pumgo thiltoa todoh ding gancha ho chu abonchan bongchal som le ni ahin, kelngoi chal som le ni ahin, kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi achal jeng som le ni jong ahiye; chule hicheng chutoh kilhona lhosoh thilto ding jong ahinalaiye; chujongle chonset thiltoa todoh ding kelchal som le ni jong ahi.

Chutengle chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a tha ding bongchal som ni le li alhingin, kelngoi chal somgup alhingin, kelchal somgup ma alhingin, kum khat lhingsa kelngoi achal jeng jeng jong somgup ma alhingin ahi. Hicheng hi maicham thao akinu jouva akithensona dia kitoh doh thilto jat anahi.

Mose jong Pakai to kihou dinga kikhopna ponbuh sunga agalut’a ahileh, hettohsahna thingkong chunga hepi touna kidona a cherub teni kikah a kon chun chunga kona ama henga thu hung kisei ajan; hiche thu kisei ogin chun ajah a thu aseitai.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Aaronjah a seipeh-in lang ajah a hitin seiyin, ‘Nangman thaomei ho nadet tengleh thaomei sagi chun thaomei khom mai amasang asalvah dingu ahi,’ tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Chuin Aaronin jong hitobang hin abol pai paiyin, Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bangin, thaomei sagin thaomei khom mai amasang asalvah din atungdoh soh keiye.

Thaomei khom kisemdol hiti hi ahiye, sana a kisem sehcha a kikheng ahin, akhomtodop’a pat apahmum geiya aboncha sehcha a kikhengjol sel jeng ahin, Pakaiyin thaomei khom kisem dingdola Mose anavetsah lim kigong tobang banga kisem ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mosejah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Levi mite chu Israel chate lah a konin puidoh-in lang abonchauvin thensona bolpeh soh keiyin.

Chule amaho thensona dinga chu nangman hita hi nabolpeh ding ahi; achunguva kisop ngimna twi nathin khuma, atahsau jong samchema nahetjol sel ding, chule aponsil chengseu twiya nasop theng soh keiya amaho le amaho nakisil ngimsel sah ding ahi.

Chujou teng leh amaho chu bongchal gol khat nakimatsah a, chang bong neldisel thaoto halsa lhosoh thilto ding jong nalah thasah ding, chujongle nangman chonset thilto dinga bongchal gol khatma namat ding ahiye.
Chule Levi mite abonchauva kikhopna ponbuh a napui khoma Israel chate abonchauva khoppi pumpi jong nakhop khom ding ahi.
Chule hita hi nangman Levi mite Pakai angsunga nahin pui lut tengleh Israel chaten Levi mite chunga chu akhut an gap cheh diu ahi.

Chujongle Aaronin Pakai angsunga Levi mite chu Israel mite lah a kona achombeh a thenso thilto banga atodoh a athenso ding, hiteng chuleh Leviten jong Pakai kin abol dingu chu atoh diu akin mong mongu hi ding ahi.

Levi mite jong chun bongchal teni luchanga akhut-u angap cheh diu, hichele chun nangman bongchal khat chu chonset thiltoa natodoh ding, chule bongchal khatma chu Pakai henga pumgo thiltoa natodoh ding ahin, hita hi Levite thoidamna nabolpeh ding ahiye.
Chujou teng leh nangman Levite chu Aaron le achapate henga nakaisah a, chujongleh abonchauva Pakaiya thenso thilto banga natodoh ding ahi.
“Hitobanga hi nangman Israel mite lah a kona Levi mite hi achombeh a nakhendoh ding, hita chu Levite jouse keima chan ding ahiuve.
Hita hi nangman Levite nathensoa thenso thilto banga natodoh jou tengleh amaho jong kikhopna ponbuh sunga lut’uva bol ding kin jouse agabol dingu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Israel mite lah a kona amaho hi apum piuva keima dinga kipedohsa ahitauve; Israel chate lah a apeng masa, naobu tumkeh masa jouse khela keiman Levite hi keima ding mong monga kalhensa ahitauve.

Ajeh chu Israel chate lah a apeng masa jouse hi mihem hihen lang gancha hijongle aboncha keiya ahiuve; Egypt gamsunga keiman apeng masa jouse kathagam nikhoa pat’a keiman amaho hi kei dinga kathensosa ahiuvin ahi;
chujongle Israel chate lah a apeng masa jouse khela Levi mite hi kalah kit ahitai.

Chule Levite hi keiman Israel mite lah a kona kalahdoh a Aaron le achapate kapehdoh a, amaho hin Israel chate dinga kikhopna ponbuh a kin jouse abol’uva, Israel chate dinga thoidamna abolpeh diu, ijemtia Israel chate jong muntheng phunga ahung valut khah jeng tah-uva ahijongleh hijeh a chu Israel chate lah a gamna hise ahung Ian louna ding kati ahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun Mose le Aaron chule Israel chate khoppi pumpin jong hitobang bang hin Levite chu aboltauve; Levite bolna dinga Pakaiyin Mose thu apeh dungjui bang bangin Israel chaten amaho chu aboltauvin ahi.

Chujongle Levite jong chu amaho le amaho chonset’a konin akithensouvin, aponsil jouseu akisop ngimsoh keitauve; hichun amaho chu Aaronin jong Pakai angsunga thenso thilto bangin athenson, Aaronin amaho athen theina diuvin thoidamna asempeh tai.

Hiche nung chun Levite jong kikhopna ponbuh sunga alut’uvin, Aaron le achapate kithopi dingin agakaiyuvin ahi; Levite bolna dinga Pakaiyin Mose thu apeh bang bangin Israel chaten Levite chu aboltauve.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Hiche hi Levite chunga kigahna dol ahiye. Mihem kum som ni le kum nga a lhah chung lamse sen kikhopna ponbuh sunga kin abola na atoh cheh ding ahiye.
Chule kum som nga a lhah a chung lamse se vang chu hiche kinbolna kona hi ongthola na atoh kit louhel ding ahitai;

hijongleh kikhopna ponbuh sung dungal asopiteu akithopiuva, ngansea pang ding ahiuvin, natoh tah tah vang atoh lou dingu ahitai. Hitobanga hi nangman Levite chu nabolpeh a atoh ding akin u nasempeh cheh ding ahiye,” ati.
Egypt gama kona a hung kitoldoh jou kal’u kum ni lhin kum, lha masa laiyin Sinai gamthip noiya Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chaten aphat kitep dungjuiyin kalchuh kut mangu hen.

Hiche lha hi nisom le ni li lhin ni leh nilhah lama nang hon kalchuh kut chu aphat kitep dungjuiya naman dingu ahi; akiman dingdol chonna dan kisem jouse leh amanchah ding dan kisem jouse bang banga naman diu ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong Israel chaten kalchuh kut aman cheh na diuvin aseipeh tai.

Hiti hin Israel chaten lha masapen nisom le ni li lhin ni, nilhah lam chuche lha sung chun Sinai gamthip noiya kalchuh kut amang tauve; Pakaiyin Mose athupeh chengse dungjuiyin Israel chaten jong aboluvin ahi.

Hichea chun mihem thilong tahsa atoh khah jeh-uvin mihem phabep abohin aumtauvin, hijeh hin hiche nikho chun hitobang miho hin kalchuh kut amang thei tapouve. Hitobang miho hi hiche nikho hin Mose le Aaron henga a hung tauve;

chuin amaho hin Mose jah a aseiyuvin, “Keihon mihem thilong tahsa khat katoh khah jeh-uvin aboh a umah kahiu ahitai, hijongle ipi ding pentah a Israel chate lah a hi keihon jong aphat kitep phatcha Pakai henga thilto kato diu kijah da ding ham?” tia adoh uleh;
Mose’n jong amaho jah a aseipeh-in, “Pakaiyin nang ho chung chang thudola hi ilo ding ahi, tia aseiyam, keiman thu kajah masangin kho ngai ta diuvin,” atipeh-e:
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:

“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang hitin seiyin, ‘Nang ho lah a mihem khat pen pen hihen lang ahiloule nang ho son le chilhah ho lah a mihem khat tou hijongle mithi long toh khah jeh a aboh a aum khah tah a, ahilou jongleh kholgam la tah a achedoh a ahijongleh ama jong chun Pakaiya kalchuh kut a man jing jeng ding ahi.
Lha ni lhin na, nisom le ni li lhin ni, nilhah lama Israel chaten kalchuh kut aman diu; kalchuh kut sa chu cholsolou changlhah le anche kha toh ame dingu ahi.

Aneh moh-u them cha jong ajing jingkah geiya akhovah den sah louhel dingu, kalchuh kut a kithatsa jong agu aheboh lou diu ahi; akiman dingdol chonna dan kisem jouse dungjuiya kalchuh kut aboluva a man dingu ahiye.

Ahin mihem koi hileh athenga uma kholgam la jong chedoh lou mi, ahivanga kalchuh kut mang louva umah aumleh, hitobang mihem chu amite lah a kona paidoh a um ding ahiye; ipijeh-inem itileh aman aphat kitep phat chan Pakaiya thilto ding lom atoh poi; hitobang mihem hin athemmona akipoh jing ding ahi.

Chujongle nang ho lah a kholgam mi khat tou ahung khopema aum jongleh ama jeng jong chun Pakaiya kalchuh kut kibol chu aman ding, kalchuh kut chonna lim kisem jouse leh akiman chah ding dan kisem jouse dungjuiya aman jong abol tei tei ding ahi; khopem mi ding leh agam mi dinga agoma nang hon chonna dan khatseh bou nanei diu ahi,” tin aseiye.
Houbuh kitundoh nikhon meibang lomin hettohsahna ponbuh, houbuh chu ahintom tai; chuti chun nilhah a pat jingkah geiyin houbuh chunga meibang lom chu meikong bangin akidal khovah helin ahi.
Hitobang hin meibang lomin houbuh chu atom jing jengin ahi; sun tengleh meibang lomin atomjin, jan teng vang leh meikong bangin a um jing jenge.

Chule itih hijongleh ponbuh chunga kona meibang lom akitoldoh tih tih Israel chate jong akitoldoh pai paiji tauvin ahi; chule hoikom mun hijongleh meibang lom kingahna muna chun Israel chaten jong ngahmun akisemjiuvin ahi.

Pakai thupeh dungjuiyin Israel chate akitoldoh jiuvin, Pakai thupeh ma ma a konin ngahmun akisem jiuvin ahi; houbuh chunga meibang lom akidal lai sungsen amaho jong hiche ngahmuna chun a um um jeng jiuvin ahi.
Meibang lom chu houbuh chunga nikho sot tah sunga akidal dal jeng jong leh Israel chaten jong Pakai jeng ahouvun chibai aboh boh jenguvin, ngahmuna konin akitoldoh deh ji pouve.

Abang bang leh meibang lom chu nikho chomcha sungin houbuh chunga akidal jin, Israel chate jong Pakai thusah dungjuiyin ngahmun a aum jiuve; chujou tengleh Pakai thusah ma man akipatdoh pai pai jiuvin ahi.

Abang jongleh meibang lom chu nilhah lama pat ajing jingkah geiyin aum jin, hitobanga meibang lom chu ajingjingkah teng akitoldoh phat phat leh amaho jong akitoldoh ji tauve; ahilouva nikhat lhingset, sun khat jan khat meibang lom chu anichon den a ahijongleh, ameibang lom kitoldoh tih tih chuleh amaho jong akipatdoh pai pai ji tauve.

Nikho ni seh seh sung hihen lang lha khat sung hileh, asotjo cheh hijongle houbuh chunga chu meibang lom akidal dal laise leh chukoma aum lai sung sen Israel chate jong ngahmun sunga aumden jiuvin akitoldoh deh ji pouve; ahin meibang lom chu akitoldoh teng vang leh amaho jong akipatdoh paipai jitauve.
Pakai thupeh dungjuiya ngahmun akisemuva chule Pakai thupeh dungjui ma ma a kipatdohji ahiuve; Pakaiyin Mose athupeh dungjuiya amahon Pakai chu ahouvuva chibai abohjiu ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Nangman sehcha kikhengjol dangka a kisem sumkon ni kisemin; chule hiche sumkon teni chu khoppi pumpi koukhomna dingle ngahmun kichondohna dinga namut ding ahi.
Chuta chu sumkon teni akimut tengleh kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula khoppi pumpi chu nahenga hung kikhomsoh kei diu ahi.
Amavang sumkon khatseh seh chu akimut’a ahileh Israel phung upa chengse, lamkai jouse nangma henga hung kikhom ding ahiuve.
Gal kon nading sumkon akimut teng vangleh niso lama ngahmun kison jouse kipatdoh soh kei dingu ahi.
Nivei lhinna gal konna sumkon akimut kit tengleh, lhanglama ngahmun kison jouse kipatdoh kit diu ahi. Ngahmun kichondohna dinga galkonna sumkon mut lou khoh ahiye.
Khoppi kikhopna dia vanga nang hon sumkon mai mai namut’uva, galkonna sumkon mut banga namut tha lou dingu ahi.
Chule Aaron chapate thempu hon sumkon teni chu amut diu ahi. Hitobanga sumkon mut ging ding hi nakhang khanguva akhonna beiya chonna dana nanei jing jeng diu ahiye.

Chujongle nang ho bolgenthei a pang nagalteu sat dinga nakon tengu jongleh nang hon sumkon jong namut’uva galkonna sumkon jong namut tha diu ahi; chuti hen lang hileh Pakai na-Pathenu angsunga nang ho nakigeldoh jing jeng diu, chutengle nagalteuva kona huhhinga naum dingu ahiye.

Nakipa thanop niu hihen lang aphat tepsa nakut niu hijongleh, nang ho dinga lhathah kipat jousea jong, pumgo thilto nabol niu hihen lang chamna thilto kilhaina, gantha nabol chung changu hijongleh, nang hon sumkon namut jing jeng dingu ahi; hiche sumkon kimut hin na-Pathenu angsunga nang ho geldohna nabolpeh jing diu ahi; keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu kahiye,” ati.
Kum ni lhin kum, lha ni lhinna, chuche lha, nisom ni lhin nin hettohsahna houbuh chunga konin meibang lom chu akitoldoh tai;
hijeh chun Israel chate jong akipatdoh pai paiyuvin Sinai gamthip noiya konin agol golin akijot tauve; chuin meibang lom chu Paran gamthip noiya akinga tan ahi.
Amasan Israelte chu Pakai thusah Mose henga hung lhung bangin akitoldoh tauve.
Amasa penin Judah chate ngahmuna kikhol mihem jouse aloi loiyin akitol tauve; chule amaho sepai jouse chunga lamkaiya pang chu Amminadab chapa Nahshon ahiye.
Chule Issachar chate sepaite chunga lamkaiya pang chu Zuar chapa Nethanel ahi.
Chujongle Zebulun phung mite sepaite chunga lamkaiya pang chu Helon chapa Eliab ahiye.
Houbuh akiphet lhah phat’in houbuh pua pangji Gershon chapate leh Merari chapate jong akipatdoh pai pai kit tauve.
Chuin Reuben ngahmuna kikhol mihem jouse chu aloi loiyin akitoldoh tauve; chule asepaiteu chunga lamkaiya pang chu Shedeur chapa Elizur ahiye.
Chule Simeon phung miho sepaite chunga lamkaiya pang chu Zurishaddai chapa Shelumiel anahi.
Chujongle Gad phung miho sepaite chunga lamkaiya pang jong chu Deuel chapa Eliasaph ahiye.
Chujouvin Kohath mite akipatdoh pai paiyuvin, thil theng jouse apotauve; chule amaho hung lhun masangin houbuh anakitungdoh tan ahi.
Chuin Ephraim ngahmuna mihem kikhol jouse aloi loiyin akiloiyun akitoldoh tauve; chule asepaiteu chunga lamkaiya pang chu Ammihud chapa Elishama ahi.
Chujongle Manasseh phung mite sepaiho chunga lamkaiya pang chu Pedahzur chapa Gamaliel anahi.
Chutima chun Benjamin phung miho sepaite chunga lamkaiya pang chu Gideoni chapa Abidan ahiye.
Chujouvin Dan mite ngahmuna kikhol miho, ngahmun tomlam ngah a pang ho jong aloi loiyin akitoldoh pantauve; chule asepaiteu chunga lamkaiya panga chu Ammishaddai chapa Ahiezer anahi.
Chujongle Asher phung miho sepaite chunga lamkaipa chu Ochran chapa Pagiel ahi.
Chule Naphtali phung miho sepaite chunga lamkaiya pang chu Enan chapa Ahira ahiye.
Israel chate galsat dinga akon’uva akitol tengu leh ama ama sepai tam le lhom dungjuiya hitobanga hi kijot diu ahi.

Mose’n jong Midian mi Reuel, Mose nupapa chapa Hobab jah a thu aseiyin, “Keiho hi Pakaiyin, ‘Nang ho kapeh ding na hiuve’ tia aseina mun jon dinga kitol kahiuve; hungin keiho toh kilhonu hite, keihon nang dingin thilpha nabolpeh nau vinge; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin jong Israel dinga thilpha bolpeh ding atepsa ahitai,” ati.
Ahinla Reuelin ajah a aseiyin, “Keima cheponge; keima gamsung mong mong le kamite kasopite henga kachejoh ding ahibouve; ” atitai.

Hichun Mose’n jong, “Nahenga katao ahi, keiho neida lha hih-hel’uvin, ajeh chu gamthip noiya ngahmun kasem dingdolu jong nangman nahethem in, hijeh ahi keiho dinga nangma mit tobanga napan ding ahibouve.
Chuti ahijeh chun keiho toh kilhona nahung leh Pakaiyin keiho dinga thilpha itobang bang eibolpeh jiuvam, keihon jong hitobang thilpha ma ma chu nangma kabolpeh diu nahi,” ati.
Hiti chun amaho Pakai molsanga konin akipatdoh uvin nithum lampia akijot tauve; nithum sungin Pakai kitepna thingkong chu amasanguva akitol jing jengin, amaho dingin ngahmun ding aholpeh le lei.
Itih hijongle ngahmuna kona akipatdoh phat phat’u leh Pakaiya meibang lom chu sun teng achunguva akidal jin ahi.

@@Chujongle thingkong akitoldoh phat phat leh Mose’n aseiyin, @1“O Pakai hung kipatdoh-in lang, @2Nagalte hi kithe cheh soh heI hen: @1Chule nangma nahot bolte chu @2Nangma masanga jam mang hel @3tauhen,” atijie.
@@Chule thingkong chu aki-ngah teng jongleh Mose’n aseiyin, @1“O Pa kai hung kile kit tan. @2Israel sepai sang som heng hinjon @3tan,” atijie.

Mipin ahamsetna chung changuva kiphinna abol’uvin Pakai nabeng tenia thol louhel ding ngaida da um thu asei tauve; akiphin nau chu Pakaiyin ajah doh phat’in alunghanna ahung kongjah jengin, alah-u va Pakai meikong ahung deujah jeng tai; hichea chun ngahmun pamchin dunga kisong phabep akavum tan ahi.
Chutah chun mipi jong Mose henga ahung eojah jenguvin ahileh, Mose jong Pakai henga ataovin, hichun meikong jong amit tai.
Hijeh chun hichelai mun chu amin Taberah akisah tal; ijeh-inem itileh hikoma chu mipi lah a Pakai meikong hung deujah jeng anahi.
Israelte lah a hung pangkha midang ho chu hatah-in agilkel tauvin, hijeh chun Israel chate jong akap kit’uvin, “O kadeh, eihon neh ding sa nengtah a anakineiya!
Keihon Egypt gamsunga nga tampi, changmai tampi, donkho tampi, louthul tampi, louthul tilnei tampi, chule louthul tillen tampi kanop kaninga kaneh jiu kageldoh tauve;
ahinla tun keiho kagong tul tul jenguvin, kalhasam tauve; imacha dang hi aumtapon, hiche manna hi mitlhi lha lha a kavet vet dingu ahimaitai,” atiuve.
Manna kiti hi pathikhom mu tobang ahin, alimso danjong twikepchang tobang ahi.

Miho chu alhai kimvel leuvin manna chu akilokhomuvin, sumheiyin agoi bong bonguvin, abang bang le lhengkam sunga jong suhdun agot bong jiuve; chujou tengleh bubel sung dunga akihon’uvin, changlhah-in akisem jitauve; atuidan chu thaoto kihalsa phatecha kikang changlhah tuiyin atuiye.
Jan teng ngahmun chung dunga daibang ahung lhah tengleh manna chutoh ahung lhah thajin ahi.

Mipi abonchauva ainko kouva amitin ama ama ponbuh kotpi phungbul cheh a aka ka jengu chu Mose’n ajatai; chujongle Pakai lunghan jong khoh tah-in ahung kongjah jengin ahile Mose jeng jong alung lhai ta hih hel jenge.

Hichun Mose’n jong Pakai jah a aseiyin, “Ipi dinga nangman nalhacha hi hibang loma nasa a neibol hitam? Ipi iatileh nangma mitmua lung lhaina chang louva kauma, hijeh a chu nangman hiche mipi hijat pohgih hahsa hi keima chunga nase lhah jeng ham?

Mipi hijat jen keiman oisunga naovop’a kanavop mong ham? Abonchauva hi keiman kahin mong monga nabol hiya, nangman keijah a, ‘Nangin amaho hi na-op’a kiko jingin lang, naodon min nao noichep pet akiko jing bangin, nangman apu apateu peh dinga kakihahselna gamsung geiya polut tei teiyin,’ tia nasei ham?
Mipi hijat jen vahna dinga keiman hoilama kona sa ka ah doh ding ham? Ajeh chu amaho hi kamasanga akap kap jenguvin, aseitauve, “Kaneh diuvin sa neipeuvin,” atiuve.
Keiman kachangseh seh-in mipi hijat hi kapojou tapoi, kapoh hi kei dingin agih behseh jengtai.
Hitobanga neibol dinga ahileh neithat doh jengin, nangma mitmua lung lhaina chang mi kahileh kagenthei hesoh chung nung chu, kamuphah louhelna dingin neisumang tan,” ati.

Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin, “Nangman nahetsa cheh mipi dinga upa ho leh mipi chunga vaihom ho, Israel upa som sagi keima henga hinkhom temin, chujongle amaho chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga hinpui touvin lang abonchauvin nang toh ding khom temuvin.

Chutengle keima kahung kum lhah ding hikoma chu nangma kaki houlimpi ding nahi; chujongle nangma chunga lhagao phabep kalah doh a upa ho chunga hi kakoipeh ding ahiuve; chutengle amaho hin mipi dinga pohgih hahsa hi nangma toh apoh tha thei diu, hita chu nangin nachangseh a napoh thei lou ding ahitai.

Chule mipi jah a hi naseipeh ding ahi, “Jing nikhoa dingin nang ho le nang ho kisuthenguvin, ajeh chu nang hon sa naneh diu ahi; ipijeh-inem itileh Pakai nabeng tenia nang ho nakap kap’uvin, “Keiho neh ding koipenin sa eipeh diu ham? Keiho dinga Egypt gamsunga thil ijakai phasoh hel napet’a,” tin naseiyuvin. Hijeh a chu Pakaiyin nang ho neh ding sa napeh-uva nang hon naneh dingu ahi.
Sa chu nikhat sungseh, ni ni sung seh a, ni nga sung seh ham khat’a jong, nisom sung seh ham, nisom ni sung seh ham a naneh diu ahipoi,

lha lhing set’a nanehuva, nanah hom sunguva ahung lotdoh hel geiya naneh-uva, lohsoh hela naneh dingu ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh nang hon nalah-uva um jing Pakai chu don louvin nakoiyun, ama angsunga nakap kap uvin hitin naseiyuve, “Ipi bolpen tah a eiho Egypt gama kona hung kitoldoh khoh khoh ihiu ham?” tin naseiyuve,’ tin ati.

Ahivangin Mose’n aseiyin, “Hiche mipi hijat lah a kaumna mite abonchauva sang jagup jen ahiuvin, akenga lamjot thei cheh sepai hijat pi hi ahiuve; ahinla nangman naseiyin, ‘Keiman amaho hi sa kapeh ding, lha khat sunga amahon neng tah a aneh diu ahi!’ nati.

Mi hijatpi vahna kham ding hi kelngoi hon jouse leh bong hon jouse tha gam ding hitam? Ahilou jongleh amaho hijatpi vahna khamset dinga hi twikhanglena nga jouse aboncha mat khomsoh hel ding ham?” ati.
Chuphat’in Pakaiyin jong Mose jah a aseiyin, “Nangman Pakai ban thahat chu kitanchom hiya nabol ham? Tua hi nangman nang dinga thu kasei hi adih le adih lou namudoh ding ahitai,” atipeh-e.
Hichun Mose jong apotdoh pai paiyin Pakai thusei jouse abonchan mipi jah a agaseipeh tai; chujongle mipi lah a upa som sagi alhengdoh-in amaho chu ponbuh kim vela adinsah tan ahi.

Chutah chun meibang lom lah a Pakai ahung kum lhan Mose toh akihou lhonin, chule Mose chunga um lhagao phabep jong aladoh-in upa som sagi ho chunga chun agol hop peh tai; chutobanga achunguva lhagao ahung chuh phat’in upa hon jong gaothu asei pai pai tauve. Ahivangin hitobang hin aseijom kit tapouve.

Ngahmun sunga mihem ni aumden nalai lhone; ama ni chu khat pa min Eldad ahin, khatjo pa min Medad akiti; ana ni chunga jong chun lhagao ahung chui; ama ni jong vang hi upa kisimdoh ho lah a pang ahilhon nan, ahivanga ponbuh sunga kona potdoh lou lai ahilhone; hiti hin ama nin ngahmun sunga gaothu asei lhon tai.
Hichun gol lhang khat alhaijelin Mose jah a aseipeh-in, “Eldad le Medad-in ngahmun sunga gaothu asei sei lhone,” agati.
Chuphat’in Mose dinga akinbola pang, amilhen tum ho lah a mi khat, Nun chapa Joshuan aseiyin, “Kapu Mose, hite ni chu phoh thip jengin,” atileh;
Mose’n jong ajah a aseiyin, “Kei jeh a nangma nathangset haimo? Pakaiyin achunguva lhagao koipeh soh hen lang Pakai mite hi abonchauvin themgao hijong leu ipi iti am!” ati.
Chujouvin Mose le Israel upate chu ngahmun lama ahung kile kit tauve.

Pakaiya konin hui ahung nungin, hui chun twikhanglena konin vamimte tamtah ahinlhoh peh-in, ngahmun kimvela vamimte chu alhah sah tai; vamim ho chu ngahmuna konin alang langa nikhat lampi dung geiyin akithechan soh keiyun, lei chunga tong ni jen geiyin akisechap jenguve.

Hichun mipi abonchauvin akipatdoh uvin nilhum kei leh jan khovah helin akihol’uvin, ajing nikhon jong nilhum helin vamimte chu akilokhom khom jenguvin ahi. Alhompen tah kilokhom min jong homer som khat dimset akilodoh uvin, chule abonchan ngahmun kimvel apamchin lhung keiyin akiphouvun ahi.
Asa neh-u chu ahauvin alhaina laiyuvin, val jong aval lhum hih laiyun, mipi dounan Pakai lunghan ahung deujah jengin, hiti chun Pakaiyin mipi tamtah gamna hise nasatah khat’in asugam tai.
Hijeh chun hikom mun chu Kibrothhatta-avah tin akiminvo tan ahi; ipijeh inem itileh hikoma hi amahon gilkel lopman a thiho anavuiyu ahiye.
Kibrothhatta-avah a konin mipi chu Hazeroth geiyin akitol tauve; hiti hin Hazeroth a chun mipi atham den’uvin ahi.
Mose’n Cush numei khat akichenpin ahileh, hichejeh chun Miriam le Aaronin Mose dou nan thu asei lhone; ajeh chu Mose’n Cush numei khat jin aneiyin akichenpi.

Hichea chun ama nin asei lhonin, “Pakaiyin Mose mai mai koma thu asei thei mong hi nga na? Eihoa kona jong Pakaiyin thu aseiji sa hilou ham?” ati lhon tai. Hitobanga thu asei lhon hi Pakaiyin ajadoh tan ahi.
Ahin Mose kitipa hi mi nunnem tah, leiset chunga mihem jouse sanga mi nun pen tah anahi.
Hichun hetman louhelin Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron chule Miriam jah a thu ahinseiyin, “Nang ho thum kikhopna ponbuh lama hung doh temuvin,” atin ahileh, amaho thum jong ahung doh pai pai tauve.
Chuin Pakai chu meibang lhon khat’in ahung kikho lhan, ponbuh kotpi phungbula adingin, Aaron le Miriam ahinkou tai; hichun ama ni jong anigel lhonin ahung machon jep lhonin ahi.

Hichun Pakaiyin aseitai, “Kathusei jouse hi ngai lhonin; nang ho lah a hi themgao khat tou auma ahile Pakai kitipa keima hi themgaopa henga chu kei le kei hung kiphonga mu kaneisah a kakihetsah ji ahi, chujongle keiman themgaopa henga chun amangin jong kakihou limpi jin ahi.
Ahinla keima lhacha Mose vang hi chuta kabol ahipoi; ama hi keima insung po dinga ki-nganse khum jeng ahibouve.

Keiman ama hi kamcheng le kamchenga kakihoupia kichen tah a kaseiji ahin, thusei kichen louva kaseipeh ji ahipoi; chujongle ama hin Pakai limdol chu amuji ahiye. Chuti ahileh kalhacha Mose douna thu sei jeng ding hi nang ni nakichat lhon lou ham?” ati.
Hiti hin ama ni dou nan ‘Pakai lunghanna ahung deujah jengin, chule Pakai jong ache mangtan ahi.
Ahin ponbuh chunga kona meibang lom akitoldoh doh chun vetan, Miriam chu aphah jengin, buhbang bangin a bang soh tai. Hichun Aaronin Miriam agah vet a ahileh vetan, Miriam chu anaphah soh hel tai.
Chu phat’in Aaronin jong Mose jah a aseiyin, “O kapu, kei nin ngol hoi tah a thil kanabol lhona kachonset jeng jeh lhonin talen neimatsah lhon hih helin.
Miriam hi hitobang lomin bolin lang naosen anu oisung anaobu sunga ahung pendoh doh le athisa hung penga atahsa jeng jong alang khat beisa hung pengdoh tobangin umsah hih helin,” atitai.
Hichun Mose jong Pakai henga apengjah jengin, “O Pathen, nahenga katao ahiye, Miriam hi damsah tei teiyin,” tin aseiye.

Ahivangin Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin, “Hiche nu hi apan amaichanga achil set khum jeng hen lang hileh ni sagi sunga jum le ja athoh lou ding ham? Ni sagi sungin hiche nu hi ngahmun polama thah doh-in lang, hichejou teng chuleh ama hi nung puilut kit thei ahinai,” atipeh-e.
Hijeh chun ngahmun polama Miriam akithah doh pai paiyin, ni sagi sungin agaumtai; chule Miriam ahung kipui lut kit masangsen mipi jong akitol doh tapouvin ahi.
Ahin puilut jouvun Hazeroth muna konin mipi akitoldoh-uvin Paran gamthip noiya aki-ngauvin ngahmun asemtauve.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Keiman Israel chate peh dinga kagot Canaan gam hi ave lhi dingin apu apauva aphung khai khaiyuvin alahuva lamkai cheh aphung tin a konin mi khat cheh lhengdoh-in lang, mi som le ni sol temin,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong Pakai thupeh dungjuiyin, Paran gamthip noiya konin, Israel chate lamkai cheh mi hijat chu asoltai.
Amisol ho chu aminu hicheng hi ahiuve: Reuben phunga konin Zaccur chapa Shammua ahin,
Simeon phunga konin Hori chapa Shaphat ahin,
Judah phunga konin Jephunneh chapa Caleb ahin,
Issachar phunga konin Joseph chapa Igal ahin,
Ephraim phunga konin Nun chapa Hoshea ahin,
Benjamin phunga konin Raphu chapa Palti ahi;
Zebulun phunga konin Sodi chapa Gaddiel ahin,
Joseph phung, Manasseh phunga, konin Susi chapa Gaddi ahi;
Dan phunga konin Gemalli chappa Ammiel ahin,
Asher phunga konin Michael chapa Sethur ahin,
Naphtali phunga konin Vophsi chapa Nahbi ahin,
Gad phunga konin Machi chapa Geuel ahi.
Mose’n gam ve lhi dinga asol miho chu aminu hicheng hi ahiye. Alah-uva Nun chapa Hoshea hi Mose’n Joshua anasah-in ahi.
