Mose’n mi hijat hi Canaan gam ve lhi dingin asolin chule ajah-uva aseipeh tai, “Gal lama Negeb gamsunga khun cheuvin lang chujou tengleh thing lhang gamsunga kaltouvun;
chujongle ito bang gam mong mong ham gaveuvin lang, agamsunga cheng mite chu mihatte hiuva, mi thalhomte hiuvam, chule amaho chu mitam tah hiuva, milhomcha hiuvam gaveuvin;
achen nau gamsung chu gampha hinai, gampha lou khat tou ham, achen nau khopi dung jong ngahmun kisem thu mai maiya cheng hiuva, kulpi kikai khum jenga cheng hiuvam:

chujongle gam leiset pha hinai, gam lei set phalou ham; agamsung monga jong thing keh hinai, thing keh louhel ham; hang tah-in cheuvin lang, agamsunga agam gasoh phabep beh hin nung poh lut tei teiyun,” tin ahil tai. Gam veho chelai phat chu lengpiga amasa alhun lai tah anahi.
Miho chu acheuvin agam chu agaveuvin, Zin gamthip laiya pat Hamath jot lutna nailam, Rehob chan geiyin aga kholsoh keitauve.

Gam ve lhi ho chu Negeb gamsunga achetouvun, chuin Hebron geiyin ahunguvin, hikoma chun Anak chilhah ho Ahiman ahin, Sheshai ahin, Talmai ahin ana um cheh uvin ahi. Hebron kbopi hi Egypt gamsunga Zoan sanga jong kum sagia kisa masajo anahi.

Chujouvin gam veho chu Eshcol phaichama ahunguvin, hikoma hin lengpiga boh khat, aboh khatseh seh a kilom chu abah pumin asat lhauvin, ajet aveiya moljol khat’in ajonguvin, chujongle kolbuthei phabep leh theichangga phabep jong ahinpouve.
Hichelai mun chu Eshcol phaicham akisah tai; ijeh-inem itileh hikoma kona hi Israel mi som le nin lengpitheiga abah puma anasat lhah-u ahiye.
Gamsung agakhol nauva konin nisom li jouvin ahung kinungle kit tauve.

Gam veho chu Paran gamthip noi, Kadesh muna Mose le Aaron chule Israel chate khoppi pumpi henga ahung lhung tauvin ahi; hiti hin gam vehon Mose le Aaron ding chule khoppi pumpi het din gin thu ahinpouvin, agamga ahinpoh-u jong miho avetsah tauve.
Hichun gam vehon Mose jah a aseiyuvin, “Nangman neisol nau gama chu keiho kaga lhun’uva ahileh, agam chu bongnoi le khoiju lonna gam anahin, chule hiche jong hi agamga kahinpoh-u ahi.
Ahinla agamsunga cheng mite chu ahat’uvin, akhopi jouseu jong kulpi akikaiden cheh-in, len jong a len thei lheh jenguve; hiche kalvalin jong agama chun Anak son le pah achilhah ho kaga muuve.

Negeb gamsunga chun Amalek mite achenguve; chule thing lhang gamsunga Hit mite, Jebus mite chule Amor mite achenguvin ahi; Canaan mite vang chu twikhanglen pang le Jordan vadung pang dunga achenguve,” atiuvin ahi.

Ahin Mose angsunga Caleb in mipi aphoh thip delin, chule aseitai, “Eiho tu tun che jengu hitin agam chu galo jeng tau hite; ipijeh-inem itileh eihon chutin bol leu hen agam chu ijo tei tei diu ahi,” ati.
Hichun Caleb toh kilhona gam vea che mihon aseiyuvin, “Khuche gama mite dou dinga eiho kontou jou dan ihipouve; ajeh chu amite khu eiho sangin ahatjo mong monguvin ahi,” atiuve.

Hitobang hin hiche miho hin aga gamvet chung changuva thuse thasetna tah tah Israel chate henga ahinpo lut uvin aseiyui, “Agam vetoh le dinga keiho kaga che nau gam chu asunga chengte bahgam hel thei gam ahin, chujongle agamsunga cheng mite jong atahsau asana sang thei alet’a len thei mi jeng ahiuve.

Agama chun keihon Nephilim miho, Nephilima hung kon, Anak chapate jong kamu mong monguve; hiche ho lah a hin keiho le keiho kaikivet uva ahileh khaokhopi te tebep chengin bou kaki muuvin, hitobang geiya neo chun kaumuvin ahi,” atiuve.
Khoppi pumpin ogin sang tah-in asamuvin, hiche jan chun mipi akap tauve.

Chule Israel chate abonchauvin Mose le Aaron dou nan aphun phun jenguvin, hiti hin khoppi pumpin ajah lhona aseitauve, “O kadeh, Egypt gamsunga anathi den jengah hi tau leng ong! Ahilouva ahijongleh hiche gamthip noiya thiden ngap jeng hitau leng!

Ipi ding pen tah a Pakaiyin chemjama lougam bep dinga hiche gamsunga eihin puilut jengu hi tam? Tua la kajiu numei jouse leh kachasen jouseu mi ding bep’a umah ahitauvin; keiho dinga Egypt gama kinung le kit ding phajo lou ding ham ong?” tin aseitauve.
Chujongle miho chu khat le khat akihouvun, “Eihon lamkai khat kilhen u hitin Egypt gama kinung le kit tau hite,” atiuve.
Chutah chun Mose le Aaron jong Israel chate khoppi pumpi kikhom angsung lai tah a akaiku jeng lhon tai.
Hichun gam veho lah a pang teni Nun chapa Joshua le Jephunneh chapa Caleb in jong aponsil lhon abottel jeng lhonin,
chule Israel chate khoppi pumpi jah a chun asei lhontai, “Keihon agam vetoh dinga kagakhol toh leu gamsung chu kidang tah a gampha ahibouve.
Eiho chunga Pakai alung lhaiya ahileh aman hiche gamsunga hi eipui lut jenguva, hiche bongnoi le khoiju lonna gam hi eiho eipeh jeng diu ahi.

Pakai doumah hi bolda pou pouvun; chule agamsung mite jong kichat da jenguvin, ijeh-inem itileh amaho khu eiho kivahna ding ahibouvui, Pakai eiho lama a pan pouva ahileh amaho kihonna ding abeisa ahi; amiho khu kicha hih heluvin,” ati lhone.
Ahinla khoppi pumpin ama ni chu songa selih jeng din aseitauve. Chutah-in kikhopna ponbuh phunga Israel chate jouse henga Pakai loupina ahung kilah pai jengin ahi.

Hichea hin Pakaiyin Mose jah a ahinseitai, “Hiche mite hin itih chan geiya keima nahsah moa eibol bol jeng diu hiya, keiman alah-uva melchihna hijat kahinbol peh vanga jong amahon hin keima eitahsan da nah lai lai dingu hi tam?
Keiman amaho hi gamna hise khat’a kathagam hel jenga, donlou dailouva kakoi ding, chutengle nangma changseh hi hiche mite sanga nasajo leh hatjo nam khat’a kasemdoh ding nahi,” ati.
Ahivangin Mose’n Pakai jah a aseiyin, “Chutile Egypt miten ajah doh dingu ahitai; Ijeh-inem itileh nangman hiche mite hi amaho lai lung tah a nathahat san a nahin puidoh jeng anahin;

amaho jong chun hiche gamsung mite sei bang banga hi anaseiyu ahitai. Chujongle Pakai kiti nangma chu hiche mite lah a nachenge, ti jong anaheuvin, amaho hi kimaiton nakihou pi jie, ti ahetsau ahitai; chule hiche mite chunga nangma kisung jing nahin, sun teng leh amaho hi meibang lomin napui jin, jan teng jongleh meikongin napui jin ahi.
Hijeh chun tun hiche mite hi mihem kitha bangin sumang jeng ta le chun, chutengle nangma thilbol umchan japha jouse namtin vaipin nangma hita naseiyuva,
’Pakaiyin amaho hi pe nange, tia ana kihahselna gamsunga hiche mite hi ahinpui lut joulou phat’a gamthip noiya amaho hi athagam ahitai,’ tia asei diu ahi.
Hijeh a chu tua hi nahenga katao ahiye, Pakai thahat chu letsah jengin lang, nangman nathutep’a naseiya,

’Pakai hi lung hangvah lou ahin, lungsetna long louva thalhingset, themmona le suh khel jouse ngaidama ahin, hijongle la themmona chu don louva koi louhel, mipate themmona jong achate chunga aphu lajing, akhang thum akhang li chan geiya achate chunga phu la jeng thei ahiye,’ nati chu.
Nahenga katao ahi, nalungset long lou thalhing set chun hiche mite hi ngaidam tei teiyin, Egypt gama pat tu chan geiya nangman hiche mite hi na-ngaidam bangin abonchauvin ngaidam tan,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin jong aseiyin, “Nangma sei dungjuiyin ka-ngaidam tai;
hijeng jongle keima aitih a ahing jing jeng kahin, chujongle leiset pumpi hi Pakai loupina adimset bangin,

mihem koi koi hijongle keima loupina mua, Egypt gamsung le hiche gamthip noiya melchih na hijat kaboldoh hi amit’a mu ta a, ahivanga somvei jen hitobanga keima eipatep kit nalaiya, chule kathusei ogin ngai lou jouse chun
itinama jong keiman apu apateu peh dinga kahahselsa gam chu amu louhel diu ahi; chutobang ma a chu keima don lou dailouva eikoiten jong agam chu amu thei louhel dingu ahi.
Ahin kalhacha Caleb vang hin lungthim jatchom beh aneiyin, keima lhingsela eijuijeh hin, keiman ama hi aga gamvetna gamsunga kapui lut ding, agam hi ason achilhah ten alo diu ahiye.
Phaicham dunga hi Amalek mite leh Canaan mite achen jeh-uvin, jing tengleh kile hei kit’uvin lang twikhanglensan jotna lampi langa gamthip noi lam jotna dingin kitoljo tauvin,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Itih chan geiya hiche khoppi gilou tah mite hin keima douna thu asei sei jeng nah lai diu ham? Israel chaten keima douna thuse aseiyuva aphun phun jengu khu keiman kajatai.
Amaho jah a hin seipeh-in, Pakaiyin thu aseiyin, ‘Keima ahing jing jeng kahin, ipi pi hijongle nang hon keima nabenga nasei jouseu chu keiman kabolpeh ding nahiuve.
Hiche gamthip noiya hi namithi longu hung kijam mat chet ding, chule nang ho mijat akisimdohsa jouse, akum kum som nia lhah chunglam mi, keima douna phunna nei jouse chu
khat’a khat jeng cha jong, Jephunneh chapa Caleb le Nun chapa Joshua tailou, keiman nang ho kachen sah ding nahiuve, tia kahahselna gamsunga hi hung lut thei louhel ding ahiye.
Amavang nang hon ‘Miding bep ahitai,’ tia naseiyu nachasen jouseu hi keiman agamsunga kahin pui lut ding, amahon jong agam hi ahinhet tei tei diu ahi, nang hon donlou dailouva nakoisau gam chu.
Chuti chu hintin, nang ho dinga vang namithi longu hiche gamthip noi hi hung dimset jeng ding ahi.

Chutengle nachateu hi gamthip noiya kum som li sunga kelngoi chinga hung pang diu, namiu athiho thilong ajona geiya gamthip noiya akijam geisana jong, amaho hin nang ho tahsan bei nahijeh-uva genthei athoh thoh jeng diu ahitai.

Ijeh inem itileh nang hon nisom li sunga gam chu nagakhol soh keiyu ahin, nikho khat cheh hi kum khat banga kisim ding, kum som li sunga nang hon nathemmo nau nakipoh-uva, keima hi donlou dailouva akikoiya ahileh itiji am, ti chu nakihetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.

Keima Pakai kitipan kasei ahitai, thon louhela keiman keima douna dinga kikhom khom hiche khoppi giloute chunga hiche hi kabol tei tei ding; hiche gamthip noi mong monga hi amaho kichai den ding ahiuvin, hikoma khu amaho thi tei tei ding ahiuve,” tin aseiye.
Mose’n gam vea anasol, ahung kile kit phat’uva agam chung chang thudola thuse jeng hinpo lut’a, Mose douna khoppi pumpi phunsah sah jeng miho,
gam thudola thuse hin nung lhut miho chu Pakai angsunga gamna hise khat’in athigam tauve.
Ahin Nun chapa Joshua leh Jephunneh chapa Caleb vang ahing doh lhon nai, gam vea che ho lah a ama ni chubou hing doh ahi.
Mose’n miho thi thudol jouse chu Israel chate jouse jah a aseipeh-in ahileh, mipi abonchauvin hakan akap tauve.
Chuin mipi chu jingpi tah-in athouvun thing lhang vum langa akaltouvun hitin aseiyui, “Vetem’uvin, Pakaiyin eiho hi nachonseuve, tia asei vangin eiho la hikom mun igei tauve,” atiuve.
Ahivangin Mose’n aphoh paiyin, “Ipi dinga nang hon Pakai thupeh napal lhah-u hitam, hichea hi imacha lolhing louhel ding ahibouve.
Chetou hih hel’uvin, nacheu leh nagalteu angsunga nakisat chap jeng diu ahiye, ijeh-inem itileh nang ho lah a Pakai acheng tapoi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh namasanguva Amalek mite leh Canaan mite adimset’uvin nang ho chemjama nalou gamsih seh diu ahibouve; ajeh chu nang hon Pakai nung najui nauva konin nakinung le kit tauvin, hijeh a hi Pakaiyin jong nang ho naumpi lou dingu ahi,” ati.
Ahinah vangin amahon akisemtoh thu thu uvin thing lhang vum langa chun akaltouvun, ahinla Pakai kitepna thingkong le Mose chulah ngahmuna konin akipatdoh lhon hih hel e.
Chutah chun thing lhang gama cheng Amalek mite leh Canaan mite ahung konsuh-uvin, Israelte chu akisat piuvin ajoutauve, chujongle ahindel pai peh-uvin Hormah geiyin ahindel lut’uvin ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh in lang ajah-uva hitin seiyin, ‘Keiman nang ho kapehna gamsunga acheng dinga nahung lut tengu leh,

bong hon lah a nalah-u hihen lang kelngoi hon lah a nalah-u hijongleh Pakaiya thilto ding natouva, govam thilto ham, pumgo thilto ham, kilhaina gantha ham nabol’uva, aphat kitepsa dungjuiya kitepna ham suh bulhit ding nagot’uva, deichoma thilto todoh ding nagot tengu, Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hisah ding natiuva ahileh,
athilto ding hinchoipan Pakai henga lhosoh thilto ding chang bong neldisel ephah hopsoma hop khat le thaotwi Hin dim khat hop lia hop khat toh ahala ato ding;

chule lengpitwi thiltoa todoh ding jong Hin dim khat hop lia hop khat toh atodoh tha ding, chutengle nangman pumgo thiltoa dingjong, kilhaina ganthaa man ding jong kelngoi nou khat cheh nagon ding ahi.

Ahilou jongle kelngoi chal khat toh totha dinga jong nangman lhosoh thilto dinga chang bong neldisel thaotwi Hin dim khat hop thuma hop khat to kihalsa, Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop ni toh nagon tha ding;
Lengpitwi thilto dinga jong, Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hisah dinga, Hin dim khat hop thuma hop khat natodoh ding ahi.

Chutengle Pakai henga nangman kilhaina ganthaa pang hihen lang pumgo thiltoa todoh ding hileh, kitepna suh bulhitna ding hileh, chamna thiltoa todoh ding hijeng jongleh, bongchal khat thiltoa todoh ding nagon teng chuleh
athiltoh ding pan bongchal chutoh totha dinga lhosoh thilto ding chang bong neldisel thaotwi Hin keh khat dimset to kihalsa, Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop thum toh agontha ding ahi;
chule nangman lengpitwi thilto dinga todoh ding chu lengpitwi Hin keh khat set toh natodoh a, meiya govam thiltoa kimanga, Pakai dinga jong agimnam tuitah hi ding ahi.

Hitobang cheh a hi bongchal khat khat dinga jong kibol ding, kelngoi chal khat cheh dinga jong kibola, kelngoi achal khat cheh dinga jong kibol ding, kelngoinou khat khat dinga jong kibol tha cheh ding ahi.
Gancha tha ding jat dunguiya nang bon agancha jat jat a nabol tha soh kei diu ahiye.
Agamsung mi kiti tapouvin, meiya govam thilto le agimnam tuitah hisah a Pakai lung lhaina hisah ding adeiya ahileh hitobanga hi thilto hijat hi abol cheh diu ahiye.

Chule nang ho lah a kholgam mi ahung khopema auma, chujongle nakhang khanguva nang ho lah a gamchom mi achena, ama jong chun meiya govam thilto ato noma, Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah ahisah noma ahileh, ama jong chun nangho bol bang banga abol ding ahi.

Houbung dinga mahchah ding nang ho ding hihen nang ho lah a hung kholjin kholgam mi hijongle agoma dinga chonna dan khatseh seh bou um ding ahi, hiche chonna dan chu nakhang khanguva bei thei louva um jing ding ahiye; Pakai angsunga chu nang ho um bang banga kholjin mi jong um ding ahi.
Nang hole nang ho lah a kholjin mi agoma dinga danthu khatseh le chonna dan khatseh bou um ding ahiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang ajah-uva hitin seiyin, ‘Keiman nang ho kapeh got gamsunga nahung lhun tengu leh,
chujongle nang hon agamsunga an neh naneh khah phat tengu leh, nang hon Pakai henga thil nato dingu ahi.
Nang hon na-anneh masapenu lah a changlhah lhon khat nakhen doh-uva, hichu changphola kona hung kitoh doh thiltoa nanei dingu ahi.
Hitobanga hi nakhang lhum keiyuva dia na anneh ma sah pen ‘uva kona Pakai ding thil natodoh jing jeng diu ahiye.
“ljemtia Pakaiyin Mose jah a athupeh hicheng lah a hi nang hon khat tou nasuh khel’uva ahileh,
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thupeh hijat ahinpeh nikhoa pat nakhang lhum keiyuva athupeh chengse chu nasuh khel’uva,

chujongle hitobang thilbol chu khoppi hetphah louva hettohna beiya kiboldoh ahikhah a ahileh, khoppi pumpin aboncha uva bongchal khat pumgo thilto dinga atouva, Pakai dinga jong agimnam tuitah hi ding, hichu lhosoh thilto le lengpitwi thilto toh hitha ding, akibolna ding dan kisemsa banga chu thilto kibola, chule chonset thilto dinga jong kelchal khat kito tha ding ahiye.

Chutah le thempupan Israel chate khoppi pumpi dinga thoidamna asempeh a, chule amaho ki ngaidam ding ahiuve; ipijeh-inem hitobang hi suh khel thil ahin, hijeh a hi amahon thilto ahintouva, Pakaiya meiya govam thilto atou ahin, athil bol khel jeh-uva Pakai angsunga meiya govam thilto ahung tou ahiye.
Chutengle Israel chate khoppi pumpi abonchauva alah uva hung khopem mihem geiya ki-ngaidam jeng ding ahiuve, ipijeh-inem itileh mipi abonchauva hiche thil suh khelnaa hi pang kha cheh ahitauve.
“ljemtia mihing khat tou hettoh louva achonset tah a ahileh, aman achonset’a chonset thilto ding kekhal kum khat lhingsa khat atodoh ding ahiye.
Thil suh khel neiya, hetoh louva chonsepa dinga hi thempupan Pakai angsunga thoidamna abolpeh ding, amapa thoidamna ding chu abolpeh ding ahin, chutengle amapa kingaidam ding ahi.
Nang hon hettoh louva thilbol mi dinga, Israel chate lah a agam mi mong mong hihen lang, Israelte lah a khopem kholjin mi hijongle, dan khatseh seh nanei diu ahiye.

Ahin koi koi hijeng jongleh henasa saa thilse bol tapou chu agamsung mi hihen lang khopem mi hijongle aman lhang phong tah a Pakai ahouset’a adeh ahitan, hitobang mihing chu amite lah a kona paidoh jeng ding ahiye.

Ipijeh-inem itileh aman Pakai thusei nahsah louva abol ahitan, athupeh jeng jong apal keh a anit lou ahitai; hitobang mihem chu pumpaiya pai mang jeng ding ahiye: ama themmona chu ama chunga bou um ding ahi.” ati.
Israel chate gamthip laiya atham laiyuvin mihem khat cholngah nikhoa thing choma amudoh tauve.
Chuin thing chompa mudoh hon ama chu Mose le Aaron chule khoppi pumpi henga ahinpui lut tauve.
Hichepa chu ilo ding akichet loulai jeh-in mihenna ina akoitauve.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin, “Hiche mipa hi tha tei tei ding ahi: khoppi pumpin ama pa hi ngahm un polama songa aselih diu ahitai,” ati.
Chuin khoppi pumpin ama’pa chu ngahmun polama apuidoh-uvin, Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin songin asep lih tauve.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang, tuhpah akipheh uva, akhang khanguva aponsil jouseu among gei lai laiya akibauva, chule aponsil jouseu among gei aningkoi koiya chu patjang dum akiba cheh diuvin hil tan;

chule hiche hi nachunguva mutheiya um ding tuhpah a nakitot’uva chutengle Pakai thupeh jouse aboncha kigeldoh ding ahi, thupeh chengse natoh doh theina diuva panga, pannabei hela nang ho lung dei deiya chena ding lam katna dinga nang ho lung gel leh namitmu muu najui louhelna diu ahi.
Chuta chu keima thupeh aboncha nageldoh theiyuva chule naboldoh theina dingu ahin, chujongle na-Pathenu henga athenga naum thei dingu ahiye.
Keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu chu kahin, nang ho Pathen kahina dinga Egypt gamsunga kona nang ho kahin puidoh nahiuve; keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu kahiye.” ati.
Levi chapa, Kohath chapa, Izhar chapa Korah chun Eliab chapa teni Dathan le Abiram chu apuiyin, chule Peleth chapa On le Reuben chapate toh
abonchauvin apuiyin Mose angsunga akidin tepijenguvin, mi hetsa cheh khoppi lah a kona kilhengdoh khoppi lamkai cheh mihem som nga le Israel chate mihem ja ni jen toh Mose douna abol’uvin;

Mose le Aaron dou dingin amaho cham chamin akikhomtauve, chujongle amani jah a aseiyuvin, “Nang ni nakikhel behseh lhon tai! ljeh-inem itileh khoppi pumpi abonchan amichang cheh-in jong atheng cheh nauve, alah-uva jong Pakai aum jing jeng nai; chuti ahileh ibola nang ni nakichoi sanga Pakai Houbung sanga jong kidom sangjo nahi lhon hitam?” atiuve.
Mose’n athuseiyu ajah phat’in akun jengin ahi.

Chule Mose’n Korah le aloi agolte jouse jah a aseiyin, “Jing jingkah tengleh Pakaiyin mi koipen hi ama mi hiya, koipen tah hi akithensosa ham, chujongle ama henga lut thei ding mi chu koi ham, tia ahinphondoh ding ahinai. Aman alhendoh pen pen chu ama henga alutsah theipen pa chu hi jeng ding ahiye.
Nang hon hiti hin bol’uvin: gimnamtui halvamna lheng jouse kilahuvin lang Korah le aloi agolte abonchan kipuiyuvin;

chutengleh Pakai angsunga khun jing nikho leh gimnamtui lauvin, lheng sung dunga mei deuvin, achunga gimnamtui koisoh keiyuvin; hichea chu Pakaiyin mihem athenga umpa chu ahin lhendoh jeng ding ahi. Vo Levi chate, nang ho le nang ho nakikhohsah val behseh tauve!” ati.
Chujongle Korah jah a chun Mose’n thu aseiyin, “Vo Levi chate, phaten ngaiyun.

Israel Pathenin nang ho hi Israel khoppi pumpi lah a atumbeh a nachom lhendoh-uva, ama koma Pakai houbuh natong dinga napui lut’uva, khoppi masanga nadinsah jenguva akinu nabolsah jeng’u hi thil neocha nagel nah Iaiyu hiya,
chule nang hi ama koma napui lut jenga nasopite Levi chate jouse toh napui tha jengpi hi thil mai maiya nabolu ham? Ahinla nang hon hi to bang gei hin thempu mun geiyin jong nachu nalaiyuve ong?

Chuti ahijeh chun nang le naloi nagol te hitobang tah a nakikhop jengu jong hi Pakai douna nabolu ahitai; ajeh chu Aaron kitipa hi ipi lom lom hiya ama douna nang ho naphun phun jeng diu ham?” atin ahi.
Chuin Mose’n Eliab chapa te ni Dathan le Abiram jong mi agakousah-in ahileh, ama nin ahinsei lhonin, “Kahung tou lhon louhel ding ahi.

Nangman keiho gam nomtah, bongnoi le khoiju lonna gama kona neihin puidoh-uva, hikoma gamthip noiya thagam ding neigot’uva, chujongle keiho chunga nang le nang kileng chansah ding nati hi thil neocha nagel nah lai ham?

Achujongleh nangman keiho hi gampha tah bongnoi le khoiju lonna gamsunga la neipui lut deh pouvin, lou bol ding tampi jong neipe pouvin, lengpilei jong neipe pouve. Nangman hiche mite hi amitchangu kaldoh peh ding nagot’a mitchoa umsah ding nati ham? Kahung tou louhel diu ahi,” ati lhone.

Chuphat’in Mose jong alung hang behseh jeng tan, hijeh chun Pakai henga aseitai, “Hiche mite thilto hi imachan gelpeh hih helin. Keiman jong amahoa kon hin sangan khat jeng cha jong kala hih laiyin, chule alah-uva mi khat cha jong kabolset aum hih laiye,” ati.
Chujongle Mose’n Korah jah a aseiyin, “Nang nahin naloi nagolte ahiuvin nabonchauvin, nang hin lang Aaron hihen chule amaho hijeng jongleh jing teng Pakai angsunga hung soh keiyuvin;

chule ami takip’in agimnamtui lhengkong kichoi cheh hen lang, asunga gimnamtui kidop cheh hen, nang ho amijousen ama ama lhengkong cheh hin kichoi hen, lhengkong ja ni le som nga jen chu Pakai angsunga hinchoi lut jenguvin; nang le Aaronin jong nalhengkong cheh hin kichoi lut lhonin,” ati.

Hijeh chun mijousen ama ama lhengkong cheh akidop’uvin, alheng sunga mei adeuvin, achunga gimnamtui akoisoh keiyuve, chuin amaho chu Mose le Aaron chutoh kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula ading khomtauve.
Chujouvin Korah kitipa chun Mose le Aaron dou dingin khoppi pumpi chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula akhomsoh tai. Chutah chun khoppi pumpi henga Pakai loupina ahung kilah tai.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:
“Hiche khoppi kikhomho lah a kon hin nang ni kikhindoh jeng lhonin, chuteng keiman amaho hi chomkah louva kabah gamjeng diu ahi,” ati.

Chutah chun ama ni akun jeng lhonin abohkhup’in asei lhone, “Vo Pathen, tahsa a hing thei jouse lhagao pea Pathen, mihem khatseh chonset vanga nangma hiche khoppi pumpi chunga nalunghan jeng ding hitam?” ati lhona ahileh,
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahin seiyin hitin ati:
“Khoppi jah a seipeh-in lang, ‘Korah le Dathan chule Abiram chenna ina konin kidal khin’uvin,’ tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Chuphat’in Mose jong akipatdoh pai paiyin Dathan le Abiram henga achen ahileh, Israelte upa chengsen jong anung ajuitauve.

Mose’n khoppi kikhomho jah a chun aseipeh-in, hi tin ati: “Nahenguva katao ahiye, hiche migiloute ponbuh dunga kon hin kikhindoh jenguvin lang, amaho thil ahi kiti jouse hi khat’a khat cha jong tongkha hih hel’uvin, achuti louva ahileh amaho hitoh achonset pum pum’uva nakiphet mang thahel diu ahitai,” ati.

Hijeh chun amaho jong Korah le Dathan chule Abiram chenna dunga konin akikhin mang loi jeng tauve; chuin Dathan le Abiram, chule aji te niu leh achate jouseu chutoh achasen gei gei lhonin ahinpodoh jenguvin, ponbuh dunga kotpi phungbula chun ading tauve.
Hichun Mose’n jong aseitai, “Hichea hi nang hon nahet diu ahi, Pakaiyin thil hijatpi hi boldoh dinga keima eihinsol ahin, keima cham chama kahung bol ding ahipoi.
Ijemtia hiche miho hi mihem thi ngai ngaiya athiuva, chujongle amaho hi mihem ngaidola thina pha a athiuva ahileh keima hi Pakaiyin eihinsol lou hi ding kahi.

Amavang Pakaiyin thil thah beh achom khat asemdoh a, tol lei hin akam akah jenga, amaho hi anei agou jouseu puma aval lhum jenga, hita chu amaho jong ahing laiya noimigama akitolsuh jenguva ahivang leh, nang hon hiche mite hin Pakai chu don lou dailouva ananei mong mongu ahinai, ti kichen tah a nahet jeng diu ahi,” ati.
Chuta Mose’n thu chujat aseijou jou chun anoiyuva tol lei chu ahung pohkeh jengin;
chule leiset ahung kamkan amaho chu ainsung mite jouseu toh, Korah mite jouse leh anei agou jouseu pumin aval lhum hel jeng tai.,
Hijeh chun amaho chu anei agou jouseu chutoh ahingin noimigam lama akitolsuh jeng tauve. Achunguva leiset ahung kichi jengin akhuden tan, amaho khoppi lailung tah a amangthah del tauvin ahi.
Chutah chun amiho pen ogin thongin akimvel’uva um Israelte abonchauvin ajam mangsoh hel tauve; ijeh-inem itileh amihon ” Eiho jeng jong leiset hin eival lhum lo jeng diu ahibouve,” tia aseiyu ahi.
Chujou tah chun Pakaiya konin mei ahung kongdoh pai paiyin, gimnamtui thilto lhutnam mihem ja ni le som nga ho chu abonchauvin aval lhumsoh hel tai.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Nangman Aaron thempupa chapa Eleazar jah a seipeh-in lang, meikong lah a kona gimnamtui lhengkong ho khu alah doh din hil in; chujou tengleh meikong jouse jong khu gam tina the cheh soh keiyin, ajeh chu ameikong ho jouse jong khu atheng jeng ahin,

hiche mi chonsete gimnamtui lheng ho khu meiyin akah thengsoh ahitai, amahon ahinkhouva achoh sau ahi; hijeh chun lheng jouse hi maicham khu khumna dingin sehchan khensah-in lang kong jeng jengin semsah tan; ajeh chu hicheng hi Pakai angsunga todohsa ahitauvin, abonchauva hi athenga umdoh cheh ahitauve. Hitobanga hi hiche lheng ho hi Israel chate dinga melchihna pang jing jeng ding ahiuvin ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Eleazar thempupan mei kahvam miho thiltona lheng ho, gimnamtui dopna ho chu alan, abonchan maicham khu khumna dingin sehchan akheng pheng soh hel tai.

Hiche ho hi Israel chate jouse dinga jong melchihna panga, koi koi hijong leh thempua pang lou mi leh Aaron son chilhah hilou tapouvin Pakai angsung ajot lut jenga gimnamtui ahalnam louhelna dinga kikoi ding ahi, achuti louva ahileh hitobanga thil bol kit dinga kigo mihem jong chu, Pakaiyin Mose ajah sah a Eleazar seipeh tan, tia asei banga, mi hitobanga chon kit’a jong chu Korah leh aloi agolte banga mangthah kit ding ahiye.
Ahivangin ajing nikho ma man Israel chate khoppi pumpi chu Mose le Aaron dou nan aphun kit tauvin hitin aseiyuve; “Nang nin Pakai mite abonchan nathat lhon tai,” atiuve.
Hitobang hin Mose le Aaron douna dingin khoppi ahung kikhom khomuvin, kikhopna ponbuh lam a jon tauve; hichun vetan, ponbuh chu meibang lom khat’in ahintom tan, Pakai loupina ahung kilah tai.
Chuphat’in Mose le Aaron jong kikhopna ponbuh maiya ahung lhonin ahileh,
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:
“Keiman chomkah louva hiche mite hi kaval lhumsohna dingin khoppi lailunga kon hin kikhindoh loi jeng lhon tan,” ahinti. Hichun amani jong tola abohkhup pai kit lhontan ahi.

Chujongle Mose’n Aaronjah a aseiyin, “Nangma gimnamtui lhutna lhengkong khu kilah loiyin lang, asunga maicham phunga mei khu gadekouvin, chutengleh meikong chunga khun gimnamtui gahalnamin lang, khoppi kikhomho heng lama choi loijengin, amaho ding khun thoidamna gabol peh loi jeng tan; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiya konin lungsatna ahung kitoldoh tan, gamna hise ahung lang pan tai,” ati.

Hijeh chun Mose sei bang bangin Aaronin jong lhengkong chu akilah loi jengin, khoppi kikhom lailunga alhai lutjeljengin ahileh, vetan, mipi lah a chun gamna hise analang, pan mong mong tai; chuphat’in aman jong gimnamtui alhut vang veiyin mipi thoidamna asempeh loi jeng tan ahi.
Hita hi ama mithi leh mihing kah a akidin te jenga ahiphat’in gamna hise hung langpi chu atang hel tai.
Hichea gamna hise hung langa thia mihem jat mong mong chu, Korah chung changa thi ho sim louhelin jong, mihem sang som le sang li toh ja sagi alhinguve.
Gamna hise lang chu akisuh tang phat’in Aaron jong kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phung lama ahung kile kit tai.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:

“Israel chate jah a seipehlang, amaho chu tenggol gakihol sah cheh-in, pa insung khat kJilhah cheh a apu apau insung dungjuiyin, aphung lamkai cheh chun tenggol kihol soh keiyu hen lang, tenggol som le ni gakihol uhen. Nangman amichang cheh-in atenggol cheh a amin sutpeh soh keiyin lang,
Aaron min chu Levi phung tenggol chunga sutpeh-in. Ajeh chu phung lamkai jouse dinga tenggol khat cheh kibol peh soh kei ding ahi.
Chutengle nangman tenggol jouse chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga, keiman nangma kakimupi na ji lai, hettohsahna maiya chu nakoisoh kei ding ahi.
Chule keiman kalhendoh pen pen mipa tenggol chu hung pah-in tin, hita hi keiman nang ni dounaa Israel chate aphun phun nau jouse kasuh tang hel ding ahiye,” ati.

Hijeh chun Mose’n jong Israel chate jah a aseipeh-in ahileh, amahon jong alamkai alamkai cheh-uva konin tenggol ahinpe soh keiyun, aphung khai khaiyin, apu apau lhah dungjuiya lamkai khat cheh dinga tenggol khat khat ahinpeh-uva ahileh, tenggol som le ni alhingin ahi; hiche lah a hin Aaron tenggol jong apange.
Chuin Mose’n tenggol jouse chu hettohsahna ponbuh sunga Pakai angsunga agakoisoh tai.

Ajing nikhon Mose jong hettohsahna ponbuh sunga agavah lut tai; hichun vetan, Aaron tenggol, Levi phung dia kitoh doh chu, anadondoh-in, ana mumin, chule anapah lhan, atenggola chun jonmot thei anagan anamin tai.
Hichun Mose’n jong Pakai angsunga konin tenggol jouse abonchan mipi henga ahinpu doh soh keiyin ahileh, mihon aveuvin ama ama tenggol cheh akilah tauve.

Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a ahinseiyin, ” Hiche Aaron tenggol hi hettohsahna maiya nung koi kit’in lang, hikoma hi kikoi jing jenga, doumah bolte gihsalna kikoi ding, hitobanga hi nangman amaho kiphinna keima douna aphun nau nasuh tang thei ding ahi; achuti louva ahileh athilo hel diu ahi,” ati.
Mose’n jong hiti chun abolin, Pakaiyin ama athupeh bang bangin Mose’n aboltai.
Chutah chun Israel chaten Mose jah a aseiyuvin hitin atiuve: “Ven, keiho hi amangthah mong mong kihi ahitan, keiho akitinaje him him beiya um kahiu ahitai, kabonchauva ajebei hel a umgam kahitauve.
Koi koi ahin, ahung vah lut a Pakai houbuh hin nailut pen pen chu athi tei tei dinga umah kahiu ahitai. Kabonchauva hi amangthah mong mong ding kahi tah beh mongu hitam!” atiuve.

Pakaiyin Aaron jah a thu asei yin, “Nang le nachapa jouse, chule napa insung miten muntheng chung chang thudola them mona jouse napoh diu ahin, chujongle nangma le nachapate chengsen themput thudol chung changa themmona mo napoh din gu ahiye.

Nangman nasopite, Levi phung mite, napa phung mite jong hin kipui than, hita hi amahon jong nangma napanhu theiyuva, nangma le nachapaten hettohsahna ponbuh maiya kin nabol tengu leh nang ho manchah a apan theina diuvin.

Amahon nangma toh ding atoh-uva chule ponbuh a bol ding kin ijakai abol diu ahin; ahivanga muntheng phunga bel ho leh maicham phung vang anailut thei louhel diu a hi; achuti louva ahileh amaho jong nang jong nathi jeng dingu ahiye.
Amaho hi nang to kitho khom’uva, kikhopna ponbuh a hung kai jing diu, ponbuh a kin kibol jouse jong abol diu ahi, mi koima dang nahenguva hung vah lut thei louhel ding ahi.
Chujongleh Israel chate chunga lungsatna ahung chuh khah kit louhelna dinga nang hon muntheng kin jouse leh maicham kin jouse nabol dingu ahi.
Chule neihin vetan, keiman nasopiteu Levi ho hi Israel chate lah a kona jong kapuidoh a, amaho hi nang ho dinga Pakai henga thilpeh a kipedoh-uva, kikhopna ponbuh kinbol dinga kikoi ahitauve.

Chule nangma nahin nachapate ahiuvin, nabonchauva nathemput nau kin nabol’uva, pondal sunga bol ding kin maicham phung kin jouse nabol diu ahin, hita chu na natoh diu ahi. Keiman nathemput nau hi thilpeh banga kapeh nahiuvin, midang ahung vah lut kha aum khah a ahileh thadoh jeng ding ahi,” ati.

Chujongle Pakaiyin Aaron jah a thu ahinseiyin, “Neihin vetemin, keima dinga thilto dinga kikoidoh jouse, Israel chaten athensosau thil ijakai hi keiman nangma dinga kapehsa ahitai; hicheng hi nangma chan dinga kapch nahin, nachapate dinga jong achan ding mong monguva kapehdoh ahitai.

Hiche hi nangma dinga thil theng lah a thil theng chung nung pen, meiya kigouvam lah a kikhendoh hi ding; Israel chaten lhosoh thilto atodoh chengseu hihen, chonset thilto atou hihen, themmo thilto atodohsau hijongle athilto jouseu keima henga ahintodoh jouseu chu nang le nachapate dinga thil theng chung nung pen hiding ahiye.
Hichu nang hon muntheng lai khat’a naneh-uva, pasala kaiyin aneh theisoh kei ding, nangma dinga atheng hi ding ahiye.

Israel chate thilpeh athilto jouseu ahin, thenso thilto atou jong aboncha nangma ding ahi; aboncha hi keiman nang le nachapate, nachanute, nang nahin aitih chan geiya nachan diuva kapeh nahitai; koi hijongle nangma insung mi atheng tapouvin hiche hi aneh thei soh kei ding ahi.
Thaotwi lah a aphapen tah, lengpitwi lah a atuipen tah, chang lah a jong ahoipen tah, chujongle amahon Pakaiya atodoh sau lhosoh masapen jong keiman nang kapeh nahitai.
Amahon Pakai henga ahintodoh jiu agamsunguva lhosoh alhung masapen jong nang ding ahi; nangma insunga mi koi hileh athenga kisim thei jousen aneh theisoh kei ding ahi.
Israel sunga thil todoh sa jouse chu nang chan ding ahitai.

Ipi hileh tahsa neiya hing naobu tumkeh masa jouse chu mihem hihen lang gancha hijongleh mihon Pakai henga ahin todoh jouseu chu aboncha nang chan ding ahi; hijongleh mihem cha peng masa leh gancha thenglou apeng masa ho vang chu nangman nalhatdoh ding ahi.

Hitobang ho kilhatdohna ding aman jat ahileh, lha khat sunga nalhatdoh tei tei ding ahin, munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya gerah som nia shekel khat lhingji, hiche shekela kite dangka shekel nga hi ding ahi.

Ahin bongnou peng masa leh kelngoinou peng masa, chule kelchanou peng masa ho vang nalhatdoh thei lou ding ahi; hiche ho hi atheng ahiuve. Nangman hiche ho hi maicham chunga athisanu nathe khuma, athao jouseu jong thiltoa man dia meiya nagovam ding, Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hisah ding ahi;
atahsau vang chu nangma ding ahitai; akithensosa aop leh akithensosa ma ma amal jetlam chu nangma chan ding ahiye.

Israel chaten Pakai henga ahintodoh sau thil theng jouse chu aboncha aitih chan geiya jong nachan diuva, keiman nangma le nachapate, nachanute kapeh nahitauve; hiche hi kimanga kitepna nang le nang to kijopmat ding nason nachilhah jouse toh Pakai angsunga atonsot geiya dinga kitepna ahitai,” ati.

Hichun Pakaiyin Aaron jah a thu aseiyin, “Israel chate gamsunga hi nangman gou dinga gam nanei thei louhel ding, amaho lah a jong imacha chan nanei lou ding ahi; Israel chate lah a keima hi nangma chan le nagou kahi.
“Chule Levi chate chu keiman Israel chate lah a kitoh khom hopsom jouse hi kikhopna ponbuh sunga kinbola apan’uva, anatoh atha man dinguvin kapetai.
Tua pat’ a Israel chate hi kikhopna ponbuh naiya hung vah lut louhel ding ahitauve; achutilouva ahileh amahon achonset akipoh uva thidel ding ahiuve.

Hijongle Levi chaten vang kikhopna ponbuh kin abol’uva, amahon athemmo nau mona akipoh diu ahin, hiche hi nakhang khanguva chonna dan a um jing jeng ding ahitai; chujeh a chu amahon Israel chate lah a jong gou anei thei lou diu ahiye.

Ipijeh-inem itileh Israel chaten Pakai henga thilto ding ahintodoh sau hopsom jouse chu keiman Levi chate gou dinga kapehsa ahitai; hijeh a chu amaho hin Israel chate lah a gou anei thei louhel dingu ahi tia keiman kaseipeh ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:

“Nangman Levite jah a thu seipeh-in lang ajah-uva hi tin seiyin, ‘Nang hon Israel chate lah a kona keiman nang ho kapehsa nagou diuva kapehdoh chu nadon khom tengu leh, hiche hopsom lah a kona chu nang hon Pakai henga hopsom natoson kit dingu ahi.
Hichea nang ho thilto jong chu changphol soh chang tobang bang le lengpitwi chilna dimset a kona kitohdoh tobang banga nakisimpeh diu ahi.

Hitobanga hi nang hon jong Israel chate lah a nadon khomu, nahopsomu lah a kona jong hopsom napehson kit dingu ahi; hiche Iah a kona hi nang hon Pakaiya thilto ding thempupa Aaron chu napeh doh diu ahiye.
Nang ho min napeh-u thilpeh chengsea kona chu, alah-uva aphapen lai tah leh atheng lai tah chu, thil kitohdoh jouse ‘Pakai chan dinga napehdoh tei tei diu ahi.

Hichejeh a chu nangman ajah-uva naseiya, ‘Nang hon thil aphalai lai chu natodoh jou tengu leh, amoh chengse chu Levite dinga changphol soh bang bang leh lengpitwi chilna kichildoh bang banga kisimpeh ding ahiuve;

nang hon athil chu hoikom mun hijongleh naneh thei jeng diu, nang ho hiuvin lang na-insung mite hijongleu chun naneh thei cheh diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi nang hon kikhopna ponbuh kin nabolmanu tohman ahibouve.

Hichejeh a hi nang ho themmo changa naum’uva chonse nahilou diu, apha lai lai natou jongleh nathemmo thei louhel diu ahi. Chujongle nang hon Israel chate thil theng ho chu nasuh boh louhel dingu ahi,’ tin aseiye, tin” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:

“Pakaiyin athupeh chonna danthu kiti chu hiche hi ahin, hita asei ahiye. Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang amahon nahenga bongla asan khat, ahin kisuhmo louhel, nolna ding umlou, achunga jong namkoljon kibut khalou bel hinkaiyu hen.
Chule nang hon bongla chu thempupa Eleazar napeh-uva, chujou teng leh bongla chu ngahmun polama kikaidoh a Eleazar angsunga kithat ding ahi;
chujongle thempupa Eleazar-in bong la thisan them khat akhut junga akhoinat’ a kikhopna ponbuh masang lama bongla thisan chu sagi vei jen athin khum ding ahi.
Eieazar mitmu mong monga bongla chu avun jong atahsa jong, athisan jong, aeh gei geiya meiya kigouvam hel jeng ding ahin;
chule thempupan cedar thing them khat alah a hyssop toh, ponsan-ao thim toh alah a bongla kigona meilhum sunga alelut ding ahi.

Chujou tengleh thempupan aponsil aboncha twiya akisop ngima atahsa jeng jong twiya kisil thengsel ding, chujou teng leh ngahmun sunga hung vah lut ding ahi; chutengle thempupa chu nilhum keiya aboh a um ding ahiye.
Koi koi hijongle bongla meiya gouvampa jong chun aponsil jouse twiya akisop ngim ding, atahsa jeng jong twiya kisil ngim ding a hi, chule ama jong nilhum keiya aboh a um ding ahi.

Mi koi hileh athenga um khat’in bongla kigovamna avutvam jouse chu alokhoma, aboncha ngahmun polam muntheng lai khat’a agakoi ding ahin; hiche vutvam jouse chu thenlouna twi, chonset sop lhahna ahi, tia Israel chate khoppi pumpi dinga kikoi koi jeng ding ahi.

Chule bongla kigovamna vutvam loh khompan jong aponsil jouse akisop ngimsoh keiya nilhum keiya aboh a um ding ahi. Hiche hi Israel chate jouse leh alah-uva hung kholjin mi dinga abei theilou hel chonna dana kimang jing jeng ding ahi.
“Mi koi hijongle thilong tahsa tongkha tapou ni sagi sunga aboh a um ding, jechang ding ahi;

hitobang mi chu nithum lhin ni leh ni sagi lhin nia ama le ama kisop thenga hita hi athenga umdoh ding ahi; amavang nithum lhin ni le ni sagi lhin nia ama le ama akisuh theng louva ahileh athenga umdoh thei lou ding ahitai.

Mihem koi koi hijeng jong leh mihem athi nung teng athilong, atahsa thilong tongkha tapou chu ama le ama akisuh theng louva ahileh, Pakai houbuh asuh boh ahitan, hitobang mihem chu Israel lah a kona paidoh he! ding ahi; ajeh chu aboh kisuh thengna twi chu hitobang mihem chu akithe khum hih laiyin, ama chu aboh nalai ahi; athenlouna achunga abeh jing jeng nalaiye.
“Ponbuh sunga mihem athiden tengleh hiche hi kimanchahna dan hi ding ahi; hiche ponbuh sunga hung lut jouse leh aponbuh sunga ana um jouse abonchauva ni sagi sunga aboh a umuva, jechang ding ahiuve.
Hitobangma maa hi bubel kihongdoh a asinna kising kit’a phatea sinkhum lou jong chu aboh a um ding ahi.

Koi koi hileh gamlah tollhanga chemjama kisat lih mithi long tongkha ham, thilong pou pou tongkha ham, ahiloule thigu tongkha ham, lhankhuh chonkha ham, ama chu ni sagi sunga aboh a uma, jechang ding ahi.
Hiche aboh a umpa dinga hi mihon chonset thilto kigovamna vutvam phabep alahuva bubel sung khat’a twi along laipet phabep toh ahalbe diu,

chujou tengleh mihem athenga um khat’in hyssop pon alah a twi lah a chu adekot ding, chule ponbuh chunga athin khuma, asunga manchah jouse jong athin khumsoh kei ding, chujongle asunga cheng mihem jouse chungajong athin khum ding, chule mithigu tong kha hihen lang, mi kithatsa tongkha hileh, thilong tongkha hihen lang lhankhuh chonkha hijongleh hichepa chunga jong chu athin khum ding ahi.

Hitobanga hi athenga umpan aboh a umpa chunga nithum lhin ni leh ni sagi lhin nia a thin khum ding ahin; ni sagi lhin ni vang leh abohpa chu asuh thenga, aman jong abohpi aponsil jouse akisop ngimsoh keiya, amatah jeng jong twiya kisil ngimsel ding, nilhah Jam tengleh amapa chu athenga um ding ahitai.

Mihem koi koi hijeng jongleh aboh a umtaa ama Je ama kisuh thengna bol louva um, hitobang mihem chun Pakai muntheng asuh boh ahitan, hijeh a chu ama hi Houbung jalah tah a paidoh hel ding ahiye; ajeh chu hiche aboh a umpa chunga hin aboh ho kisuh thengna twi akithin khum hih laiye.

Israelte dinga hiche hi abei louhel ding chonna dan ahi. Thenglou suh thengna twi thin khuma pangin jong aponsil jouse akisop theng ding ahin; chujongle thenglou suh thengna twi tongkha jouse jong nilhum keiya aboh a uma, jechang diu ahiye.
Chule ipi thil hijongle mihem aboh a umpan atoh khah chan aboh a um jeng ding ahi; chujongle hiche thilboh tong kha kit jouse jong chu nilhum keiya aboh a um kit jeng ding ahiye.
Israel chate khoppi pumpi chu lha masa sungin Zin gamthip lai ahung lhung tauvin, chuin mipi abonchauvin Kadesh muna aki-ngasoh tauve; hikoma hin Miriam athin, chukom ma maa avuiden tauvin ahi.
Hikoma hin khoppi pumpi don ding twi anaum hih-in ahileh, Houbung mite chu Mose le Aaron to kina din ama cham chamin ahung kikhomsoh keitauvin ahi.
Hichun mipin Mose akinah piuvin aseiyuvin hitin atiuve, “Ohe, kasopiteu Pakai angsunga anathi pet tah a chu keiho jong anathi doh jeng hi tau leng!
Ipi ding pentah a nang nin Pakai Houbung hi hiche gamthip laiya neipui lut’uva, hikoma hi keiho jong kagancha jouseu jong thagam ding neigot jengu hi tam?

Chujongleh ipi ding pen tah a nang nin keiho hi Egypt gama kona neihin puitouvu va hikom mun phalou laitah a hi neipui lut jengu ham? Hikoma hin chang la aumpon, thei changga la aumpon, lengpigui la aumpon, kolbuthei jong aumpon ahi; chujongle don ding jengcha jong twi akimujou pon ahi,” atiuve.
Chuin Mose le Aaron jong Houbung masanga konin apotdoh lhonin kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbul geiyin ache lhonin tola abohkhup lhonin atao lhontai. Hichun ama ni henga Pakai loupina ahung kilah-in,
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hi tin ati:

‘Tenggol chu kilah-in lang, khoppi pumpi koukhomin, nangma nahin nasopipa Aaron ahin, miho mitmu chang tah chun songpi jah a thu seiyin lang twi hinput doh sah tan, tin seipeh-in; hita hi nangman amaho dinga songpia kona hi twi nakoudoh ding ahin, chutah le khoppi pumpi leh aganchau aboncha twi nadonsah soh kei thei dingu ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong Pakai angsung tah a aman athupeh bang bangin tenggol chu akilah tai.

Mose le Aaronin songpi mai laitah a Houbung mite chu akoukhomsoh kei lhonin ajah-uva aseipeh tai, “Phaten ngaiyuvin doumah mah a chonte, nang ho dinga kei nin hiche songpia kona hi twi kaputdoh sah lhon ding ham?” ati.
Hichun Mose’n jong akhut alamsangin atenggolin songpi chu nivei jen ajep tai; chutah chun twi neng jeng jungin ahung longdoh jeng tan ahileh khoppi pumpi leh aganchateu vin adon chimset tauve.

Hichun Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu ahin seiyin, “Nang nin keima neitahsan lhon loujeh leh Israel chate angsunga keima athenga bol ding nagot lhon loujehin, nang nin hiche khoppi pumpi hi keiman amaho kapeh got gamsunga napui lut lhon louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche twipi hi Israel chaten Pakai aphin’uva, amintheng aphonjal nau ahin, hijeh chun Meribah twi akiti.
Mose’n Kadesh muna konin Edom lengpa henga mi asolin, “Nasopi Israelin hitin aseiye: ‘Nangman keiho chunga lhungsa hahsatna aboncha nahetsoh hel ahitai;

itobanga kapu kapateu Egypt gama anachesuh-uva, hijeh a chu keiho phat sotpi Egypt gamsunga kaga chen chen jengu hi tam; chule Egypt miten keiho jong kapu kapateujong engse tah-in einabol gentheiyuvin ahi.

Ahin keiho Pakai henga kataovuva ahileh aman keiho taona ogin asangin, Egypt gama kona keiho puidoh dingin Vantil khat eihinsol peh tauve; tun keiho vetan, hikom nangma gamgi chin laitah, Kadesh kiti laiya hin kaum tauve, akhopia hin kapansauvin ahi.

Kataovu ahi, keiho hi nagamsung neijot paisah jenguvin; keihon loujao le lengpilei dung jong jotpa pouving ting, twikula konin twi jengcha jong nadonpeh pouvinge; keiho lengpa lam len mai maiya kijot’uving katin, lamjet lamveiya jong kiheidoh hih hel uvinge, nagam kajotdoh kahseuvin jangkeiyin kijot jot jengu ving kate,” agatisah tai.
Ahinla Edomin ajah a ahinseiyin, “Nangman kagam najotpai thei louhel ding ahi, najotpaiya ahileh chemjam kahin pat’a nangma lamtin dinga kahung kon jeng ding ahi,” ahinti.

Ahivangin Israel chaten ajah a aseinah nah-uvin, “Keiho lamlen seh seh a kijot tou ding kahibouvui; ijemtia nangma twi kadon khah tah-uva ahileh, adona chu keima hing lang kagancha hijong leh keiman atwi man kapeh tei tei ding ahinai; nagamsung chu kengin neijotsah pou pouvin, thil dang imacha ding kati poi,” agati kit’in ahi.
Ahinah vangin amanla, “Najot pai thei lou hel ding ahi,” ati nalaiye. Chujongle Edom chu amaho lamtin dingin mihem tampi leh sepai hat tah toh ahung kon pai pai tai.
Edomin agamsung chu Israel ajot paisah nom lou jeh a lampi apehda phat’in Israel jong Edom kitipa koma konin akihei kittai.
Kadesh a konin Israel chate khoppi pumpi chu akitol’uvin Hor molsang ahung geitauve.
Chuin Edom gamgi chin a Hor molsang chunga chun Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:

“Aaron jong amite toh kigom kit ding ahitai, ijeh-inem itileh nang hon Meribah twiphunga keima doumah nabol jeh-uvin, kathupeh nadou dal’uvin, hijeh a chu keiman Israel chate kapeh ding gamsunga ama lut thei lou ding ahitai.
Nangman Aaron le achapa Eleazar chu kouvin lang Hor molsanga hinpui touvin;
chutengle Aaron ponsil avon jouse sut lhan lang abonchan achapa Eleazar vonpeh tan; Aaron vang amite toh kigom kit a, hikoma chu thiden ding ahitai,” ati.
Mose’n jong Pakai thupeh bang bangin abol in ahi; athum’uvin khoppi pumpi mitmu chang tah-in Hor molsang chunga akaltou tauve.

Chuin Mose’n Aaron ponsil avon abonchan asut lhan achapa Eleazar avonpeh tai; Aaron vang chu chukom molsang vuma chun athiden tan ahi. Chujouvin Mose le Eleazar jong molsang chunga konin ahung kumsuh lhon tai.
Khoppi pumpin Aaron thi kichen tah a amudoh phat’uvin Israel insung pumpi Aaron dingin nisom thum sungin akap kap jenguvin ahi.
Canaan mi Arad lengpa, Negeb a cheng pan Israel chu Atharim lampia ahung kitol’uvin ahi, ti ajah doh phat’in Israel akisat pin ahileh, Israel mi phabep jong gal hingin ahinkaiye.
Chuin Israel jong Pakai henga kitepna khat’in akitep’in aseitai, “Pakai nangman hiche mite hi keima khut’a neipeh doh pou pouva ahileh, keiman akhopi jouseu aboncha kasuh beihel ding ahi,” atitai.

Chuphat’in Pakaiyin jong Israel thusei akitepna asanpeh tan, Canaan mite chu apedoh jengin ahileh, Israel miten jong amaho jong akhopi jouseu jong asuh mang hel’uve; hijeh chun hiche lai chu amin Hormah akiti.
Hor molsanga konin Israelte Edom gam kimvela kitol dingin twikhanglensan jotna lampi juiyin akitol tauve; ahin lampi dunga mipin athoh lel behseh jenguvin;

hijeh chun mipin Pathen le Mose dou nan thu aseitauve, “lpi ding mong monga gamthip noiya thisah gam dinga Egypt gama kona neihin puidoh khoh khoh uham? Ajeh chu neh ding anneh la aumpon, don ding twi la aveipon, hiche atuilam aal lam kihelou an hi la kaloh soh gamsih seh tauve,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Pakaiyin mipi lah a gulse hang tah tah ahinlha lut jengin ahileh, gul hon mipi chu achu uvin, hijeh chun Israel chate mi tamtah athilo tauve.

Hichun mipi jong Mose henga ahunguvin ahung seitauve, “Keiho achonsea kahitauve, ajeh chu Pakai le nangma dou nan keihon thu kanaseiyuvin ahi; hijongle nangman Pakai henga neitaopeh tei teiyuvin lang, aman keiho lah a kon hin gulse jouse ladoh jeng hen,” atiuve. Hijeh hin Mose jong mipi dingin ataotai.

Chujongle Pakaiyin Mose henga aseiyin, “Gulse hangtah lim khat semin lang hichu moljol khat chunga tah doh temin, koi koi hijongleh gulin achuh tengleh nangma gul lim sem chu avet’a ahileh hing jeng jeng ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n sum-engin gul lim khat asemin, moljol chung khat’a atah doh-e; mihem koi hijongleh gulin achuh teng hiche sumeng gul lim chu avet’a ahileh hing ding ahi.
Israel chate akipatdoh kit’uvin acheuvin Oboth kitilaiya ngahmun asemun aki-ngauve;
chuin Oboth muna konin akipatdoh kit’uvin acheuva ahileh Moab gamto kigaldot gamthip laiya um Iyeabarim kiti laiya ngahmun asat tauve.
Chua konin akitoldoh pai kit’uvin Zered phaichama ngahmun asat kit tauve.

Chulaiya konin jong akitoldoh pai pai kit’uvin Amon gal lang khat a ngahmun asat’uvin, Amon jong hi gamthip lai ma ma ahin, agamthip hi Amor mite gamgi chin langpeh a kona hunga gammang hung um matpeh ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh Amon kiti hi Moab gamgi ahin, Moab le Amor mite kah a gamgia pang ahi.

@@@1Phaichama longsuh suh hoh lam jouse, @2Ar mun geiya long lut ho chu; @1Chujongle Moab gamgi geiya long lut @3peh a,” kiti chu.
Hiche muna kon chun Israelte jong achepai kit’uvin Beer ageitauve. Beer hi twikul ahin, hichea hi Pakaiyin Mose jah a anaseiya, “Mipi hin koukhomin, keiman abonchauva twi kapeh ding ahi,” anati ahi.

@@@1Leng le Ial chate laisa twikul hi, @2Mipi lamkaite laisa twikul, @1Aleng tenggol jouseu leh @2Atenggol chengseu puma alaisau ahi,” @3anati. @0Hiche gammang lah a kon hin amaho akitol kit’uvin Mattanah agei tauvin ahi;
Mattanah a konin Nahaliel ahung geiyuvin, chule Nahaliel a konin Bamoth ahung gei kit tauve.
Chule Bamoth a konin phaicham khat ahinphauvin, aphaicham hi Moab lhangto kijopmat ahitan, Pisgah molvuma kona ahin kisuh vet’a ahileh nelgam toh agamgi akimu pai paiyin, achin mong mong ahitai.
Israelin Amor mite lengpa Sihon henga mi asolin hitin agaseisah e,

“Nagamsung hi neijot pai sah tan; keiho naloulai dung le nalengpilei lai dunga jong vah lut pouvinge; twikula konin twi jengcha jong don hih hel’uving kate, lengpa lamlen jenga bou kijot’uving ting, kagal kai kahseuva jang keiya kache che jeng diu ahin nangma gamgi kajotdoh masang seuva hita chu kache dingu ahi,” atisah-in ahi.

Ahivangin Sihon chun Israel hi agamsung ajotpai sah ding anom tapoi. Hisang hin aman amite pasal jouse akoukhom loi jengin, Israel to kisat din gin gammang lam ahinjon tai; hiti hin Jahaz kiti lai geiyin ahungin Israel toh akisat tan ahi.

Hichun Israelin Sihon hi chemjam hemin asat lih den tan, agamsung alah peh tan, Amon a pat Jabbok geiyin alan, Ammon mite chenna geiyin ahinla peh jengin ahitai; ajeh chu Jazer kiti lai hi Ammon mite gamgi anahi.
Israel chun khopi hijat jen hi alan, hitobang hin Amor mite khopi tina chun Israel achengsoh tai, Heshbon khopijong chule khoneo dung jousea jong achengtan ahi.
Heshbon khopi hi Amor mite lengpa Sihon khopi ana hi; ajeh chu Sihon hin masang laiya Moab lengpa anakisat pia, ajo phat’a agam jouse ama khut’a kona analah peh a, Amon chan geiya anatoupha ahitai.

Hiti hin Amor mite gamsunga Israel anachengin ahi.
Chuin Mose’n Jazer ve lhi dingin mi asolin; chujouvin amahon akhoneo dungjouse alauvin, akhoa cheng Amor mite abonchan anodoh soh kei tauve.

Chujouvin Israelte akiheiyun Bashan lampi lama achetou tauvin ahi; ahin Bashan lengpa Og kitipa chu amaho to kisat dingin ahung kontai; alengpa ahin amite ahiuvin abonchauvin ahung kon uvin Edrei muna kisatpi dingin ahung tauve.

Chuphat’in Pakaiyin jong Mose jah a aseiyin, “Og khu kicha hih hel’in, ajeh chu keiman nangma khut’a ama hi kapehdoh ahitai, amite jong agamsung jong kapehsa nahitai; nangman ama jong hi Heshbon khopia chengpa Amor te lengpa Sihon nabolna bang banga nabol ding ahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun Israelten Og jong chu athat’uvin, achapate jong, amite jong athat ngimhel jenguvin, ama dinga mihem khat’a khat cha jong ahingdoh abeihel kahsen athat gamhel tauve; chujouvin amahon agamsung jong alopai paiyun ahiye.
Israel chate ahung kitoldoh kit’uvin Moab phaicham Jordan gal lam, Jerichoa chun ngahmun asemuvin akingauve.
Hichun Zippor chapa Balak chun Israel thilbol chu abonchan Amor mite abolna amusoh keitai.
Hijeh chun Moab jeng jong Israel chate kichan akitihot lhul jengtai; ajeh chu Israel mite a tam behseh jenguvin ahi; hichejeh a hi Israel chate ginna Moab jong akicha lih pai ding ahitai.

Hijeh chun Moab’in jong Midian mi upate jah a aseiyin, “Hiche mihonpi hin tua hi bongchalin hampa aketmai hela, loujao aneh chai hel banga, ikimvela thil um jouse aboncha abahgam hel diu ahitai,” ati. Hijeh chun Zipporchapa Balak kitipa, chulaiya Moab gama leng changpan,

Pethor a cheng Beor chapa Balaam henga mi sottol phabep asolin ahi, Pethor hi Amaw gamsunga vadung panga kisa khopi ahin, Balaam chu agakousah-in hitin agasei sah-e; “Vetan, Egypt gama konin mihon khat ahung kitoldoh-uvin, vetan amaho hin leiset chung atomjol jenguvin, chule amaho keima to keimaito tah in achenguvin ahi.

Tun hungin lang hiche mite hi neihung gaosap peh tan, ajeh chu amaho kei dingin ahat behseh jenguvin ahi; ijem itileh keiman amaho hi sat jou thei jeng khat ing ting, abonchauva gamsunga hi kadel mang hel thei ahiuve; ijeh-inem itileh nangman phatthei naboh mi chu phatthei achang jeng jin, nagaosap pen pen jong akigaosap jeng jie, ti keiman kahetsa ahiye,” ati.
Hiti hin Moab upate leh Midian mi upate chu akhut’uva phunsan man ding akichoi cheh-uvin apotdoh tauve; chuin amaho Balaam heng ahung lhunguvin, Balak thu thot athupoh-u chu ama apetauve.

Hichun aman jong ajah-uva aseiyin, “Tujan hikoma hin geh tauvin, Pakaiyin kahenga thu ahinsei dungjuiyin keiman nang ho henga thu hin nung poh lut kit tange,” ati. Hijeh chuh Moab gama leng le Ial chate jong Balaam henga ageh tauvin ahi.
Chuin Balaam henga Pathen ahungin aseitai, “Nakoma geh miho hi hoilam koi mi hiuvam?” tin adong tai.
Chuphat’in Balaamin jong Pathen jah a aseiyin, “Moab lengpa, Zippor chapa Balak-in amaho hi kahenga ahinsolin,

vetan, Egypt gama konin mihon khat ahung kitoldoh-in, amiho hin leiset atomjol jeng tauve; tun hungin lang amaho hi neihung gaosap peh tan; ijem itileh keiman amaho hi kisatpi jou theiying ting kadel doh jeng thei ahiuve,’ tin ahung seisah-e,” atin ahi.

Hichun Pathenin Balaam jah a aseiyin, “Hiche miho hitoh kilhona nangma nache thei louhel ding, chule hiche mihonpi jong chu naga gaosap thei lou ding ahi; ajeh chu amaho hi phatthei boh changsa ahibouvui,” ati.
Hijeh chun Balaam jong jingpi tah-in athouvin Balak hinsol leng le lal chate jah a aseitai, “Nagam lam’uva chetauvin, ajeh chu Pakaiyin nang ho to kilhona kache ding aja nom poi,” ahung ti.
Chuphat’in Moab gam leng le lal chapate jong akipatdoh-uvin Balak henga acheuvin aseitauve, “Balaam chu keiho toh kilhona hung ding anom poi,” atiuvin ahi.
Ahivangin Balak chun leng le lal chapate a tam jep, amasa ho sanga ja um jep asol kit leu tan ahi.
Hiche ho jong chu Balaam henga ahunguvin ajah a ahung seitauve, “Zippor chapa Balak chun hitin aseiye, ‘Kahenga nahungna dingin imacha cha kisuhmo sah hih hel’ in;

ijeh-inem itileh keiman nangma minche tah a kabola, ipi pi hijongle nangin keima jah a nasei chan chu kabolpeh jeng ding nahi; hung tei teiyin lang hiche mihonpi hi hung gaosap tei teiyin,’ tin aseiye,” ahung tiuve.

Ahivangin Balaam in adonbut’in Balak lhacha ho jah a aseitai, “Balak chun ain dimset dangka le sana eipeh ding hihen lang hijongleh, keima hi Pakai ka-Pathen thupeh kalvala kachon thei louhel ding, alhing lel a jong avala jong kabol thei lou ding ahi.
Chuti ahileh tun hikoma hin tujan geh jenguvin lang, ken jong Pakaiyin kahenga ipi aseibe ding ham, kahetdoh theina din kho ngaiyun,” ati.

Chuin Balaam henga janlaiyin Pathen ahung kit’in ajah a ahung seitai, “Hiche miho hi nangma kouva hung kit ahiuva ahileh, kipatdoh-in lang amaho hitoh kilhontan; ahin keiman nabol dinga kaseipeh cha cha bou nabol ding ahi,” ati.
Balaam jong jingkah in athoudoh in asangan chunga toupha akikan beh pai paiyin, Moab gam leng le lal chapate toh akilhon tai.

Ahivangin Balaam ache jeng chu Pathen lunghan ahung deujah jengin, hijeh chun Pakai Vantil chu ama kidoupi din lampia anadingin analam tin tai. Balaam chu sangan chunga ahung touvin, alhacha teni toh ahung kilhonin ahi.

Hichun Pakai Vantil lamlen laitah a anadina, akhut’a chemjam sadohsa anakidop chu sanganin ahinmudoh tai; hijeh chun sangan jong lamlena konin akiheidoh in loujao lah a alhai lut tan ahi; ahivangin Balaam in sangan chu lamlen laiya hoilut ding agon ajep’in ajep tai.
Chuphat’in Pakai Vantil jong lengpilei teni kah a lampi neolai tah, ajet aveiya pal kigento lai khat’ a anading tai.
Chuin Pakai Vantil ahinmudoh kit ‘in ahileh sangan chu pal voh nan akinei jengin, chujongle Balaam kengphang chu pal toh avo beh tai; hichun Balaam in jong sangan chu ajep kit tai.
Chujou kit’in Pakai Vantil chu anache kit’in lam jum lai khat, ajet aveiya jong kiheidoh thei louhelna mun khat’a anading kit tan ahi.
Hichea hin sanganin Pakai Vantil amuphat’in Balaam noiya akolden jeng tai; chutah chun Balaam alung hang behseh jeng tan, sangan chu atenggolin hajep jep’in ajep tai.

Hichea hin Pakaiyin sangan kam akeh peh-in, hijeh chun sanganin jong Balaam jah a thu aseiyin, “Ken nangma ipi kabol set peh mong uma nangin hitobanga hi thumvei jen keima neiden den jeng hi tam?” ahinti.
Hichun Balaam in jong sangan jah a aseiyin, “Nangin keima kichepna neibol hita hi la, kakhut’a chemjam kachoipet hihen lang nathatdoh jeng leng iti jong kathanop hi tam?” ati.

Chuin sanganin Balaam jah a ‘aseiyin, “Kei hi nangma sangan kahilou hiya, nahinkho hichan sungsea hi tuni geiya touna neiman jing jeng hilou ham? Keiman hitobanga hi kanabol khah mong hinam?” atileh; aman jong” Ahipoi,” ati.

Chutah chun Pakaiyin Balaam mit akeh hah peh pai paiyin ahileh, aman jong lampi laiya Pakai Vantil adina, akhut a chemjam sadohsa akidoppi chu amudoh tan ahi; chuphat’in ama jong akunin, tola abonkhup’in alhun amai asulut jenge.

Chuin Pakai Vantil chun Balaam jah a aseiyin, “Ipi dinga nangman na-sangan hi hitobanga thumvei jen naden hitam? Vetan, nangma lam tina kidinte pi dinga keima hung kondoh kahi, ajeh chu nangma lampi hi keima angsunga dingin lamse ahitai;
hijeh a hi hiche sangan hin keima eimu jeh a thumvei jen hi kiheidohji ahiye; hitobanga hi sangan kiheidohji ji lou hileh, ken nangma katha tei tei ding, ama hi kahing hoi ding ahitai,” ati.

Chuphat’in aman jong Pakai Vantil jah a aseiyin, “Keima achonsea kahitai, ajeh chu keima dou dinga nangma lamlen laiya nadinji chu kahet louhel anahi. Tun jong hiche hi nangma mitmua thilse mong mong ahileh keima kinung le kit tange,” atitai.

Ahivangin Pakai Vantil chun Balaam jah a aseiyin, “Hiche miho hitoh kilhon tan, amavang keiman kahilcha cha bou nasei ding ahi,” ati. Hijeh chun Balaam jong Balak hinsol leng le lal chapate chutoh akilhon pai tan ahi.
Balaam ahung vailhung tai, ti ajah phat’in am a lamdot din Balak jong ahung apotdoh paiyin, Moab khopi Amon gamgi chin, gamgi mong langpeh geiyin ahungin ahi.
Hichea chun Balak injong Balaam jah a aseiyin, “Keiman nang kouva mi kahinsolsa hilou ham, ipibola kahenga nahung lou ham? Keiman nang hi jatah a, minche tah a kabol lel dinga nabol ham?” atileh;
Balaamin jong Balak jah a aseiyin, “Veta, nahenga kahung hi! Keiman ipi pi hileh sei theina ding tha kanei beh ham? Pakaiyin keima kamsunga ahinkhum khum chu ipi hijongleh kasei ding bou ahiye,” ati.
Hichun Balaam jong Balak toh ahung kilhon paiyin, anilhonin Kiriath-huzoth ahung gei lhontai.
Chuin Balak in kilhai nan bongchal phabep le kelngoi phabep athat’in, asau chu Balaam le aumpi leng le lal chapate jong agah thot’in ahi.
Ajing nikhon Balak chun Salaam apuiyin Bamoth-baal kiti laiya ahinpui lut tai; hikoma kon hin Balaam in mipi ahung nailam pen ho amutai.
Chuphat’in Balaam in jong Balak jah a aseiyin, “Hikoma hin kei dingin maicham sagi neisempeh-in lang, chule bongchal sagi leh kelngoi chal sagi ma neihin kailut peh tan,” tin aseiye.
Balak jong chun Balaam sei bang ban gin abolin, hitobang hin Balak le Balaam in maicham khat khat chunga chun bongchal khat le kelngoi chal khat cheh atoh doh lhon tai.

Hichun Balaamin jong Balak jah a aseiyin, “Napumgo thilto koma hin nangma anading jingin, keima chedoh tange; ijem itileh keito kimuto dingin Pakai hung jeng khat tan tin, ipi pi hijeng jongleh aman keima eivetsah chan chu ken nangma naseipeh nange,” ati.
Pathenin Balaam ahung kimuto pin ahileh, Balaamin jong ajah a aseiyin, “Keiman maicham sagi kasempeh-in, maicham khat cheh a chun bongchal khat cheh le kelngoi chal khat cheh katoh doh tai,” anati.
Chuin Pakaiyin Balaam kamsunga thu cheng khat akhumpeh-in aseitai, “Balak henga kile kit ‘in hita hi nagaseipeh ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Balaam jong Balak henga ahung kile kit’in ahileh vetan, Balak jong Moab gama leng le lal chapate abonchauvin pumgo thilto koma anading soh keiyun ahi.

Chuin Balaamin adonbut’in, “lpi hita leh Pakaiyin keima kamsunga akhumpen pen chu kasei tei ding hilou ham?” ati.

Chuphat’in Balak-in jong Balaam jah a aseiyin, “Lungset tah-in keito kilhonin che hite, chua konin nangin amaho mutan nate; hiche jeng jong chu anailam cha cha bou namu ding ahin, abonchauva namusoh louhel ding ahinalaiye; hijongle hichea kon chun nangman amahose se chu keima dingin gaosap jeng tan,” ati.

Hiti hin Balak-in Balaam chu apuiyin, Zophim loulai geiyin akilhonpin, Pisgah molvuma apuidoh-in hikoma chun maicham sagi asemin, maicham khat cheh chunga bongchal khat le kelngoi chal khat cheh atoh doh tai.
Chuin Balaam in jong Balak jah a aseiyin, “Keiman gal langa Pakai kaga kimutopi kah-in nangma napumgo thilto koma hin anading jingin,” ati.
Hikoma hin Pakaiyin Balaam akimupi kit tan, chujongle akamsunga thu cheng khat akhumpeh-in aseitai, “Balak henga kinungle kit’in lang hita hi nagaseipeh ding ahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun Balaam jong Balak henga ahungin ahileh, vetan, Balak chu apumgo thilto koma anading jing nalaiyin, chule Moab gama leng le Ial chapate jouse jong akoma aum’uvin ahi. Hichun Balak in Balaam jah a ahinseiyin, “Pakaiyin ipi pi asei hitam?” tin adong loi jenge.
