Israel chu Shittim gama acheng tai. Ahin Israel mipi chu Moab chanute chunga ahung chon thanghoi pantauve.

Hitobanga achon nau hin mipi chu Moab mite milimdoi asem thu u Chunga jong ahung lung lut’uvin kilhaina abol’u jong athanop piuvin, asa jong anetauve, chujongle hitobang milimdoi kisemthu ho chu chibai aboh-uvin abohkhup khup jiuvin ahi.
Hitobang hin Israel ama le amatah-in Peor muna Baal kihou chu midang toh ahou khomtai. Hijeh hin Israel chunga Pakai lunghan ahung deujah jengin;

chuti ahijeh chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseitai, “Mipi lah a lamkai jouse hi puiyin lang, Pakai angsung laitah, nisa noiya khun abonchauvin gakhaiyin, chuti hen lang hileh Pakai lungsatna nasatah hi Israel chunga kona kitol mang thei ding ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Mose’n jong Israel thutan vaihom ho jah a aseiyin, “Nang ho amitakip chun koi koi hijeng jongleh midangto Peor muna Baal houkhom tapou chu thatdoh jenguvin,” atitai.

Hiche lai hin vetan, Israel chate lah a konin mi khat hin, amaho kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula anaka kapet tah uvin, Mose le Israel chate khoppi pumpi mitmu chang tah-in Midian mi numei khat hi ainsunga ahin kipui lutjengin ahi.
Chutah chun Aaron thempupa chapa, Eleazar chapa, Phinehas kitipan athilbol chu amudoh phat’in akipatdoh jengin, khoppi kikhom chu adalhan, akhut’in tengcha khat akidop’in,

Israel mi pasal pa nung ajui lut’in ainsung dan sung nunga ajuilut pai tai, chuin anigel lhonin, Israel mi pasal pa chuleh numei nu chu tengchan athil mat jengin, numeinu dap kah laitah a akilbeh den jengin ahi. Hichun Israel chate lah a, analang gamna hise chu atang hel tai.
Ahivangin hiche kah le len mihing sang som ni le sang li jen gamna hise lang chun ana that gamtan ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hi tin ati:

“Aaron them pupa chapa, Eleazar chapa Phinehas chun Israel chate lah a konin keima lungsatna asutang lel tai, ajeh chu keima Israelte lah a katom ngai bang bangin ama jong tom ngai tah-in anapangin, hijeh chun ken jong katom ngai jeh hin Israel chate abonchan kabah gam hel tapoi.
Chuti ahijeh-in Phinehas jah a seipeh-in lang hin, ama chu keiman, keima chamna dinga kakitepna chu kapei;

hiche hi ama le ama nunga ason achilhah te dinga thempu ahina diuva abei thei louhel kitepna hi ding ahitai; ipijeh-inem itileh ama hi a-Pathen dingin tom ngai tah-in anapangin, hijeh chun Israel chate thoidamna atoh doh peh tai,” ati.
Midian numei nu toh kitha tha Israel mi pasal pa min chu Zimri akitin, Salu chapa anahi; ama jong hi Simeon chate lhah lah a pajang khat lhah-a ainsunga mi upa khat anahi.
Chule Midian numei akithat nu chu amin Cozbi akitin, Zur kitipa chanu anahi; Zur jong hi Midian gama pajang khat lhah lah a mi upa khatma anahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:
“Midian mite hi bolgimin lang abonchauvin jep chah jengin;

ijeh-inem itileh amahon jong nang ho lungtnim thima nabol gentheiyuva, Peor muna thusoh chung changa nalungthim bol uva, Peor muna gamna hise ahung lan laiya anakithat nu, asopi nuu, Midian lengpa chapa khat chanu Cozbi chung changa jong nalungthim bol jengu ahi,” ati.
Gamna hise alan nungin Pakaiyin Mose jah le thempupa Aaron chapa Eleazar jah a thu ahinseiyin hi tin ati;
“Israel chate khoppi pumpi hi ama ama pajang lhah cheh le aphung khai khaiyin, mihem kum som nia lhah chung lam gal kon thei cheh simdoh lhon temin,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose le thempupa Eleazarin jong Moab phaicham dung, Jordan vadung, Jerichoa chun Israelte akihoupi lhonin hitin asei lhone;
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bangin, “Kum som nia lhah chunglamse se Israel chate mijat sim temuvin,” ati lhone. Hichea Egypt gama kona hung kitoldoh Israel chate chu hicheng hi ahiuve:
Israel cha apeng masa atahpen Reuben ahin, Reuben chate chengse chu: Hanoch ahin, chule Hanoch chate insung toh ahin; Pallu ahin, Pallu chate insung toh ahi;
Hezron ahin, Hezron chate insung toh ahi; Carmi ahin, Carmi chate insung toh ahi.
Hichengse hi Reuben chate insungse se ahiuvin, amijat mong mongu sang som li le sang thum toh, ja sagi le somthum alhinguve.
Chule Pallu chate lah a Eliab jong ahi.

Eliab chapate chu Nemuel le Dathan toh chule Abiram ahiuvin, amaho hi khoppi lah a lhendoh ho chu ahiuve; chujongle amaho hin Korah chutoh kiloiyuva Mose le Aaron douna thil anabol’uva, hitobanga hi Pakai douna geiya anaboldoh sau ahi;

hijeh chun leiset ahung kamkan amaho hi Korah toh a val lhum thatai; hiche ho loi athipet hin mei ahung deujah jengin mihem ja ni jen jong anakavam tai; hijeh chun amaho hi miho kihilnan a pang khauvin ahi.
Ahinla Korah chapate chu anathi pouvin ahi.

Ama ama insung dungjui cheh a akisima ahileh Simeon insungse se chu hicheng ahi: Nemuel lhah ding chu, Nemuel chate insung ahin, Jamin kailhah chu Jamin chate insung ahi; Jachin kailhah ahileh Jachin chate insung chu ahin,
Zerah kailhah ahileh Zerah insung chu ahi; Shaul kailhah ahileh, Shaul chate insung ahi;
hicheng hi Simeon chate insung chengse ahiuvin, amijat sang som ni le sang ni toh ja ni alhinguvin ahi.

Ama ama insung dungjui cheh a akisim kit’a ahileh Gad chapate jong chu hicheng hi ahiuve: Zephon kailhah chu Zephon chate insung chu ahiuvin, Haggi kailhah ahileh Haggi chate insung chu ahiuve; Shuni kailhah ahiuva ahileh Shuni chate insung chu ahiye;
Ozni kailhah ahileh Ozni chate insung chu ahin, Eri kailhah ahileh, Eri chate insung chu ahiye;
Arod kailhah ahiya ahileh Arod chate insung chu ahin, Areli kailhah ahileh, Areli chate insung chu ahijenge;
hichengse hi ainsung dung juiyuva Gad chapate ahiuvin, amijat mong mongu ahileh sang som li le ja nga alhinguve.
Judah chapa teni chu Er le Onan ahilhonin, Er le Onan anigelin Canaan gamsunga athiden lhon tai.

Chujouva Judah chapate chu ainsung dungjuiyuva akisima ahileh hicheng hi ahiuve: Shelah kailhah ahiuva ahileh, Shelah chate insung chu ahin, Perez kailhah ahileh, Perez chate insung chu ahi; Zerah kailhah ahileh, Zerah chate in sung chu ahi;
chule Perez chapate chu hicheng hi ahiuve: Hezron kailhah ahileh, Hezron chate insung chu ahin, Hamul kailhah ahileh, Hamul chate insung chu ahiye.
Hicheng hi Judah insung kailhah jeng ahiuvin, amijat akisim dungjuiyin sang som sagi le sang gup toh, ja nga alhinguve.
Ama ama in sung dungjuiya akisima ahileh Issachar chapate chu hicheng hi ahiuve: Tola kailhah chu ahileh, Tola chate insung chu ahin, Puvah kailhah ahileh, Puvah chate insung chu ahi;
Jashub kailhah ahileh, Jashub chate insung ahin, Shimron kailhah ahileh, Shimron chate insung chu ahi;
hicheng hi Issachar insung jeng jeng ahiuvin, amijat akisim dungjuiyin sang somgup le sang li toh ja thum alhinguvin ahi.

Zebulun chapate chu ama ama insung dungjui cheh-in hicheng hi ahiuve: Sered kailhah ahileh, Sered chate insung chu ahin, Elon kailhah ahileh, Elon chate insung chu ahi; Jahleel kailhah ahileh, Jahleel chate insung chu ahi kit’in ahiye.
Hichengse hi Zebulun chate insungjeng jeng ahiuvin, amijat mong mongu chu akisimdoh dungjuiyin sang somgup le ja nga alhinguve.
Joseph chapate chu ama ama insung dungjui cheh-in hicheng hi ahiuve: Manasseh le Ephraim ahilhonin ahi.
Manasseh chapate chu hicheng hi ahiuve: Machir kailhah ahileh, Machir chate insung chu ahin, chule Machir hi Gilead hingpa apa anahi; Gilead kailhah ahileh, Gilead chate insung chu ahin,
chutengle hicheng hi Gilead chapate ahiuve: Iezer kailhah ahileh, Iezer chate insung chu ahin, Helek kailhah ahileh, Helek chate insung chu ahi;
chule Asriel kailhah ahileh, Asriel chate insung chu ahin, chule Shechem kailhah ahikit leh, Shechem chate insung chu ahi;
chujongle Shemida kailhah ahileh, Shemida insung chu ahin, chule Hepher kailhah ahileh, Hepher insung chu ahiye;
Hepher chapa Zelophehad chun chapa aneipon, chanu jeng bou ananeiye; chule Zelophehad chanute chu aminu Mahlah toh, Noah toh, Hoglah toh, Milcah toh chule Tirzah ahiuve.
Hichengse hi Manasseh insung mi jeng ahiuvin, amijat mong mongu chu akisimdoh dunguiyin sang som nga le sang ni toh ja sagi alhinguvin ahi.

Ephraim chapate chu ainsung dung juiyuva hicheng hi ahiuvin ahi: Shuthelah kailhah ahileh, Shuthelah chate insung chu ahin, Becher kailhah ahileh, Becher chate insung chu ahi; Tahan kailhah ahileh, Tahan chate insungma ahiye.
Chule Shuthelah chapate lah a Eran jong ahin, ama kailhah ahileh, Eran chate insung chu ahiye.

Hichengse hi Ephraim chapate insung jengjeng ahiuvin, amijat mong mongu chu akisimdoh dungjuiyin sang somthum le sang ni toh ja nga ahiuve. Hichengse se hi ama ama insung dungjui cheh a Joseph chapate jeng ahiuve.

Benjamin chapate jong chu ama ama insung dungjui cheh-in hicheng hi ahiuvin ahi: Bela kailhah ahileh, Bela chate insung chu ahin, Ashbel kailhah ahileh, Ashbel chate insung chu ahi; Ahiram kailhah ahileh, Ahiram chate insung chu ahin,
Shephupham kailhah ahileh, Shephupham chate insung chu ahi; Hupham kailhah ahileh, Hupham chate insung chu ahiuvin ahi.
Chule Bela chapa teni chu Ard le Naaman ahilhone; Ard kailhah ahileh, Ard chate insung chu ahin, Naaman kailhah ahileh, Naaman chate insung chu ahiye.
Hichengse hi ama ama insung dungjui cheh a Benjamin chapate jeng jeng ahiuvin ahi. Amijat mongu chu akisimdoh dungjuiyin sang som li le sang nga toh jagup alhinguve.
Ama ama insung dungjui cheh a hichegse hi Dan chapate insung jeng ahiuve: Shuham kailhah ahileh, Shuham chate insung chu ahin, hita hi hicheng hi ama ama insung dungjuiya Dan insung jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Shuham insung mite akisimdoh dungjuiyin amijat mong mongu sang somgup le sang li toh, ja li alhinguve.

Asher chapate chu ama ama insung dungjuiya hicheng hi ahiuve: Imnah kailhah ahileh, Imnah chate insung chu ahin, lshvi kailhah ahileh, lshvi chate insung chu ahi; Beriah kailhah ahileh, Beriah chate insung chu ahin,
chuJongle Beriah chapa teni jong chu khat Heber ahin, ama kailhah ahileh, Heber chate insung chu ahin, chule Malchiel kailhah ahileh, Malchiel chate insung chu ahi.
Chule Asher chanu chu amin Serah akitin ahi.
Hichengse hi Asher chapate insung jeng ahiuvin, amijat mong mongu akisimdoh dungjuiyin sang som nga le sang thum toh ja li alhingin ahi.
Naphtali chapate chu ama ama insung dungjuiyin hicheng hi ahiuve: Jahzeel kailhah ahileh, Jahzeel chate insung chu ahin, Guni kailhah ahileh, Guni chate insungchu ahi;
Jezer kailhah ahileh, Jezer chate insung ahin, Shillem kailhah ahileh, Shillem chate insung chu ahiye.
Hicheng hi ama ama insung dungjui cheh a Naphtali insung jeng ahiuvin, amijat mongu ahileh, sang som li le sang nga toh, ja li alhinge.
Israel chate mijat kisimdoh mong mong chu sang jagup le sang khat toh, ja sagi le somthum alhingin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Mihem hijat hi agam kihop peh a, amin jat dungjuiya agoulo ding cheh-uva kipe ding ahi.

Aphung len amitam phung chu nangman agoulo ding jong alen napeh ding, aphung lhom amilhom jong chu agoulo ding nalhompeh ding ahi; mi aphung dungjui, amihem jat dungjui cheh a agoulo ding gam kipesoh kei ding ahiuve.
Amavang gam hi vang kisana kihop ding ahibouve; apu apauva aphung min dungjui cheh-uva Israel chaten agou alosoh kei diu ahiye.
Aphung len le aphung neo kah a goulo ding chu vang kisana agoulo diu kihop peh ding ahi,” tin aseiye.

Hicheng hi ama ama insung dungjui cheh a kisimdohsa Levite ahiuve: Gershon kailhah ahileh, Gershon chate insung chu ahijengin Kohath kailhah ahileh, Kohath chate in sung chu ahijenge; Merari kailhah ahileh, Merari chate insung chu ahi.

Hichengse hi Levi insung jeng ahiuvin; hicheng chu Libni insung ahin, Hebron insung chu ahin, Mahli insung jong ahin, Mush insung ahin, chule Kohath insung jong ahiuvin ahi. Kohath hi Amram hingpa apa anahi.

Chule Amram jinu chu amin Jochebed ahin, Levi chanu ahi, hiche nu hi Egypt gamsunga Levin anahinsa ahitai; Jochebed hin Amram hitoh cha Aaron le Mose toh chule asopi lhon numei Miriam chu anahing lhonin ahi.
Chujongle Aaron jong hin cha Nadab le Abihu toh, Eleazar le Ithamar anahingin ahi.
Ahin Nadab le Abihu hin Pakai angsunga meikong theng louva ahou lhon jeh-in athi lhon tan ahi.

Abonchauva pasal lha khat lhingsa a pat chunglamse se akisimdoh dungjuiyin mihem jat sang som ni le sang thum alhinguve; ijeh-inem itileh amaho jong hi Israel chate lah a goulo ding kipe lou ahiuvin, hijeh a chu Israel chate lah a kisimtha louva achombeh a kisimdoh ahiuve.
Mi hichengse hi Moab phaicham dung, Jordan dung kom, Jericho gal a Israel chate mijat simtoh a pang teni Mose le Aaron thempupan anasimdoh lhon ahiuve.
Ahinla hijat pi hi khat’a khat cha jong Israel chate mijat simtoh a pang teni Mose le Aaron thempupan Sinai gamthip noiya Israel chate asimdoh lah a chun apang pon, akisimtha poi.

Ipijehinem itileh Pakaiyin ama ni jah a anaseiyin, “Amaho hi gamthip noiya thiden tei tei ding ahiuve,” a tin; hijeh chun Jepnunneh chapa Caleb le Nun chapa Joshua tailou mihem khat’a khat chajong ahingdoh a aum tapouve.

Zelophehad chanute chu ahung vah lut tauvin ahi. Zelophehad kitipa hi Manasseh chapa Machir ahin, Machir chapa Gilead ahin, Gilead chapa Hepher ahin, ama hi Hepher chapa chu ahi; chujongle Zelophehad kitipa hi Joseph chapa Manasseh phunga mi ahiye. Achanute min chu Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah chule Tirzah ahiuve.
Amaho hi kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula, Mose le Eleazar angsung, khoppi pumpi angsung lai tah a ahung dinguvin hitin aseiyuvin ahi,

“Keiho hingpa kapau chu gamthip noiya anathi tai; ahinla ama hi Korah loi le golte lah a anapanga, Pakai douna dinga ama cham chama hung kikhom ho lah a chun anapangpon, hiche loi le goI kiloi ho lah a hin analhapon ahi; hijongle ama hi ama le ama chonset jeh a bou anathi ahin, chapa beiyin anaum tan ahi.
Kapauvin chapa anei loujeh a ipi dinga ama insung mite lah a kona amin kisubeijeng ding hi tam? Kapau sopite lah a hin keiho jong goulo chan ding neipeuvin,” atiuvin ahi.
Mose’n jong amaho thusei chu Pakai angsunga ahinpo lut pai pai tan ahi.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin hitin ati:
“Zelophehad chanute thusei hi adih-in ahi; nangman amaho hi apau sopite lah a gou alo diu napeh mong mong ding, chule apau goulo ding chu amaho chunga nagal kaisah mong mong ding ahinai.
Chujongle Israel chate jah a chu nangman naseipeh a, ‘Ijemtia pasal khat tou athi tah a, ama chu chapa beiya auma ahileh nanghon ama gou chu achanu napeh son dingu ahi.
Chule athipa chun chanu jeng jong anei louva ahileh agoulo ding chu nang hon asopi pasal ho chu napeh dingu ahi.
Sopi pasal jeng jong anei kit louva ahileh, ama gou chu nanghon apa sopi pasal ho napeh jeng diu ahi.

Hichan geiya jong hi a pan jong sopi pasal anei louva ahileh agou chu nang hon aphung sunga amato kinaipen pen napeh diu ahin, akinaipipa chun agou alo jeng ding ahiye. Hiche dan hi Pakaiyin Mose athupehsa bang banga Israel chate dia chonna dan le chondan khat a kimang jing jeng ding ahi,’ tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mosejah a aseiyin, “Hiche Abarim molsang chunga khun kaltouvin lang, keiman Israel chate kapehsa gam khu gave temin.
Chule nangman agam khu namusoh tengle nasopipa Aaron bang banga nang jong namite achemsasa ho toh nakigop khom kit ding ahitai;

ipijehinem itileh Zin gamthip noiya khoppi pumpin kiphinna abol pet’uva keiman amaho mitmun keima kathendol chu phongjal lhonin, tia kaseipeh pet chun nang ninjong keima doumah nabol lhonin ahi,” ati. Adoumah bolna lhon chu Zin gamthip noi, Kadesh muna Meribah a twipi chu anahi.
Hichun Mose’n jong Pakai jah a aseiyin hitin ati:
“Pakai, tahsa a hing lhagao jouse Pathenin khoppi chunga lamkai dingin mihem khat hin lhengdoh hen,
ama chu mipi masanga pot le lut len pang hen lang, mipi puidoh le leh apuilut len pang hen; hita hi Pakai khoppi hi aching beiya kelngoi hon to bang ahilouna dinguvin,” ati.
Chuphat’in Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Achunga lhagao chengsa, Nun chapa Joshua hi nahenga koulut jengin lang achunga nakhut ngamin;
chujongle ama hi Eleazar thempupa angsung le khoppi pumpi angsunga dinsah denin, chujou tengleh amaho mitmun ama hi nangman thu neina napeh ding ahi.
Nangman ama hi natha neina nakihoppi ding ahin, chutengle Israel chate khoppi pumpin ama hi ajabol thei dingu ahiye.

Chule Joshua chu Eleazar thempupa angsunga ding ding, Eleazar-in ama dinga hi Pakai angsunga Urim amanchah a phun asanpeh ding ahi; ama thusah dungjuiya Israel chate hi abonchauva potle lut leuva ama jeng toh kilhon diu, khoppi pumpin athu angai diu ahi,” ati.
Mose’n jong Pakai thupeh bang bangin aboltai; aman Joshua apuiyin Eleazar thempupa leh khoppi pumpi angsunga adinsah-in,
chuin Joshua chunga akhut angamin, Pakaiyin Mose jah a ahinseisa bang bangin, athu neina jong apetai.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel chate hi thu pen lang ajah-uva hitin seipeh-in, ‘Kei dinga thilto, meiya gouvam thilto keima an neh ding, agimnam tuitah a kibol ding chu, nang hon aphat phat cha kahenga nahinto doh jing jeng diu ahi,’ tin seiyin.

Chujongle nangman amaho jah a naseipeh ding ahi, ‘Nang hon Pakai henga meiya govam thiltoa natodoh dingu hiche hi ahi : Nisim niseh a abei thei louhel ding thiltoa pang dia, kum khat lhingsa, nolnabei kelngoi achal ni natodoh jing jeng diu ahi.
Kelngoi khat chu jingkah lama natodoh ding, kelngoi khatma chu nilhah lam teng natodoh ding ahi;
chujongle lhosoh lhiltoa pang dia chang bong neldisel Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop khat le thaotwi kiheh lhasa Hin dim khat hopsoma hop li to kihalsa jong nato tha ding ahi.
Hiche thilto hi abei thei lou dinga pumgo thilto ahin, Sinai molsanga thupehsa ahi; chujongle Pakai henga agimnam tuitah hisah dinga meiya govam thilto dinga kigongsa ahitai.

Chutengle lengpitwi thiltoa todoh ding chu kelngoi khat cheh toh totha ding ahileh Hin dim khat hop lia hop khat to hitha ding ahi; muntheng lai tah a nangman hiche lengpitwi thilto, lengpitwi chih tah hi Pakai henga nasun lhah ding ahi.

Chule kelngoi khat joh jong chu nilhah lam teng leh natodoh kit ding ahin, jingkah lama kitoh doh lhosoh thilto kibol bang bang le lengpitwi thilto kibolna tobanga, nangman meiya govam thilto dinga natodoh a, Pakai henga agimnam tuitah hisah ding ahi.

“Cholngah nikho seh leh kum khat lhingsa cheh, kelngoi achal cheh ni, nol nabei kitoh doh a, lhosoh thilto dinga jong chang bong neldisel Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop khat thaotwi to halsa jong hiding, lengpitwi thilto jong hitha ding ahi;
tantih nei louva pumgo thilto kitoh leh lengpitwi thilto sim louva jong, hiche cholngah nikho jousea thilto ding chu ahiye.
“Kum sunga lha nasim pat nau lha patna a jong Pakaiya pumgo thilto nato diu ahin; kum khat lhingsa cheh, nolnabei bongchal gol ni leh kelngoi chal khat toh, kelngoi achal cheh sagi toh hi diu ahi.

Chujongle bongchal khat cheh to totha dinga hi lhosoh thilto ding chang bong neldisel Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop thum thaotwi to halsa hitha ding ahi; chule kelngoi chal khat to totha ding chu lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chang bong neldisel Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop ni, thaotwi to halsa hi ding;

chujongle kelngoi achal khat cheh chutoh totha dinga lhosoh thilto ding chang bong neldisel Ephah hopsoma hop khat thaotwi to halsa hi ding; hicheng hi agimnam tuitah hi dinga pumgo thiltoa man ding, Pakaiya meiya govam thiltoa pang ding ahiye.

Chule lengpitwi thiltoa todoh ding jong chu bongchal khat dinga lengpitwi Hin keh khat dim hiya, kelngoi chal to totha dinga Hin khat hop thuma hop khat hi ding, chule kelngoi khat to totha ding chu Hin dim khat hop lia hop khat hi ding ahi ; hicheng hi kum khat sunga kum lhung keiya lha seh a thilto, pumgo thilto ding chu ahi.
Chujongle Pakaiya chonset thilto dinga manchah ding chu kelchal khat hi ding; hiche jong chu tang louhela kitoh doh ji pumgo thilto le lengpitwi thilto kom ma ma a todoh ding ahi.
Lha masapen, nisom le ni li lhin ni hi Pakaiya kalchuh kut nikho ahi.
Chule hiche lha, nisom le ni nga lhin ni hi kut nikho ahi; ni sagi sunga cholsolou changlhah kine ding ahi.
Kut nikho masa ni leh kikhoppi theng kibol ding ahin, nang hon natoh hahsa natoh louhel diu ahi;

meiya govam thilto, Pakai dinga pumgo thilto joh nato diu ahi; hiche dinga hi bongchal gol ni le kelngoi chal khat toh, kum khat lhingsa cheh kelngoi chal jeng jeng sagi toh hitha ding ahi; hichengse hi nolnabei jeng hi diu ahiye;

chujongle hicheng hitoh totha ding hi lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chang bong neldisel thaotwi to halsa hi ding, Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop thum chu bongchal khat to nato thauva, kelngoi chal khat dinga Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop ni to nato tha diu ahi;
chujongle kelngoi achal khat cheh chutoh totha dinga Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop khat cheh to kelngoi achal sagia ding chu hi ding ahi;
chule nang ho dinga kithoidamna kin bolna dinga chonset thiltoa todoh ding kelchal khat jong hitha ding ahi.
Tantih nei louva kitohdoh pumgo thilto jingkah sim jingkah seh a kitoh doh pumgo thilto sim louva hichengse jong hi natodoh dingu ahi.

Ni sagi sunga chu hitobangma hi nabol jing jenguva, nisim niseh leh meiya govam anneh thilto, Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hisah dinga nato diu; hiche thilto jong hi tantih nei louva kitoh jing pumgo thilto leh lengpitwi thilto kitodohna koma chu totha tha ding ahiye.
Chule ni sagi lhin ni leh nang hon kikhoppi theng khat nakibol’uva hiche nikho chuleh natoh hahsa natoh louhel diu ahi.

“Nang hon ahapta ta a kut nabol’uva, Pakai henga lhosoh thilto changthah nahinto doh-uva, lhosoh ga masa nahinto doh nikhou jongleh kikhoppi theng khat nakibol diu ahin, hijeh chun natoh hahsa natoh louhel dingu ahi;

hisanga chu Pakai henga agimnam tuitah hisah dinga pumgo thilto natodoh joh diu ahi. Hichu bongchal gol ni toh, kelngoi chal khat le kelngoi achal ma ma sagi toh hitha ding ahin; kelngoi ho chu kum khat lhingsa cheh hi diu ahiye.
Chujongle lhosoh thiltoa totha ding chu bongchal khat dinga chang bong neldisel thaotwi to hal sa Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop thum thum hi ding, kelngoichal khat dinga chu hopsoma hop ni bou hi ding,
kelngoi sagi ho dinga chu khat khat dinga hopsoma hop khat khat bou hitha ding ahi;
chule nang ho thoidamna dinga kelchal jong hitha ding ahiye.
Tantih nei louva kibol pumgo thilto le lhosoh thilto kibol tai louva jong nang hon hicheng hi natouva, lengpitwi thilto jong natotha dingu ahi. Thilto chengse chu nolnabei hicheh ding ahiuve.
“Lha sagi lhin na, nikho masa ni leh nang hon kikhoppi theng khat nakibol’uva, natoh hahsa natoh lou diu ahi. Hiche nikho hi nang ho dinga sumkon kimut nikho hi ding ahiye.

Chutengle nang hon Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hisah dinga pumgo thilto nato diu ahin, hiche ho chu bongchal gol khat le kelngoi chal khat toh, kum khat lhingsa nolnabei cheh kelngoi chal jeng sagi toh hitha ding;
hicheng to totha ding lhosoh thilto ding hi bongchal dinga chang bong neldisel thaotwi to halsa Ephah khat hopsoma hop thum hi ding, kelngoi chal to totha ding ahileh Ephah hopsoma hop ni hi ding,
chujongle kelngoi achal sagi dinga chu khat khat to totha ding ahileh Ephah hopsoma hop khat khat hi ding ahiye;
nang ho kithoidamna dinga chonset thilto ding kelchal khat jong hi ding ahi.

Hichengse hi lhathah seh a pumgo thilto kitohdoh leh lhosoh thilto kitoh doh chengse, guitan louva kitohji pumgo thilto leh lhosoh thiltoa kitoh doh chengsejong, chujongle akito ding dol danthu kisem dungjuiya kitoh lengpitwi thilto ho hihen lang hijongle, Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hisah dinga meiya govam thilto kitoh chengse kalvala kitoh jing nalai ding ahiye.
“Hiche lha sagi lhin na, nisom lhin ni leh nang hon kikhoppi theng khat nakibol’uva, chule an na-ngol diu, natoh hahsa jong natoh thei lou diu ahi,
hisanga chu Pakaiya agimnam tuitah tah pumgo thilto natouva, bongchal gol khat le kelngoi chal khat toh, kum khat lhingsa, nolnabei kelngoi achal jeng jeng sagi jen toh natotha dingu ahin;

hicheng to kilhona hi lhosoh thilto jong chang bong neldisel thaotwi to halsa Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop thum chu bongchal khat dinga natouva, kelngoi chal toh totha dingjong Ephah khat hopsoma hop ni hi ding,
kelngoi achal sagi ho chu khat cheh to totha dinga Ephah khat hopsoma hop khat cheh hi ding ahi.
Chujongle kithoina chonset thilto le guitan louva pumgo thilto kitoh toh, lhosoh thilto le lengpitwi thilto kitoh kalvala jong chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat nato tha diu ahi.
“Lha sagi lhin na, nisom le ni nga lhin ni leh nang hon kikhoppi theng khat nakibol’uva, natoh hahsa jong natoh lou diu ahin, Pakaiya ni sagi sung leh kut khat nabol dingu ahiye;

chutengle nang hon Pakai dinga agimnam tui tah hisah dinga thilto nabol diu ahin, meiya govam thilto, pumgo thiltoa nato diu chu bongchal gol som le thum hi ding, kelngoi chal ni hi ding, kum khat lhingsa cheh, nolnabei jeng, kelngoi achal jeng jeng som le li hi ding ahi.

Chule hichengse toh todoh tha ding hi lhosoh thilto chang bong neldisel thaotwi toh halsa, bongchal som le thum ho khat cheh toh to tha ding chu Ephah dim khat hopsoma hop thum thum hi ding, kelngoi chal teni khat cheh to totha ding chu Ephah khat hopsoma hop ni ni hi ding,
chule kelngoi achal som le li ho khat cheh toh totha ding chu Ephah khat hopsoma hop khat cheh toh hitha ding ahi;
chujongle guitan louva pumgo thilto kitohji leh lhosoh thilto, lengpitwi thilto kalvala jong, chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat jong hi ding ahiye.
“Nikho ni alhin ni leh bongchal gol som le ni toh, kelngoi chal ni toh, kum khat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoi achal jeng jeng som le li toh,

chule adan kisem dungjuiya bongchal ho le kelngoi chal teni, keingoi achal ho chutoh totha ding jat atamle alhom dungjui cheh a hiya, lhosoh thilto le lengpitwi thilto toh kilhon tha cheh ding ahiuve;
chujongle guitan louva pumgo thilto kitoh le lhosoh thilto toh chule lengpitwi thilto kitoh kalvala jong, chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat jong hinalai ding ahiye.
“Nithum lhin ni leh bongchal som le khat hi ding, kelngoi chal ni hi ding, kum khat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoi achal jeng jeng som le li hi ding,
chule adan kisem dungjuiya bongchal ho le kelngoi chal teni, chule kelngoi achal ho toh totha ding ajat atam le alhom dungjuiya lhosoh thilto ding leh lengpitwi thilto ding jong hitha cheh ding ahi;
chujongle guitan louva pumgo thilto kitoh le lhosoh thilto le lengpitwi thilto kitoh kalvala jong chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat hinalai ding ahiye.
“Ni li lhin ni leh bongchal som hi ding, kelngoi chal ni hi ding, kum khat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoi achal jeng jeng som le li hi ding,

chule adan kisem bang banga, bongchal ho le kelngoi chal teni toh totha ding, chujongle kelngoi achal ho toh totha ding chu ajat atam le alhom dungjuiya lhosoh thilto ding le lengpitwi thilto ding jong hitha cheh ding ahi;
chujongle guitan louva pumgo thilto kitoh le lhosoh thilto le lengpitwi thilto kitoh kalvala jong chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat jong hitha ding ahi.
“Ni nga lhin ni leh bongchal ko hi ding, kelngoi chal ni hi ding, kum khat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoi achal jeng jeng som le li hi ding,

chule adan kisem bang banga bongchal ho le kelngoi teni toh totha ding, kelngoi achal ho toh totha ding chu ajat atam le albom dungjuiya lhosoh thilto ding le lengpitwi thilto ding jong hitha cheh ding ahi;
chujongle tang louhela pumgo thilto kitoh le lhosoh thilto toh, lengpitwi thilto kitoh kalvala jong chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat jong hinalai ding ahi.
“Nigup lhin ni leh bongchal get hi ding, kelngoi chal ni hi ding, kum khat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoi achal jeng jeng som le li hi ding,

chule adan kisem bang banga bongchal ho le kelngoi chal teni toh totha ding, kelngoi achal ho toh totha ding chu ajat atam le alhom dungjuiya lhosoh thilto ding le lengpitwi thilto ding jong hitha cheh ding ahi;
chujongle tang louhela pumgo thilto kitoh le lhosoh thilto toh, lengpitwi thilto kitoh kalvala jong chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat jong hitha ding ahi nalaiye.
“Ni sagi lhin ni leh bongchal sagi hi ding, kelngoi chal ni hi ding, kum khat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoi achal jeng jeng som le li hiding,

chule adan kisem bang banga bongchal ho le kelngoi chal te ni toh totha ding, kelngoi achal ho toh totha ding chu ajat atam le alhom dungjuiya lhosoh thilto dingle lengpitwi thilto ding jong hitha cheh ding ahi;
chujongle tang louhela pumgo thilto kitoh le lhosoh thilto toh, lengpitwi thilto kitoh kalvala jong chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat jong hitha ding ahi.
“Niget lhin ni vang leh nang hon khoppi theng khat nakibol’uva, natoh hahsa jong natoh lou diu,

hisanga chu Pakaiya agimnam tuitah hisah dinga meiya kigouvam pumgo thilto natouva, hichu bongchal khat toh, kelngoi chal khat toh, kum khat lhingsa nolnabei kelngoi achal jeng jeng sagi toh nato diu,
chule adan kisem bang banga bongchal ding le kelngoi chal ding chule kelngoi achal ho toh totha ding chu ajat atam le alhom dungjuiya lhosoh thilto le lengpitwi thilto toh natotha cheh diu ahi;
chujongle tang louhela kitoh pumgo thilto leh lhosoh thilto chule lengpitwi thilto kalvala jong chonset thilto dinga kelchal khat jong natotha diu ahi.

“Kithensona thilto nato dingjouseu leh deichom thilto nato ding jouseu, napumgo thilto diu leh nalhosoh thilto dingjouseu, nalengpitwi thilto dingjouseu chule chamna thilto nato ding jouseu kalvala jong nang hon aphat kitepsa kut kibol ho hi ahung lhun teng leh thilto hijat hi Pakaiya nato diu ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin Mose’n jong thil ijakai abonchan Israel chate aseipeh soh keiyin ahi.
Mose’n Israel chate phung upa ho jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati: “Hiche hi Pakai thupeh ahi.

Pasal khat touvin Pakai henga kitepna abola akitep ham, ahiloule ama le ama kikanna dinga kihahsel abol ham ahiya, ama le ama thil khat man dinga akitundoh tah a ahileh, aman aseisa chu asuh keh thei lou ding ahi; akamsunga potdoh athusei bang banga aman aboldoh tei tei ding ahiye.
Ahilou jongle numei khat touvin akhangdon lai, apa insunga achen laiya Pakai henga kitepna khat abola akitep’a ama le ama thil man dinga akitundoh tah a ahileh,

hichea hi numei nu kitepna, ama le ama thil man dinga akitundohna akitepna hi aseipet tah a a pan jong ajahsa ahiya chule apan imacha asei lou ahiya ahileh, hiche numeinu kitepna chu dingjing ding, chule ama le ama akipeh doh a thil man dinga akitunna jong chu keh thei louhel ding ahi.

Ahin numeinu kitepna chu apan ajah doh ni ni leh aphatsah louna aphondoh a ahileh, amanu kitepna, thilman dinga akitun dohna chu khat’a khat cha jong ding thei louhel ding ahi; a pan ajah da jeh a hiche numei nu hi Pakaiyin angaidam jeng ding ahi.
Chujongle numeinu hin geltoh det det louhel a amoh seidoh jenga kitepna abol a ama le ama akikan chah a, chule hiche kitepna aum laiya hi pasal khat tou toh akichen khah a,

ajipan jong akitepna chu ajah doh a, hiche ajah doh nikhoa chu imacha seilouva auma ahileh, amanu kitepna chu ding jingin tin, chule amanu ama le ama akikana thilman a akitun najong chu keh thei louhel ding ahi.

Amavang ajipan akitepna ajah doh ni ni chuleh aphatsah louna thu aphondoh a ahileh, chutengle ajipan ajinu kitepna, lung geltoh det det louva akamsunga ana sodoh-a ama le ama akikanna achunga apoh jing chu asuhnam peh a ahile, chujou tengleh Pakaiyin hiche numei chu angaidam ding ahi.
Ahin ito bang hijongle meithaisa le akidasa numei kitepna vang chu, ama le ama kigahsa ahitan, keh lou hel ding amanu douna kilang jing ding ahi.
Chule numei chu ajipa insunga aum pet a kitepna khat touva akitep’a, ahiloule thilman khat touva ama le ama akitundoh jenga kihahselna abol a,

athilbol hi ajipan jong ajah nah a, ahivanga ajinu chu phoh louva auma ajah da louva ahileh, amanu kitepna jouse aboncha ding jing ding, chule ama le ama thilman dinga akitundoh a akikanna chu keh thei louhel ding ahiye.

Amavang ajipan ajah doh ni ni leh athilbol jouse chu sunam jeng hen lang subei jeng taleh, ipi hijongle amanun akamsunga asodoh chan akitepna jouse le ama le ama thilman dinga akitundohna chu ding thei lou ding ahitai; ajipan aboncha chu asuhbei ahitan, Pakaiyin numeinu chu angaidam jeng ding ahi.
Numei gentheina dinga kitepna hihen lang kihahselna hijongle ajipan aphudet peh thei ding, suh jong asuh mang peh thei ding ahi.

Hijeh a hi ajipan ajah doh nikho le imacha asei louva ahileh anumeinu chunga beh jing akitepna jouse leh thilmana akitundohna jouse chu aphudet peh ahitai; hiche ho hi ajah doh nikhoa imacha asei lou jeh a athilbol ho chu aphudet peh ahitan ahi.
Ahin ajipan hiche ho hi ajah doh teng asuhnal a asuh beipeh a ahileh, chuphat le ajipan ajinu themmona apoh hu peh ahitai,” ati.
Hiche hi Pakaiyin Mose henga pasal khat le ajinu kah a achondan lhon ding leh mipa le achanu anu ngah lai, apa insunga achen laiya akah lhona amanchah lhon ding chondan hi dinga anathupeh ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose henga thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Midian mite chunga khun Israel chate hi lolhing set’in phu lahsah temin; hichejou chuleh nangma jong namite athisa ho toh nakigop pai pai ding ahitai,” ati.

Hijeh chun Mose’n jong mipi jah a aseipeh-in hitin ati: “Midian mite nagasat’uva, hiche Midian mite chunga hi Pakai phu nalah thei tei tei na diuva, nang ho lah a mi phabep beh hin galvon manchah nakipat diu ahi.
Gal kon dinga hi nang hon Israel phung tin a kona mi nadon khom’uva sepai sang khat cheh nasol diu a hi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Israel mi asang sang lah a konin phung khat cheh a mi sang khat cheh adong khom’uvin, galsat dingin mi sang som le sang nin manchah akipat soh kei tauvin ahi.
Hitobang hin amaho galsat din asolin, phung khat’a kona mi sang khat cheh le Eleazar them pupa chapa Phinehas toh, munthenga kimang bubel ho le mut ging din akhut’a sumkon phabep toh akichoiyun ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin amahon Midian mite asat’uvin, pasal jouse athat gam tauve.

Mi atha lah-uva hin Midian mite lengho jong a that tauve, leng atha chengseu chu Evi to, Rekem to, Zur le Hur chule Reba ahiuvin, Midian mite leng nga jen alhinguvin ahi; chujongle Israelten Beor chapa Balaam jong chu chemjamin asat lih tauvin ahi.
Chujongle Israel chaten Midian mi numei ho leh achasen u gal hingin ahin kaiyui. Agancha jouseu, akelngoi hon jouseu chule athilkeo jouseu abonchan ahinchom gamsoh hel’uvin ahi.
Midian mite chenna khopi jouse leh ngahmun asem jouseu abonchan meiyin ahalvam hel’uvin,
athil suhset’u leh mihem le gancha agom gomin akichom gamsih seh jenguvin ahi.

Hichun sepai hon gal hing akaiy u le athil chomdoh jouseu, chule agal thil chom hou abonchan Mose heng le Eleazar thempupa heng chule Israel chate khoppi pumpi henga chun ahin choiyun, Moab phaicham dung, Jordan vadung pang, Jerichoa ngahmun asem nauva ahinpo lut soh hel tauvin ahi.
Mose le Eleazar thempupa toh, chule khoppi lamkai chengse chu ngahmun polama sepaiho chutoh gakimuto dingin, alamto din achedoh tauve.
Hichea chun Mose jong sepai vaipote chung, asang sang chunga thunei ho le jakhat khat chunga thunei ho, agalsat nauva kona hung kile kit ho chunga chun alung hang behseh jeng tan ahi.
Hiti hin Mose’n ajah-uva aseitai, “Ipi ding pen tah a nang hon numei ho hi nahing hoiyu ham?

Hiche numei ho tah tah ahiuve, ven, Balaam hilguh dungjuiya Peor chung chang thudola Israel chate abonchauva Pakai hot lam tah a achonsah jenguva, hijeh a chu Pakai khoppi mite chunga gamna hise analang ah ahiye.
Chuti ahijeh chun tun jong naosen nahin poh lah-uva pasal jouse that doh jenguvin lang, chule pasal to lumkhoma kitimatsa numei jouse jong thatdoh jenguvin.
Amavang numei goldong ho, pasal to lumkhoma kitimatpi na nei loulai ho chu nang ho din kihing hoi tauvin.

Chuteng le nang ho hi koi koi hijeng jong leu chun gala mi thatse se leh thilong tongkha chan chu, ni sagi sunga ngahmun polama ngahmun chom nakisem uva, nang ho le nang ho jong chule gal hinga nahinkai jouseu jong nithum lhin ni le ni sagi lhin nia nakisuh theng diu ahi.
Nang hon ponsil jouse jong, savuna kisem thil ijakai jong, kelmula kisem jouse jong, chule thing manchah jouse jong nasuh theng soh kei diu ahi,” ati.
Eleazar thempupan jong sepai gala kon ho jah a aseiyin, “Pakaiyin Mose athupehsa danthua chondan kisem chu hiche hi ahiye:
sana le dangka, sum-eng, thih, tin chule hahngeh seh seh bou ahin,

thil ipi hijongle meikah mang thei lou thil ho chubou meiya naleovuva chutengle theng thei ding ahi. Hita jongle athil chu theng lou kisuh thengna twiya kisap theng ding ahi; chujongle meiya leogim thei lou akavam thei thil ho chu ipi pi hijongle twiya nade lhah diu ahi.
Ni sagi lhin ni leh nang hon naponsil jouseu nakisop ngim tei tei diu, chuteng le nathen diu bou ahi; chujou tengle ngahmun sung lama nahung thei diu ahitai,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:
“Nangma nahin Eleazar thempupa ahin, chule khoppi sunga pajang lhah cheh a phung lamkai chengse chutoh gal a ahin chomdoh sau mihem le gancha chu abonchan simtoh tem’uvin;
chule gal a kichomdoh thil chu hop nin homin lang, gal a kon sepai gal hat ho chan khat pen, chule khoppi pumpi chu chan khat chansah-in.
Chule gal a gakon sepai ho lah a konin jong Pakai ding kai dongin lang mihem jong bongchal jong, sangan ho jong chule kelngoi hon ho jong ja nga lah a konin khat cheh ladoh jengin;
hicheng lahdoh ding hi sepai ho chan lah a kona lah doh ding ahin, Pakaiya thilto dinga Eleazar thempupa chu kipe ding ahi.

Chujongle Israel chate chan lah a kona jong mihem hihen lang bongchal ho hileh, sangan ho jong, kelngoi hon ho jong chule gancha jouse jong som nga lah a kona khat cheh lah a hicheng chu Pakai houbuh kinbola lhacha pang Levi ho napeh ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin Mose le Eleazar thempupan abol lhon tai.
Gal a kon sepai hon ahin chomdoh sau gal thil abonchan kelngoi sang jagup le sang som sagi le sang nga toh,
gancha dang jong sang som sagi le sang ni toh,
sangan sang somgup le sang khat toh,
mihem chu numei pasal to lumkhoma kitimatna neilou laihel abonchan sang somthum le sang ni alhinguvin ahi.
Chujongle gal a kon sepaite chan ding chu ajat kelngoi sang jathum le sang som thum le sang sagi toh ja nga ahin,
hiche lah a Pakai chan ding chu kelngoi jagup le som sagi le nga alhingin ahi.
Sepai ho chan ding bong jat chu sang som thum le sang gup alhingin, hiche lah a Pakai chan ding som sagi le ni ahi.
Sepai ho chan ding sangan sang som thum le ja nga alhingin, hiche lah a Pakai chan ding somgup le khat ahiye.
Sepai ho chan ding mihem chu sang som le sang gup ahin, hiche lah a Pakai chan ding chu mihem som thum le ni ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin Mose’n jong Pakaiya thilto ding achanlom kai chu Eleazar thempupa apedoh tan ahi.
Gal a kon sepaite chan lah a kona Israel chate chan dinga akeh khat Mose’n achom khendoh kit chu ahileh,
hiche khoppi chan dinga kikhendoh akeh khat chu kelngoi sang ja thum le sang som thum le sang sagi toh, ja nga alhingin,
bong sang somthum le sang gup alhingin,
sangan sang somthum le ja nga alhingin,
mihem jeng jeng sang som le sang gup alhingin ahi.

Hiche Israel chate chan akeh khat’a kon hin Mose’n jong aladoh kit’in, Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin, mihem hihen lang gancha hileh som nga lah a konin khat cheh alan, hiche ho chu Pakai houbuh a kinbol lhacha pang Levi ho apetai.
Chujouvin galsat sepai asang sang chunga vaipote, asang sang lamkai ho le aja ja lamkaiha chu abonchauvin Mose henga ahung nailut’uvin,
chule hiche sepai lamkai ho hin Mose jah a aseitauve, “Nalhacha pang keihon keiho thu neina noiya um galsat mite hi kasimsoh keiyun, mihem khat’a khat cha jong keiho lah a alhasam aumpai.

Keihon Pakaiya thilto din mihem ama ama cheh-in athil mudoh cheh chu sana a kisem thil manchah chaokol ho jong, chaojang ho jang, mohar namna khutjem ho jeng jong, bilba ho ahin, khivui ho ahin, Pakai angsunga keiho le keiho kithoidamna dingin kahin choitauve,” tin aseiyun ahi.
Hichun Mose le Eleazar thempupan sepai lamkaihoa konin sana le athil choiyu abonchan akilah lhon tai.

Hichea Pakai henga thiltoa ama nin atodoh lhon chu sana jeng jeng abonchan shekel sang som le sang gup toh ja sagi le som nga alhingin, aboncha hi sepai lamkai, asang sang chunga thu nei ho le aja ja chunga thu nei hon atou ahi.
Gal a kon sepai jousen ama ama chan ding cheh thil akilah sau jong ahi.

Mose le Eleazar thempupan sepai asang sang chunga thu nei lamkai hoa kon leh aja ja chunga thu nei lamkai hoa konin sana chujat chu ala lhonin, Pakai angsunga Israel chate gel doh jinga aum a suhmil ahilouna dingin kikhopna ponbuh sunga ahinpo lut lhon tai.
Reuben chate le Gad chaten bong hoitah tah hon tampi anavul uvin ahi. Amahon Jazer gam le Gilead gam amudoh phat’uvin, vetan, hiche mun hi bong vahna ding mun mong mong ahitai.
Hijeh chun Gad chate leh Reuben chate jong Mose heng le Eleazar thempupa heng chule khoppi lamkai ho henga ahunguvin ahung seiyun hi tin atiuve:
“Atarath le Dibon, Jazer, Nimrah, Heshbon, Elealeh, Sebam, Neba chule Beon,
Pakaiyin Israel khoppi mitmu tah a asuhmang hiche ho gam hi, bong vahna ding gam mong mang ahin, chule nalhacha pang keiho hin bong jeng jeng kaneiyun ahi,” atiuvin;
chujongle amahon aseiyun, “Nangma mitmua keihon nalung katouva ahileh, hiche gam hi nalhacha keiho kachenna diuvin neipeu vin lang, Jordan vadung gal a neipui galkai da jenguvin,” atiuve.
Ahinla Mose’n Gad chate le Reuben chate jah aseiyin, “Nasopiteu galsat a kona nang ho hikoma hi natou thip beh diu hi tam?
Pakaiyin amaho apehsa gamsunga lut dinga gal lam agalkai diu chu nang hon ipibola alungthimu nasuh doi peh diu ham?
Napa teuvin jong Kadesh barnea kona gam vea kanasol chun hitobang hin anabol’uvin ahi.
Amaho chu Eshcol phaicham geiyin achetouvun ahileh agamsung chu amutauvin, hijeh chun Pakaiyin apehsau gamsunga achelutna dinguvin Israel chate lungthim anasuh doipeh jeng theiyun ahi.
Hiche nikho chun Pakai lunghan ahung deujah jengin, hijeh chun Pakai jong akihahselin aseitai,

“Itin itijong leh Egypt gama kona hung kitoldoh miho, kum som nia lhah chung lamse se, mihem khat’a khat chan jong Abraham le Isaac chule Jacob peh dinga kakitepnasa gamsung chu amu louhel diu ahi; ipijeh-inem itileh amahon keima nung bulhing set’ in eijui tapouve;
Keniz mi Jephunneh chapa Caleb le Nun chapa Joshua tailou adang koimachan amu lou diu ahi, ama ni vang hin Pakai nung lhingset’a anajui lhon ahiye,” ati.

Hiti hin Israel chunga Pakai alung hang jah jengin, hijeh chun aman Israelte chuche khang mite, Pakai mitmu chang tah a thilse bol chengse athigam hel kah seuvin, kum som li sungin gamthip noiya ava le le sah tan ahi.
Chule vetan, nang ho jong napu napateu khelma man chonse sona peng chonse nahiuvin, Israel chunga Pakai lunghan nasatah pi chu akhoh cheh a bolsah be nah lai din nagouve ong!

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai nung najui nauva kona nang ho nakihei manguva ahileh aman miho hi gamthip noiya don lou dai louvin koi kit’in tin, hita hi nang hon hiche mite manthahna naboldoh peh tei tei diu ahiye,” ati.

Chuin Gad le Reuben chate chu Mose henga ahung kikhin lut jenguvin aseitauve; “Hikoma hin keihon kakelngoi hon kanei chengseu dingin kelngoi hong tampi sempeh uving tin, kachasen jouse diuvin jong khopi phabep sah peh uvinge;

ahin keiho vang manchah kipat cheh a Israel chate masanga gal lamkaiya panga, amaho ding jong chen mun kamupeh masang seuva pang dia kigosa kahiuve; agamsunga chengte jeh a hibou keiho nunao chapangte hi kulpi kaikhumsa khopi dunga umsah ding katiu ahibouve.
Israel chate hin amichang cheh jong agoulo ding chen mun khat cheh achenpha masang seuva keiho ka-inlam’uva kahung kile kit louhel diu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh hiche Jordan vadung gal lang khat gamsunga hi keihon amaho hitoh gou kalo khom thei lou dingu ahi, ajeh chu hiche niso lam Jordan vadung gal lam sang hi keiho goulo dinga hung umdoh khah ah ahitai,” atiuve.
Chuphat’in Mose’n jong ajah uva aseiyin, “Nang hon hitobanga hi nabol diu ahiya, manchah nakipat chehuva Pakai angsunga gal sat dinga nakon cheh theiyuva,
chujongle nang ho gal manchah kipat jouse Jordan vadung nagal kaisoh keiyuva, Pakaiyin amasanga amelmate adelmapg hel kah a ama angsunga gal nasat jing theiyuva,

chuta chu Pakai angsunga agam hi thua akinunsah theiya ahi phat tengleh, nang ho jong Pakai ding le Israel dinga kigahna jousea na onthol diu, nahung kinung le kit thei diu ahin, chuphat leh hiche gamsung hi Pakai angsunga nang ho chen mun ding hinante.
Amavang hita hi nabol lou vangu leh vetan, nang ho jong Pakai douna chonse nahiuve; chule hiche nachonset nau hin nang ho nahin holdoh tei tei diu ahi, ti kihet them cheh-uvin.
Nanu nao chapangte diuvin khopi phabep sah peh-uvin lang nakelngoite diuvin jong kelngoi hong tampi sempeh-uvin, ahin nakitepna vang chu nabol tei tei dingu ahiye,” ati.
Hitah chun Gad chate leh Reuben chaten Mose jah a aseiyuvin, “Kapu uvin nathupeh bang banga nangma lhacha ho hin kabol jeng diu ahi.
Kachasen jouseu le kaji teu, kakelngoi jouseu, chule kabong hon jouseu abonchan Gilead khopi dunga hin umden jengin tin;
kapun thu nalhah sah bang bang hin, nalhacha cheng, gal manchah kipat jouse hi Pakai angsunga gal sat dingin Jordan vadung gal kaisoh kei ding ahi,” atiuve.
Hichun Mose’n jong amaho chung chang thudola hin Eleazar thempupa le Nun chapa Joshua ahin, Israel chate aphung jouseuva apajang lhah cheh a phung upa lamkai jouse henga thu apetai.

Hiti hin Mose’n amaho jah a anaseiyin, “Hiche Gad chate le Reuben chate hi gal manchah kipatse se Pakai angsunga gal sat dinga nang ho Jordan vadung agal kai soh keiyuva, chule namasanguva agam hi thua akinunsah jeng theiya ahileh, nang hon amaho hi hiche Gilead gamsung hi achen mun diuva napeh jeng diu ahi;
amavang amaho hin gal manchah akipat’uva nang ho toh agal kai khom louvu leh, amahon jong Canaan gamsunga nang ho lah a chen mun anei diu ahi,” ati.
Hichun Gad chate leh Reuben chaten adonbut pai jenguvin hitin atiuve, “Nalhacha ho henga Pakaiyin asei bang banga keihon kabol jeng diu ahi.

Keihon gal manchah kipat’uving ting Pakai angsunga Jordan kagal kaiyuva Canaan gamsung kalut diu, keiho chenmun ding kagoulo diu vang chu keiho dinga Jordan gal lama anaum jing jeng ding ahi,” atiuve.

Mose’n jong amaho Gad chate, Reuben chate, Joseph chapa Manasseh phung akeh khat ho chu Amor mite lengpa Sihon leng gam le Bashan lengpa Og leng gam chu agamsung ahin, agamgi hop sunga khopi jouse le agamgi chin dunga khopijouse pum pumin apedoh tai.
Gad chaten khopi asah doh chengseu chu Dibon ahin, Ataroth ahin, Aroer ahin,
Atroth-shophan ahin, Jazer ahin, Jogbehah ahin,
Beth-nimrah le Bethharan ahin, khopi ho chu kul akaikhum’uvin chule kelngoite ding hongjong tam pi akaiyuve.
Chule Reuben chaten jong khopi Heshbon le Elealeh toh, Kiriathaim toh,
Nebo toh, chule Baalmeon toh asauvin ahi, aminu hi akikhel gam ahitai; chule Sibmah jong anasauve; amahon asah doh jousau khopi ho chu amin akheldoh soh tauve.
Hichun Manasseh chapa Machir chate chu akon’uvin Gilead agadel khum’uva ahileh ajouvun, alatauve; asunga anacheng Amor mite chu abonchan cheng mon alhauvin adeljam soh tauve.
Chuin Mose’njong Manasseh chapa Machir chu Gilead apetai; ama jong akhosunga acheng paitan ahi.
Chujouvin Manasseh chapa Jair jong akon kit’in akho neo dung dung jouse agalan, abonchan Jair ngahmun tin aminvo tai.
Hitobangma hin Nobah jong akonin Kenath khopi le akhoneo jouse abonchan agalan, ama min mong mong aputsah-in Nobah asah tai.
Israel chate hi Egypt gama kona ahonpiuva Mose le Aaron lamkaina noiya ahung kitoldoh-u hin akholjin dol-u aban banchan ahung umtou peh peh-in ahi.
Pakai thupeh a konin Mose’n jong ahung kipatdoh nau mun jouse aban banchan anajih lutsoh keiyin ahi; ahung kipatdoh nau mun kijih ho dungjuiya aban bancha ahung kitolnau hicheng hi ahi:

Lha masapen lha, chuche lha amasapen nisom le ni nga lhin nin Israel chate chu Rameses khopia konin ahung kipat doh-uvin, kalchuh kut kichai jouvin Egypt mite mitmu laitah-in sun laiyin galjo mindep’in ahung kijot doh tauve;
Egypt mite vangin anunguva achapa masau thi, Pakaiyin atha jouse chu akivui vui jenguvin; Pakaiyin Egypt mite milimdoi semthu ho chunga jong thu atan ahin, hitobanga hi soh ahi.
Hitobang hin Israel chate chu Rameses khopia konin ahung kipatdoh-uvin, Succoth muna chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngauve.
Succoth muna konin akipatdoh kit’uvin, gammang china um Etham kiti laiya chun ngahmun asemuvin aki-ngatauve.
Chuin Etham muna konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Baal-zephon niso lama um Pihahiroth lang anung jot kit’un, Migdol maiya ngahmun asemun akingauve.

Hahiroth maiya konin amaho akipatdoh kit’uvin gammang lah a twikhanglen lailung tah apal gal kaiyun, Etham gamthip noiya chun nithum sungin akijot jot jenguvin, chuin Marah kiti laiya chun ngahmun asem’uvin akingatauve.
Marah a konin jong akipatdoh kit’uvin Elim ahung lhung tauvin ahi; Elim muna hin twinah som le ni anaumin, tum phung som sagi anakeh-in, hikoma hin ngahmun asem’uvin akingauvin ahi.
Elima konin akipatdoh kit’uvin twikhanglen san panga ngahmun asemun aki-ngatauve.
Twikhanglen san panga konin akipatdoh’uvin Sin gammang noiya ngahmun asem kit’uvin akingauvin ahi.
Chuin Sin gammang noiya pat’in akipatdoh kit’uvin Dophkah kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-nga tauve.
Chule Dophkah kiti laiya konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Alush kiti laiya ngahmun asemun aki-nga kit tauve.
Alush muna kon jong chun akipatdoh pai kit’uvin Rephidim muna ngahmun asem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahileh, hikoma hin mipi don ding twi anaum tapoi.
Chuin Rephidim a konin akipatdoh’uvin Sinai gamthip laiya ngahmun akisem’uvin akingauvin ahi.
Sinai gamthip laiya konin jong akipatdoh kit’uvin Kibrothhattaavah kiti lai chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngauve.
Kibroth-hattaavah kiti laiya jong akipatdoh uvin Hezeroth a chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngauve.
Hazeroth a konin akipatdoh uvin Rithmah a chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngauve.
Rithmah a konin jong akipatdoh kit’uvin Rimmonperez kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Chule Rimmonperez kiti laiya konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Libnah a aki-ngauvin ngahmun akisemui.
Libnah a konin akipatdoh uvin Rissah a ngahmun akisemun akingauvin ahi.
Rissah a konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Kehelathali kiti laiya chun ngah-mun asemuvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Chuin Kehelathah a konin jong akipatdoh kit’uvin Shepher molsanga chun ngahmun asemuvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Shepher molsanga konin akipatdoh uvin Haradah kiti laiya ngahmun akisem’uvin akingauve.
Haradah a konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Makheloth kiti laiya chun ngahmun asem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Makheloth kiti laiya konin jong akipatdoh kit’uvin Tahath a chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Tahath a konin akipatdoh pai kit’uvin Terah a ngahmun asem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Terah a konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Mithkah a chun ngahmun asemuvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Mithkah a konin akipatdoh-uvin Hashmonah a ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngauve.
Hashmonah a konin akipatdoh-uvin Moseroth kiti laiya chun ngahmun asem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Chule Moseroth a akipatdoh-uvin Benejaakan kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin akingauvin ahi.
Chuin Benejaakan kiti laiya konin akipatdoh-uvin Hor-haggidgad kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngauve.
Hor-haggidgad a konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Jotbathah a chun ngahmun asem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Chule Jotbathah a konin akipatdoh uvin Abronah kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin akingauve.
Abronah a konin jong akipatdoh-uvin Ezion-geber kiti laiya chun ngahmun asem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Chuin Ezion-geber kiti laiya konin jong akipatdoh kit’uvin Zin gamthip noi, Kadesh kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngatauve.
Chuin Kadesh a konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Edom gamgi chin laiya Hor molsanga chun ngahmun asem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.

Pakai thusah a konin Aaron thempupa chu Hor molsang chunga akaltouvin, hikoma chun agathi den tan ahi; ama thi nikho chu Israel chate Egypt gama kona ahung kitoldoh kal’u kum som li lhin kum, lha nga lhin na, nikho masapen ni anahin ahi.
Hor molsang chunga athi chun Aaron akum jakhat le som ni le thum alhingtan ahi.
Canaan gamsung, Negeb a cheng, Canaan mi Arad lengpan Israel chate hung kitol thuthang ajatai.
Chuin Israel chate chu Hor molsanga konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Zalmonah kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-nga tauve.
Chuin Zalmonah a konin jong akipatdoh kit’uvin Punon a chun ngahmun asem’uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Punon a konin akipatdoh-uvin Oboth a chun ngahmun akisem uvin aki-ngauvin ahi.
Chule Oboth a konin akipatdohuvin Moab gamsunga lyeabarim kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin akingauve.
Chuin Iyim a konin akipatdoh kit’uvin Dibon-gad kiti laiya chun ngahmun asem’uvin aki-nga tauve.
Dibongad a konin akipatdoh-uvin Almondiblathaim kiti laiya chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-nga uvin ahi.
Almondiblathaim kiti lai a konin akipatdoh-uvin Nebo gal a Abarim molsang dunga chun ngahmun akisem’uvin aki-ngatauve.
Chuin amaho Abarim molsang dunga konin jong akipatdoh kit’uvin Moab phaicham dung, Jordan vadung pang, Jerichoa chun ngahmun akisem’uvin akinga tauve.
Jordan vadung pang Bethjeshimoth a pat’in Moab phaicham dung Abel-shittim geiyin ngahmun asem lhungpeh uvin ahi.
Moab phaicham dung Jordan vadung pang, Jerichoa chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang ajah-uva hitin seiyin, ‘Nang ho Jordan vadung nagal kaiyuva Canaan gamsung nalut tengu leh,

na-masanguva mite agamsunga cheng ho chu abonchauva nadel mang soh hel‘uva, song ajempah jouseu jong nasuh manguva, milimdoi kilhajol akoi jouseu jong nasuh mang peh diu, adoi hou nau munsang jouse jong nasuh phet peh-uva,
chule agamsung hi nalouva nachenpha jeng diu ahi; ajeh chu keiman agam hi nalodiuva kapehsa nahitauve.

Aphung phunga nachan soh kei diuva agam hi vang nasan’uva nakihop dingu; aphung len ami tam dinga agoulo diu gam len napeh uva, aphung neo milhom dinga agoulo dingjong gam neo napeh diu ahi; itobang lah hijongle mihem khat dinga aphun phatna chu chang jenga amaa hi ding, chule mi achan ding cheh chu napu napateu kailhah dungjuiya nakiban jop chet diu ahiye.

Ahin namasanguva agamsung mi agama chengte chu nadeldoh louvuva ahivang leh, hiche nachensah den chengseu hi nang ho mitmua thal le teng hem bang jinga, ling le khao to bang jing jeng ding ahin, nachen nau gamsunga amaho hin nasuh lung gim jing jeng diu ahi.
Chule ken jong amaho kabolna got bang a nangho joh kabol ding nahiuve,’ ati tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate chu thu pen lang ajah-uva hitin seipeh tan, Nang ho Canaan gamsung nahung lut tengu leh, hiche Canaan gam hi nang ho goulo dinga umah ahitan, Canaan apum, chang keiya ahi,
lhanglama nagamgiu hung kipatna hi Zin gammang ahung kipana Edom gamgi ahin juitou peh ding, hita hi lhang lama nagamgiu chu niso lama chi twikhanglen ki ngahna pat’a hung kitepan ding,

nagamgiu hin Akrabbim kumlhah na lam ajuisuh suh a Zin agoltan ding, chule gamgi topna chu Kadeshbamea lhanglam hi ding ahi; chujou tengle Hazaraddar geiya kilhung peh kit’a, Azmon jon ajuipai peh ding;
chule agamgi hi Azmon a pat’a kiheidoh kit’a Egypt vadung geiya kilhung lut peh ding, atopna hi twikhanglena kichai ding ahi.
“Nilhum lama nagamgiu vang twi khanglen lenpen pa hi pang jeng ding, atwikhanglen pang pang hi hipeh jeng ding ahi; hiche hi nang ho dinga nilhum lam gamgi hijeng ding ahitai.
“Chule sahlam gamkaiya nagamgiu chu hiche hi hi ding ahi: twikhanglen alenpa a pat’a gamgi namelchih pai peh uva Hor molsang geiya natedoh diu;
Hor molsanga pat gamgi aban bana namelchih peh kit’uva Hamath jot lutna geiya namelchih lut peh diu ahi; hita hi agamgi hi Zedad geiya kitekhong ding ahiye.
Chuti ahijeh a chu agamgi hi Ziphron geiya kikeh len a, Hazarenan kiti laiya hi kichai ding ahi; hichan gei hi sahlama nang ho gamgi hi ding ahitai.
“Niso lama nagamgiu chu Hazarenan a pat’a Shepham chan geiya natedoh diu a hi;
chujongle agamgi hi Shepham a pat Ain niso lama um Riblah kiti lai geiya kilhung suh pai ding ahin, chutengle agamgi hi niso lama Chinnereth twikhanglen pamchin geiya kilhung suh paipeh ding ahi.

Chujou teng agamgi chu Jordan vadung geiya kilhung suh suh a chi twikhanglen aphah teng leh bei ding ahitai. Gamgi hijat hin akol khuma akimvela kilhung matsoh hel, alailung hi nang ho gam hi ding ahi,’ tin aseiye tin lang seipeh tan,” atin ahi.

Mose’n jong Israel chate chu thu apen hitin aseiye: “Pakaiyin mi phung ko le phung keh khat peh ding ahi, tia athupehsa, nang hon phun phat le ph unset dungjuiya gouva nalo diu gam chu hiche hi ahitai.
Ijeh-inem itileh apajang lhahuva Reuben chate phung le apajang lhah mauva Gad chate phung chun agoulo diu gam akimu u ahitan, Manasseh phung akeh khat’in jong akimusa ahitai;
chuti ahijeh chun phung ni le phung keh khat’in nisa hung sodohna lam, Jordan gal niso lam Jericho khoa chu agoulo diu chan akimuu ahitai,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:
“Nang ho chan ding gam homa pang ding miho chu aminu hichengse hi ahiuvin ahi: Eleazar them pupa le Nun chapa Joshua toh hi ding ahin;
chule phung khat khat’a kona jong nang hon lamkai khat cheh, gam gouva nalo diu hom dinga nalhendoh diu ahiye.
Mi nalhendoh dingu chu amin hiche che ahiuve: Judah phunga ding Jephunneh chapa Caleb hintin,
Simeon chate phunga ding Ammihtid chapa Shemuel hi ding;
Benjamin phunga ding Chislon chapa Elidad hi ding ahi.
Dan chate phunga ding chu lamkai khat’a pangsa Jogli chapa Bukki hi ding;
Joseph chate lah a, Manasseh chate phunga lamkai ding chu Ephod chapa Hanniel hi ding ahi.
Ephraim chate phunga lamkai khat’a pang ding chu Shiphtan chapa Kemuel hi ding;
Zebulun chate phunga lamkai khat’a pang ding chu Parnach chapa Elizaphan hi ding ahi.
Issachar chate phunga lamkai khat’a pang ding chu Azzan chapa Paltiel hi ding;
Asher chate phunga lamkai khat’a pang ding chu Shelomi chapa Ahihud hi ding ahi.
Naphtali chate phunga lamkai khat’a pang ding chu Ammihud chapa Pedahel hi ding;
hitobanga chu Canaan gamsung Israel chaten gouva alo diuva gam homa pang dinga Pakaiyin thu apeh a anganse chu mihem hichengse hi hi ding ahiuve,” ati.
Moab gam phaicham dung Jordan vadung pang, Jericho khopia chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel chate hin amaho goulo achen nau gamsunga Levite chenna ding khopi phabep apehna diuvin thu pen lang, chujongle hiche khopi ho kim vel dunga hi Levi miten gancha avahna diu gam jong napeh dingu ahi.
Khopise se chu Levi mite chenna ding hintin, hamhing gamsungse se chu abonin hon teu neh ding le agancha jouseu kivah hingna ding hinante.
Nang hon Levite gancha vahna dinga hamhing gam napeh diu chu khopi pal kikaiya pat akimvel tong sang khat gamkol sung chu hitei tei ding ahi.

Hita hi nang hon khopi polam niso lam tong sang ni natedoh-uva, lhanglam jong tong sang ni ma natedoh diu, nilhum lam jong tong sang ni natedoh-uva, sahlam jong tong sang ni ma natedoh diu ahi; akimlai tah a hi khopi chu um ding ahin; chule akitedohsa khopi kimvel sungse chu Levite dinga akhopi dunguva chengte gancha vahna hamhing gama kihoipeh ding ahiye.

Nang hon Levite napeh diu khopi chu kiselna khopi kitisoh keiyin tin, ajat jong khopi gup lhing ding, hiche khopi gup sunga hi nang hon mithat ho najam lut sah-uva nakisel sah diu ahi; hicheng chunga hi khopi som li le ni napeh be kit diu ahinalaiye.
Levite napeh diu khopi hi abon bona khopi som li le get hi ding, akimvela hamhing gam toh hitha cheh ding ahiye.

Hicheng khopi hi Israel chate chenna gamsunga kona napeh doh diu ahijeh-in, aphung len amitam hoa kona natam lah-uva, aphung heo amilhom ho lah a kona nalhom lah diu ahi; min agoulo gam alet aneo dungjui cheh a chenpha agam chu Levite apeh soh kei ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang ajah-uva hitin seipeh tan, ‘Nang ho Jordan vadung nagal kaiyuva Canaan gamsung nalut tengu leh,
nang hon kiselna ding khopi phabep nakilhendoh masah-uva, gutupna beiya khutsoiya mihem that kha a aumtah a ahileh mithat pen pen chu hiche khopi dunga hi jamlut a kisel ding ahi.
Hiche khopi ho hi nang ho dinga phulah nom pa masanga kiselna khopia pang ding, mithat pen pen chu khoppi masanga athu akikhola akitan masanga moh a moh thi thei louhel ding ahi.
Nang hon natodoh diu khopi chu nakiselna diu khopi ahi cheh-in, ajat jong khopi gup hi ding ahiye.
Hiche kiselna khopia man dia hi Jordan vadung gal lang khat’a khopi thum natodoh-uva, lang khat ma khopi thum ma natodoh diu ahi, khopi thum chu Canaan gam sung hi ding ahi.

Hicheng khopi gup hi Israel chate dinga jong, kholgam mi le alah-uva hung khopem mi dinga jong kiselna khopi hi cheh ding, mihem koi koi hijongle gutupna beiya khutsoiya mithat aumtah a ahileh, ama chun hiche khopi ho hi jamlutna anei thei cheh ding ahi.
“Koi hile mithat chun amitha chu thih manchah aman a asat lup jenga chule athapa jong chu athidel jenga ahileh, hichepa chu tolthat ahitai; tolthat mi chu thatei tei ding ahiye.

Amavang mihem thina thei mai mai songtum ham khat aman a amitha chu akhut a asuh lup jenga, chule ama jong athi den jeng jong leh, ama jong chu tolthat ma ma ahitai; tol that kiti tapou chu tha tei tei ding ahi.

Ahiloule mithat chun amitha chu thing manchah aman a avoh lup jeng ahiya, chule amanchah chu mithina thei mong mong ahiya, amivoh jong chu athi tah bah bah a ahileh, ama jong chu tol that ahitai; tolthat mi chu tha tei tei ding ahi.
Thisan phu lah nom pa amatah chun tolthat pa chu atha tei tei ding ahi; aman tolthat pa chu amu munaa athadoh jeng ding ahiye.
Chujongle mithat chun anachan lhih a vetda man a ajep lhuh jeng ham, ase lhuh jeng ham ahiya chule amipa chu athipai tah a ahijongleh,

ahilou jongle akitomo lhon man a akhut tuma achup lhuh jeng-ahiya, achup pa chu athiden jeng tah a ahileh, hitobanga bola mithat pa chu tha tei tei ding ahiye; ama jong chu tol that ahitan, thisan phu lah nompan ama chu akimuto pi phat phat le atha jeng ding ahi.
“Ahin kitomona jong neipi louva, chang jong anachang lhisin sin louva, hetman louva ama chu ajep lhuh jeng ham, aselhuh jeng ham ahileh,

chujongle mi thi theina song ham khat aman a amipa chu mu masah louhela asekhah ahiya, hichea hi amipa jong athiden jeng tah a ahileh, ama chu amelma hi hih hen lang, aman jong suhset ding monga ahol lou hijongle,
khoppin mithat pa le thisan phu lah nompa kah a thu a tan’uva chonna dan hijat dungjuiya hi athu atanpeh diu ahin;

khoppin mithatpa chu thisan phulah nompa khut’a kona ahuhdoh-uva, hitobanga hi khoppin mithat pa chu kiselna khopi, amapa jamlutna pen pena chu achensah-uva, mithat pa jong chu hiche khopia hi thaotwi theng kinusa thempu len pa thi kahsea cheng cheng jeng ding ahitai.
Ahinla ijemtia mithatpa hi hiche ajamlutna khopi akiselnaa kona chu itih phat hijongle apotdoh khah a gam pama achedoh khah a ahileh,
akiselna khopi gamgi kala hin thisan phulah nompan mudoh hen lang mithatpa chu thatdoh jengjong leh, amapa chun hiche mithatpa atha jeh a hi thisan themmo chang lou ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh mithatpa chu akiselna khopi sunga thempulen pa thi kahsea potdoh louva umthim bih beh ding dol ahi; thempulen pa athi nung teng vang leh mithatpa jong chu agam lama hung kile kit’a achenna kichen thei ding ahitai.
“Nang ho dinga nachen chen nauva, nakhang khanguva naman jing jeng diu chondan kisem ho leh chonna dan kisem ho chu hicheng hi ahi.

Ijemtia mihem khat touvin mihing khat atha tah a ahileh, mithat pa chu hettohsah miho seitoh jala tha ding ahin; amavang, koi hile mithat ahi, tia kisei chu hettohsah mihem khatseh sei vanga kithat thei lou ding ahi.
Chujongle athi dinga lom mong mong tolthat mihem dinga ahindoh theina ding long lhat man nakilah thei louhel diu ahi; tolthat pa chu tha tei tei ding ahibouve.
Chule akiselna ding khopia jamlutsa tolthat pa jong chu thempulen pa thi masanga agam sunga ahung kile kit theina dinga nang hon amapa Iongman nakilah thei louhel diu ahiye.

Hitobanga hi nang hon nachen nau gam nasuh boh thei lou dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh thisan hin gamsung asuh boh ahin, agamsung suh thengna ding hi thil dang imacha aumpoi, ajeh chu agamsunga hi thisan kiso ahitan, thisan sopa thisan seh seh a choubou kisutheng thei ding ahi.

Hijeh a chu nang hon asunga nachen nau gam hi nasuh boh louhel diu ahi, agam lailung tah a hi keima cheng kahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai kitipa keima hi Isreal chate ja lah tah a cheng jing jeng kahiye,’ tin aseiye, tin.” ati.

Joseph chate phung holah aphung khat a kona, Manasseh chapa, Machir chapa, Gilead chate lah a phung khat sunga ainsunguva phung upa cheh chu ahung kikhin lut pai pai yuvin, Mose le lamkai dang ho chule Israel chate lah-a insung upa chengse jah a thu ahung seiyuvin ahi;

amaho hin aseiyun, “Kapuu henga Pakaiyin thu ana pen, agamsung hi Israel chaten gouva alo diuva phun sana kihop ding anati; chujongle kapuu hi Pakaiyin thu anapen kasopipau Zelophehad goulo ding gam chu achanute peh ding anatin ahi.

Ahin hichea hin achanute hi Isreal chate lah a phung dang ho chapaten kichenpi tau leh, amaho goulo gam kapauva goulo gama kona kilamanga, amaho jineina phunga goulo gam chutoh kigop tha ding ahitai; chuti hen lang hileh keiho chan goulo gama kona kikeh lha ding ahitan ahi.

Chujongle Israel chate Jubilee hung lhung ta hen lang hijongleh, achanu ho goulo gam chu ajinei nau phunga goulo gam chutoh kigompai pai ding ahi kittai; hijeh hin amaho goulo kiti hi kapu kapauva keiho phung goulo gama kona kiladoh pai ding ahitai,” atiuve.
Hichun Mose’n jong Pakai kamsoh-a konin Isreal chate chu thu apen aseitai, “Joseph chate phung thusei ho hi adih cheh-in ahi.
Zelophehad chanute chung chang thudola Pakai thupeh chu hiche hi ahiye, ‘Amaho hi adei deiyu toh kichengu hen; ahin akichenpi diu chu apau phung sunga mibou hitei tei ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Israel chate goulo gam hi phung khat’a kona phung choma kichon thei louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu Israel chate koi hijongle apa phunga ama ama goulo gam cheh chu akituh chah-a akikol chah cheh ding ahi.

Hijeh a chu Israel chate lah a koi phung hijong le chanu goulo gam chang kha a anachenpha chan chu, apa phung sunga mi khat to kicheng tei tei ding, hitobanga hi Israel chate ami tinin apu apa goulo gam chu alo thei cheh a achenpha tei tei ding ahi.

Hiti ahijeh a chu goulo gam kiti hi phung khat’a kona phung chom danga kichon thei louhel ding ahi: ipijehinem itileh Israel chate lah a phung jou sen ama ama goulo gam cheh chu akikol chah cheh diu ahi,’ ati tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Zelophehad chanuten jong Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang ban gin abol tauve;
Mahlah ahin, Tirzah ahin, Hoglah ahin, Milcah ahin, chule Noah ahin, Zelophehad chanute se se chu apau sopite chapate toh akicheng tauvin ahi.
Abonchauva Joseph chapa Manasseh chate phung sung jenga ajinei tah jeh-uvin, amaho goulo gam jeng jong chu apau insung phung ma ma a aumden tai.
Danthupeh hichengse hi Moab phaicham dunga, Jordan vadung panga Jericho khoa Pakaiyin Isreal chate chonna dan hi dinga Mose anathupeh ho chu ahitai.
